2724-2732. Irrelevant: During the dasa of 8th
lord (Moon) in the 33rd year or in the 39th year, the
king will be destroyed. During the native’s 35th
year, the king’s son will be physically ill and be
emaciated. These are the results for the 5th dasa.
The-native's enemies will be destroyed in Pandya
kingdom. ‘i

(b) In the 4th dasa, following 40th year of age,
wealth will accrue. He will acquire men-borne
conveyances. For two years he will enjoy Raja
‘Yoga effects. There is another authority to state
that during the said two years, the subject will grow
stronger in terms of prosperity.

(© The last one third part of the 4th dasa will
cause plenty of prosperity.

(@) If the 4th lord (Jupiter) is in the 11th house
(in Libra) in the company of the lords of the 9th and
10th (i.e. the Sun and Mercury), the person will
effortlessly gain a large-sized house. Prior to that
because of the blemish of debility, he will live in
many houses owned by others. This will be due to
the 4th lord's association with a debilitated planet
(ie. the Sun).

(©) After his 40th year, he will be happy and
will acquire landed properties.

(® Rabu in the Arudha ascendant being a

blemish will cause mental distress in the Sth dasa.
The effects of Yoga (prosperity) will be minimised
and he will receive a mix of good and bad effects
in this Dasa.

2733 - 2738. (a) Rahu in the 9th while its lord
(Sun) is in debility will be a source of difficulties
in the initial and concluding phases of the 4th dasa.
There will be danger on account of evil reasons.
Mental distress will occur due to sight of poisonous
snakes at home.

(b) His fortunes will improve in the 4th dasa but
his wife will have some troubles due to planetary
blemishes which will be overcome through Brah-
mins. Then happiness will recur.

(c) The native’ wife will die due to shortcom-
ings in the delivery chamber if Rahu is in the 9th
while Venus isin debility (in Virgo) with exaltation
Navamsa.

(b) Fifth Dasa: His son will celebrate acquisi-
tion of progeny. Two or three children being born
then will be destroyed (i.e. grand-children of the
native willbelost). Asaresult, the native’sson will
bein grief, Due to fortunes and (remedial) efforts,
the son’s longevity will be ensured. In the end of
this very dasa, the native’s daughter will obtain
surviving children but she will turn to be indigent.
Her happiness will also decline.

(©) Dasa of Mars: In the dasa of Sth lord (i.e.
Mars), the native of Champaka Nadiamsa will
obtain progeny through his second wife. In the end
of this dasa, he will gain male issues. His fortunes
## Page 70

Chandra Kala Nadi 55

and prosperity will progress and enemies will face
destruction. He will visit pilgrim centres in the
48th year. He will be troubled by windy diseases
for which remedies have to be sought.

(@ During the Sth dasa, in the 44th year, his
spouse will pass away. Instantly he will be remar-
ried. The destruction of first wife could also be in
the first sub period of the 5th dasa. After the said
death, his fortunes will somewhat decline.

2741 - 2745. (a) The dasa of a malefic planet
will surely produce inauspicious effects for a na-
tive of Champaka Nadiamsa, Sagittarius ascend-

ant.
(b) Abundantly auspicious results and favours
from the king and ministers will occur in the dasa
of a benefic planet.

(©) The sub period of a malefic planet during a
malefic’s dasa will be evil. Enmity with the king
and minister and hatred of Brahmins will also
result.

(@ One belonging to 2nd half of this Nadiamsa
will lose alliance with friends and Brahmins and
consequently earn enmity of the king,

landed properties, crops and fortunes.

(g) Inthe dasa of Rahu, prosperity will occur to
his friends, progeny and kinsfolk.

2752. According to Guru: To overcome the
disorders of wind and bile, one Drona of sesamum
should ‘be donated. Donation of golden vessel,
sesamum and earthenware lamps should be done in
Ramesvaram.

Notes: “Drona” is an ancient measure of 4
Adhakas or 1024 pistfuls. Ramasetu denotes
Ramesvaram in Tamil Nadu. Before constructing
hi historic floating bridge in the ocean to proceed
to Lanka, Lord Rama worshipped Lord Siva in this
place.

2753 - 2756. According to Bhrigu: A golden
vessel worth five or ten gold coins along with
sesamum lamps should be donated. Gift equalling
the cost of the “image” should be given away (to the
Brahmin). To overcome the trace of the disease,
donation of se'samum is essential on the early night
of'a Saturday coinciding with one’s ruling star and
Pradosha in Ramesvaram. Asa result, the subject
will be relieved of all his sins and the disease will
‘be destroyed. There is an authority to state that the
golden vessel could be worth two Nishkas (gold
coins) and by donation of sesamum, the patient will
be freed from the diseases.

Notes: “Tila Jyoti” and Tila Jyotisha” occur in
these verses which are only corrupt terms. “Tila”
means sesamum seeds; “Jyoti” means lamp and
“Jyotisha” an astrologer.

committed knowingly or unknowingly will be

(asper KCD) is in the 6th or 8th with malefic aspect
or company, one will be troubled by diseases due

done (to keep good health).

2760. This verse has some corrupt mixture.
“Neecha graha samanvite” in the first line means
“joining a debilitated planet”. “Subha Graha yute”
means joining a benefic planet. “Rahu daaye
Subhanvite” reads as “Rahu daaye striyanvite” in
another version. We can however take one clue at
east concerning Mars dasa which is said to cause
happinessin the end for a Sagittarius native, if Mars
at birth is with a benefic planet.

2771-2775. Rahu dasa: (a) The dasa of Rahu
who at birth is placed in the 9th will produce much
happiness and wealth. Obstacles of the subject will
also be removed. He will daily donate food (to the
poor).

(b) For Sagittarius ascendant, the Arudha Pada
should be Leo (i.e. Jupiter at birth should be in
Aries). Rahu should occupy Leo, the Arudha Pada.
Asaresult, the subject will be affluent. Further in
the dasa of such Rahu, he will enjoy abundant
prosperity and become a minister or justice. He
will be famous in king’s service, be a chief and be
independent. Ina later year, his prosperity will be
in the Pandya kingdom (i.e. he will have a change
of place for good).

(c) He will obtain auspicious effects and birth
of ason in the sub period of Jupiter or in the middle
and concluding portions of Rahu’s sub period.
After the 35th year, (or) in Saturn’s sub period, his
progeny will have progress.

2777 - 2782. Dasa of Ascendant lord: (a)
Results of the dasa of the lord of the ascendant (i.e.
Jupiter) will be akin to those due at the end of the
4th dasa.

(b) In the 71st year, during the currency of the
sub period of ascendant lord (Jupiter) and in the
dasa of Jupiter, the native of Sagittarius ascendant,
Champaka Nadiamsa, will have fear of untimely
death.

(©) Such fear will exist in the dasa of Rahu also.
The subject will have misunderstandings with his
sister in the end of the Dasa of Rahu. To overcome
the evils of the dasa of Rahu, prayers to Rahu
should be offered.

(@ Intermittently, the native will be happy due
to (favourable phases occurring in) Kala Chakra
Dasa system.

(e) To overcome the evils of untimely death,
necessary remedial measures should be under-
taken.

(® His father will be endangered in the 81st
year and he will take to ascetic order following a
family death. i

distress for a native of Sagittarius ascendant. His

isin the 2nd in transit, his happiness will be limited.

2797 - 2801. (a) Moon’s Dasa: The Moon
ruling the 8th should be in an angle from the
ascendant with Aries Navamsa. With Amala Yoga,
his Moon’s dasa will give good fortunes.

(b) Mars? Dasa: This position of the Moon in
Navamsa will enable the dasa of Mars to give
prosperity fortwo years. The beginning and ending
portions of Mars dasa will cause troubles.

(©) Rahu’s Dasa: Rahu dasa will proauce
fortunes. The sub period of Rahu, in his own dasa
will be distressful and will cause discases to his
friends(?) and the ruler(?). The native will have
increased fortunes due to the mercy of replaced
king (i.e. undera different employer). The firstsub
period in the dasa of Rabu occupying Leo will
cause much distress. When the Sun transits the said
Leo, the person will suffer from fever and abdomi-
nal diseases. His children and others will also be
sick. With auspicious transits of the Sun, he will
obtain a son and be greatly happy with excellent
robes, ormaments, wealth and auspiciousness.

2802. (a) Thus have been stated the effects for
the sub period of Rahu (in Rahu's dasa) fora native
of Champaka Nadiamsa, Sagittarius ascendant.

(b) Rahu dasa commences at the end of 49
months (i.e. 4y 1m), 10 days and 52 ghatis.

(c) If the lord of the sign occupied by the Dasa
lordis in debility, then the dasain question will give
poor effects.

Notes: (b) The text indicates when Rahu dasa
‘commences for a certain horoscope the Nadi was
referring to and abruptly ends without any use of
the information.

Apart from the indications given by a planetas
to how its Dasa should be when it occurs, it is
important to note as to when exactly a dasa com-
mences. A horoscope for that moment is drawn
which will throw more light on events to come.
This chart is called “Dasa Arambha Kala Kundali”
preparing which is anyway very cumbersome and
much exactitude is required. Sloppy and slipshod
methods will destroy the analysis.

Prithu Yasas in Hora Sara also advocates locat-
ing the planets in the horoscope cast for the moment
## Page 76

Chandra Kala Nadi 61

at which a given dasa commences. I have given
elaborate details and tables in this context in my
English translation of Hora Sara which cannot be
reproduced here for fear of enlargement of our
present work.

(©) The 2nd line of sloka contains the expres-
sion "Aasbashtesadadbamam" which means "from
the 6th lord, it is the worst.” Another expression
"Uchchadhipa suabhasubham” means "the exaltant
dispositor is auspicious and inauspicious". This
defective line thus does not provide meaningful
clues.

2804 - 2805. Atthe time of the commencement
of adasa, if the 4th lord is conjoined with amalefic,
the dasa will give less happiness. In its sub period
(ie. in the first sub period), the native’s lands and
housing properties will be destroyed. He will incur
enmity with royal circles and friends. The word
“Daara” by reversal (i.e. Katapayadi system) de-
notes the 4th house in this context. (The 4th house
denotes friends for it is "Suhrit Sthaana" which
mention could be found in almost every standard
classical text-book.)

2806 - 2807. Note if Mars is in Vargottama in
‘Taurus (the 6th). Then the middle of Mars dasa will
produce enmity with Vaishnava Brahmins (say
men of learning) and mental distress in relation to
royal duties. The native’s quadrupeds and grains
will be destroyed. He will be disposed to remain

unemployed for three years. These will be true in
case of the 2nd half of Champaka Nadiamsa.

2808-2809. Should Saturn and Marsaspect the
ascendant that commences a dasa, one will incur
windy diseases and indigestion. In that dasa, the
native will perform in blame-worthy deeds. More
details have been stated in “Dasarambha Phala” for
Champaka Nadiamsa.

2810 - 2815. (a) For the dasa of the 6th lord
(Venus), effects have been widely mentioned in the
chapter dealing with effects. One willreceive great
happiness in the 4th dasa. In the 6th dasa, prosper-
ity will occur.

(b) Count the number of Nakshatras from the
one occupied by the lord of a Dasa through the birth
Nakshatra andmultiply the same by 7and divide by
8. The remainder will indicate eight kinds of
different effects, viz. disease, gain etc. Accord-
ingly, the result of the dasa should be understood.

(©) Count the number of Nakshatras from the
dasa lord through the sub period lord. Multiply the
said figure by 7 and divide by 8. Disease, gain,
## Page 77

62 Deva Keralam

murmuring (out of pains), confinement, riches,
exceeding affluence, loss of money and untimely
death are the 8 kinds of effects to be based on the
remainder as per Sarva Nadi.

strong in own sign, or own Navamsa, the subject
will have conveyances, will enjoy pleasures, be

have three conveyances and will be happy through-

2826 - 2829. Sri Gauri Yoga: (a) With the
Moon in a trine to Aries (i.e. in Leo or Sagittarius)
while the 4th (i.e. Pisces) is occupied by (exalted)
Venus, a yoga called Sri Gauri Yoga is formed.
Then the person will be equal to a king. He will
## Page 78

Chandra Kala Nadi 63

enjoy abundant pleasures, will destroy his adver-
saries, be of sacrificing disposition, highly just,
valorous, enthusiastic, heroic and a protector of
men. He will be attached to his progeny and
spouse.

(b) Venus in the 3rd with Aquarius Navamsa
Le. in Vargottama, (while the Moon is placed as at
“a”) will give the following effects. The person
will be ever affectionate to his spoue and progeny,
be dark in complexion, will have a stout (or promi
nent) waist and broad eyes. He will be beautiful,
indolent, will enjoy pleasures, and be rich with
conveyances.

(©) Venus in the 4th along with the Moon
causing (another kind of) Sri Gauri Yoga will
reveal the undermentioned results. The subject
will have (favourable physiognomical) symbols of
fish, barley and Ankusa (elephant-driver’s hook)
‘on his palm. He will be interested in honouring
gods, Brahmins and saints. Further, he will have
special symbols on the back and sides of the body,
be of sacrificing mind, attached to Yoga systems
(ie. Dhyana, Hatha etc.), be lordly, will have a
hump on the shoulder and will have attractive
spouse and progeny. He will be the head of an
army, be happy, will have strong limbs, be lustful
and be endowed with great physical strength.. He
will be a knower of everything, be discrimimating
in taste and will enjoy pleasures.

Notes: (b) "Kumbhe athava Vrischike" vide
sloka 2828 above rightly reads as "Kumbhamse
Dushikye" in another version which is included in
the translation at the cost of our text.

2830. (a) The sign Aries with a benefic planet
while the 10th (Virgo) is occupied by Jupiter will
cause fame and wealth.

(b) Two malefics in the 4th (Pisces) will cause
exhaustion of riches.

2831 - 2832. (a) The lords of the 9th and 10th
counted from the 9th should join in a sign which is
the own or exaltation sign of one of them. The
ascendant lord being in strength should be aspected
by abenefic planet. Asa result, the subject will be
kingly and will enjoy the status due to an emperor.
He will be endowed with many gems, riches,
grains, gold etc. and be a lord of wealth.

(b) The lord of the 10th from the ascendant
should be in Leo with a Navamsa that exalts him or
is owned by him ora friend. In that case, the native
will live by business activities, be engaged in royal
service, be learned, honoured by the king, an ocean
of all virtues, will become rich through Vaisyas
(men of trading community), be widely famous in
the world and be so efficacious as a king.

Notes: Contrary to the caption given, theses
two verses do not relate to Dhananjaya Nadiamsa
of a movable sign, but to Sagittarius ascendant in
general. These can also be applied to other ascend-
ants according to the situation.

In the first line of sloka 2831, the text refers to
lords of the 9th and 10th counted from the 9th being
in debility. This expression is untenable and hence
omitted in the rendering to avoid confusion.

(a) The hints given can also be applied to the
native’s father.

(b) This should be specifically understood as
Mercury being in the sign Leo with Virgo Nav-
amsa, Taurus/Libra Navamsa.

2833 - 2837. Movable Ascendant -
Dhananjaya Nadiamsa: (a) The native of first
half of this Nadiamsa, having the Moon in Cancer,

will be a Soodra and be the second issue of the

family. Orhe could be the third. He will have older
brother(s) and many younger brothers and sisters.

(b) One born in the 2nd half of this Nadiamsa
will be the 9th or 10th issue of the family. He will
be of blood-red complexion.

(©) One belonging to the first half will have a
thin body.

(@ Hiscounterpart will have aheavy physique,
‘be wealthy, eloquent in speech and kind in dispo-
sition.

(e) The native of first half of Dhananjaya
Nadiamsa will have an emaciated and long body.
He will be libidinous and will be ever inimical to
his co-born. He will consume limited food, be
malignant in actions, ignorant, and will look like a
genuine person.

Notes: Dhananjaya Nadiamsa extends as un-
der: in amovable sign from 24” 24' to 24” 36’; inan
immovable sign from 5° 24' to 5° 36’; and ina dual
sign from 9° 24' to 9° 36.

One belonging to the first half of the subject
Nadiamsa, with Saturn's aspect on the ascendant,
will be predominantly amalignant person. He will
be ever weak.

(b) The native of 2nd half will be genuine, be
passionate, devoid of diseases and will enjoy firm
fortunes. He willbe honoured by the king.

2840 -2841. (a) One born in the first half of the
subject Nadiamsa will eke out his livelihood by
trading activities while that of 2nd half will be
famous in his calling.

(b) The native of first half of this Nadiamsa will
be endowed with wealth and grains. Afterhis birth,
his father’s prosperity will multiply.

2844 - 2845. Cancer Ascendant: The Moon
ruling the ascendant should be aspected by Satum
and occupy Libra Navamsa while three planets are
in exaltation. Such a person will be wealthy.
Without the presence of a debilitated planet, there
will be no Yoga. (That is, in Kali Yuga, a debili-

tated planet isa mustso thatexalted planets are able

2846 - 2848. (a) One born in Dhananjaya
Nadiamsa, inamovable ascendant will be rich, and
valorous. He will enjoy happiness through his
paternal grand-mother and will acquire ornaments.
He will have excellent conduct, be truthful and
miserly.

(b) Should Saturn aspect the lord of the ascend-

ant, one will be irascible, mentally perturbed, -

addicted to women, will cheat his co-born, be
crooked, very whimsical, will go to hell (or will fall
to bad days), be given to anger and will cheat
genuine people. He will have many relatives.

2850 - 2852. Kubera Nadiamsa - Movable

Ascendant: (a) The subject of the first half of this

part of the zodiac with the ascendant lord in aspect

to Saturn will be born in astreet extending from east

to west and in a house facing the direction ruled by

the moon, that is the north-west. His birth will be
in a village or a town in the region of a river. He
will live ina forestarea or alternatively willbe bom
there.

(b) One belonging to the 2nd half will be born
in the region of a river in a town and will live there.
His father will be in royal service.

(©) The native of former half of the subject
Nadiamsa will be dear to the king.

Notes: “Kubera Nadiamsa” used in this portion
of the text denotes the subject Nadiamsa, which is
Dhananjaya Nadiamsa. This need not be confused
with Kubera Shashtiamsa,

2853 - 2855 (a) Cancer Ascendant: The na-
tive’s paternal grand-father will be endowed with
longevity if the ruler of the house denoting the said
relative, viz. Mars (the ruler of 9th from 9th, i.e. the
Sth) is in exaltation, in the company of two planets

have many co-born and many burdens. His life
would be troublesome. He would eam wealth
through his children.

2857 - 2860. The paternal grand-father of the
subject native would be fond of Tantrik rituals and
would worship Lord Siva. He would have a bad
history. In between he would enjoy good fortunes
and camal pleasures. Due to the ills of his Tantrik
rituals, his wife would incur early death. Foralong
time, he would be without spouse and be in the grip
of acute poverty. His father would be rich, and
would beget sons and daughters through a prosti-
tute. Due to this blemish, the native’s grand-father
would be indigent. By visiting sacred places, his
fortunes would revive due to the mercy of Lord
Siva.

native of first half of the subject Nadiamsa would

along with his son. His poverty would be cured and
fortunes would spread in his family. He would
obtain sons and grand-sons. Due to the merits of his

eam fame and be intelligent. Although he may
have many co-born, he will be left with only one.

2864 - 2866. Kubera Nadiamsa: (a) Paternal
grand-father would be charitable in disposition if

the 5th lord is in a Navamsa of Saturn.

(b) Birth in the above-mentioned Nadiamsa’s
second half would also indicate similar effect. But
the paternal grand-father will not visit Ganges. He
will instal a Siva Linga.

In the chapter on Bhava, effects have been
given in detail in respect of the said relative,
particularly for the first half of this Nadiamsa.
‘Yoga effects have also been told in a scattering
manner.

2867 - 2868. Kubera Nadiamsa - First Half:
Death of paternal grand-father will occur in the end
of the 2nd dasa or in the beginning of the 3rd dasa
of the native. From birth till the end of the 12th year
(i.e. before the 12th year) or within 2 years follow-
ing 16th year of age of the native, death of paternal
grand-father will occur and marriage to older co-
born will take place.

should be involved in Kesari Yoga. Asa result, the
father of the native of Kubera Nadiamsa (Cancer

2873 - 28747. Cancer Ascendant - Kubera
Nadiamsa: The native’s father will be black in
complexion and will have stout (or large) ears. He
will be highly intelligent, famous in royal service
and will honour gods and Brahmins. He will
incessantly follow the Vedic codes of conduct, will
firmly establish the native (i.e. will contribute to
his prosperity) and will be in a position to decide
what the men of his race should do (i.e. he would
be an eminent social figure).

2875 - 2888. The undermentioned effects
would occur to the father of one bornin Dhananjaya
Nadiamsa, Cancer ascendant.

(a) Jupiter in Martian Navamsa: Note if the
9th lord Jupiter is aspected by Saturn and occupies
a Navamsa of Mars. Then the father of the said
native would be troubled by windy diseases. For
some time, he would take to unorthodox ways and
later on shift to the Vedic path. Initially he would
be fond of Saivites (i.e. the followers of the school
of Lord Siva) and then follow Vedic codes of
conduct. He would be very intelligent, would have
many brothers, be honourable and would patronise
hiscobom. During his childhood he would bein the
grip of poverty and would gather wealth by hisown
efforts. He would wander in the region of Kerala
and be happy after marriage. Following the birth
ofason, his happiness would increase. His fortunes
would improve through his son.

(b) 2nd Half of Kubera Nadiamsa: The father
of the native of second half of Dhananjaya Nadi-
## Page 83

68 Deva Keralam

amsa would be greatly happy. He would attain
much fame in royal circle and would live in many
houses. In between, his fortunes would increase
and he will be happy in a forest region. His fame
‘would increase through the king of another forest
region. He would patronize his kinsfolk, be gentle,
virtuous, passionate and be a chief person of atown
or village. He would be inimical to his co-born and
as a consequence be in grief. He would incur
diseases and suffer separation from his son.

(©) Ist Half of Kubera Nadiamsa: The father
ofthe subjectbelonging tothe Isthalf of the subject
Nadiamsa would be somewhat grieved on account
of enmity with co-bom and would have two wives.
At the time of family property division, he would
be distressed (i.e. be at a disadvantage).

(d) Mars Aspected by Venus: If birth be in the
Isthalf of Kubera Nadiamsa while Mars isin aspect
to Venus, the native’s father would incur enmity
with his kinsfolk in the middle of his life and be
troubled by royal wrath.

(e) Dhananjaya (Kubera) Nadiamsa: Ac-
cording to sage Garga, the father of the subject of
Dhananjaya Nadiamsa (apparently applicable to
either half) would receive following effects. He
would be happy whose prosperity would increase
following the birth of a son (or the native). His co-
born would prosper. Hé would live in a town or
village between forests, would be famous in many
countries and would have varied kinds of business
activities. He would be attached toa gentle path of
living and would make his fortunes after some
interval (or initial debacles). He would have two
loving preceptors, be honourable and be an expert
in Siva Purana,

(f) IfRahuis in the Sth without Jupiter’s aspect,
the native’s father would blame his preceptors.

2889. One’s Sth house deals with the preceptor
of his father for it is the 9th from the 9th. Rahu or
Ketu in the 5th house of the native denotes that his
father will have two preceptors.

Notes: The 9th house denotes one’s preceptor
or Guru who initiates him spiritually or otherwise
for gathering knowledge. From this verse we can

formulate a principle that Rahu or Ketu in the 9th
will cause two preceptors to the native.

2890 - 2891. (a) Rahu or Ketu in the 5th
indicates that one’s father will be an expert in
Vedas and Philosophy. He will be bold and an
expert in Siva Purana.

(b) The native’s paternal uncle’s son will be a
person of wisdom.

(©) Such number of paternal uncles will be
long-lived as the number of Bindus in the Ashtaka
varga of Venus, the ruler of the house paternal
uncles (the 11th, Taurus).

2892. (a) According to sage Kasyapa, the na-
tive’ s fatherand paternal uncles (i.e. father’s broth-
ers) will live in distant lands.

(b) The number of paternal uncles will corre-
spond to the Navamsas past from Aries,

Notes: (b) As regards the number of paternal
uncles, sage Kasyapa implies use of the position of
Venusin Navamsa. Thatis, the number of Navamsas
covered by Venus from Aries in Navamsa will
indicate the number of co-born the native’s father
will have. For Cancer ascendant, Venus is the lord
of the 11th which is the 3rd from 9th.

half of the subject Nadiamsa will have two sisters.

paternal uncle will be childless.

2901 -2906¥s. The eldest paternal uncle of the
native of Kubera Nadiamsa will be indigent. He
will have many sons, two wives and one son
(through the second wife). The brothernext to him
(ie. 2nd uncle) will have prosperous children. Yet
the nextto him (i.e, 3rd uncle) will indulge in sinful
deeds, be irascible and will incur much grief. He
will be lustful and a knower of all, be passionate
and will in between have increased fortunes. Due
to Tantrik activities, he will be in poverty andin his
old age will be distressed. Out of paternal uncles,
this particular one will have two wives and will
have sons and daughters. He will be happy
throughout his life. The eldest uncle will hate his
cobom and will be a great cheat. Due to his sins,
he will be in grief and his fortunes will be destroyed
in his old age. He will incur evils due to his sons,
will lose his position and be mentally distressed.
Using Dasa periods, the chapter on Bhava exten-
sively deals with this aspect apart from some clues
with Nadiamsa.

2907 - 2909. Mother: The lord of the 4th,
Venus, joining a planet with strength and receiving
the aspect of the 9th lord (Jupiter), will cause a

virtuous mother to the native of Kubera Nadiamsa
(Cancer ascendant). She will be pure and will ever
## Page 85

70 Deva Keralam

receive the affection of her husband. She will have
many daughters and be endowed with brothers,
sisters, classic robes and ornaments. She will be
somewhat sickly.

Notes: In verse 2907, “Saargha (Sa + Argha)
graha” is translated as a planet with strength.
“Argha” is value or worth. A planet with value
means a planet with strength. Hence Venus is
required to be with a strong planet.

2912 - 2916. (a) The maternal uncle of the
native of Kubera Nadiamsa will in his childhood be
happy. In the end he will incur poverty and grief.
He will have limited progeny.

(b) The native’s maternal aunt will be endowed
with sons and be fortunate in respect of her hus-

(©) The mother of the native of Dhananjaya
Nadiamsa will have one brother. He will have eye
diseases, be ever in grief, virtuous and fortunate.
He will have strange (or bright) eyes.

(d) The sister of the native’s mother will be
fortunate, be endowed with sons and daughters.

(©) Mercury ruling the house of materna grand-
father (i.e. Gemini which is 12th from Cancer
ascendant) should be in the company of Venus and
Mars. As a result the said relative will be a
householder (fulfilling one of the 4 Asrama Dharmas
prescribed by Hindu scriptures) while a maternal
uncle will be indigent. The said grand-father will
have enmity with his coborn and due to his sins, the
maternal uncle will be in poverty.

Mercury, being in the 3rd along with Ketu while
significator Mars is in exaltation, indicates that the
subject of Kubera Nadiamsa will have 10 or 11 co-
bom. 4 or 5 of them will be endowed with long

2921 - 2926. (a) The elder brother of the native
of Dhananjaya Nadiamsa will have two wives.

(b) Malefics in the 11th will give a barren wife
to elder brother. He will be sinful due to curse of
Brahmins in previous birth.

(©) The 1th lord (Venus) joining Mars (in one
sign) and begetting debilitation Navamsa (Virgo)
would be inflicted by the blemish caused by union
with a Brahmin woman in a previous birth. Due to
that sin, (i.e, due to such an afflicted Venus), his
wife will be childless (in the current birth). His
father-in-law will be a great sinner and will not
receive oblations after his death.

@ If the 11th lord (Venus) is in aspect to
Jupiter, the elder brother will be skilful in gathering
wealth, and be dear to his parents. But he will be
sickly. He will be endowed with happiness, will
have liaison with prostitutes, will adopt a son and
be emaciated due to a great disease.

of Dhananjaya Nadiamsa will adopt a male issue.

(b) Rahu being in association with Venus and
being in Virgo Navamsa denotes that one elder
brother will be childless while another will obtain
dead children. He will have a wicked wife, will
have one son and be ever in sadness on account of
Progeny.

2930 - 2934, One bom in Kubera Nadiamsa,
Cancer ascendant, Aquarius Navamsa, will have
two brothers, be eloquent in speech and will have
anadoptedissue. The eldest son (of the family) will
beenthusiasticin treading impeccable paths. After
some time, he will fall sick due to sins of paternal
grand-father. To overcome this blemish, dips in
Setu should be undertaken. He will be endowed
with family. Donation of sesamum should also be
done. Following these, he will enjoy health and
progeny. For obtaining progeny to another co-
born, on a Sunday ..... death in Setu ... and he will
obtain daughters.

Notes: There are some interruptions and inter-
polations in these verses and the rendering is after
eliminating doubtful additions.

In verse 2934, the useful suggestion is that
another brother will be childless in the initial
stages, and will obtain female issues after some
rituals. This verse can be linked to the following
three verses.

2935 - 2937. The last brother of all will have

some obstacles in begetting progeny. To overcome
this blemish, vows to Sun God on a Sunday coin-
## Page 87

2 Deva Keralam

ciding with Magha Saptami should be maintained
in Setu. A golden image of the Sun god, with
suitable robes should be worshipped. Donation of
sesamum should be undertaken and a hundred
Brahmins should be fed. Following these rituals,
he will obtain long-living progeny.

2938 - 2946. (a) His (brother's) adopted son
will be long-lived.

(b) The brother of the native of former half of
Kubera Nadiamsa will have two wives. One wife
will have sons and the second one will adopt
Progeny.

(c) Incase of birth in former half of Dhananjaya
Nadiamsa, the brother will have two sons.

(d) Two of the native’s sisters will be inflicted
by infantmortality. Two sisters will be long-lived.
One will be sickly. Another will be in poverty and
will have twin-sons. His sisters will have sons and
daughters.

(©) Some effects concerning co-bom of one of
Kubera Nadiamsa are stated below. His brother
willbe blood-red in complexion and will be wicked
inchildhood. Afterwards he will perform penance
and be endowed with wisdom. He will be the best

among worshippers of Lord Siva and be an excel-
lent donor. He will follow Vedic conduct. He will
have many dead children and limited progeny. He
will be grieved due to loss of co-born, be inwardly
cunning, be independent for some time and will
make fortunes on his own. He will be wealthy, will
enjoy much pleasures, and be the husband of a
wicked woman. His in-laws will be sinful and
hypocritic.

Kasyapa, the ascendant being Cancer with Aquarius

Aquarius and in Aquarius Navamsa, will cause
many sins in the in-laws’ family of the native’s
brother. Because of those sins, the brother will be

2949 - 29551. Cancer Ascendant - Kubera
Nadiamsa: (a) One born in this part of the zodiac
with Saturn in his exaltation sign, or in Capricom
Navamsa will have only one marriage. His mar-
riage will occur in his 2nd dasa. He will have
## Page 88

Chandra Kala Nadi B

liaison with many women and be secretively lust-
ful. He will be rich if the 7th lord Saturn is exalted.
The said lustful disposition will exist upto the age
of 35. According toanother authority it willbe upto
the age of 45. After the age of 20, he will join
others’ women,

(b) Venus & Mars in Aries: Venus in the 10th
(ip Aries) in the company of Mars will make one

_lighly libidinous. He will be sinful (due to illicit

(©)Mercury & Marsin Aries: Mercury therein

semen in old age. Because of that, the person will
occasionally be in distress.

(@ Venus in Scorpio: Venus in the 5th from
the ascendant (i.e. in Scorpio) will cause diseases
generated by heat. The person will incur loss of
semen and his lustfulness will somewhat increase.
His wife will be dark in complexion and will have
limited number of brothers and many sisters, The
native will live for a long time.

brother-in-law, particularly the latter, will incur
penury. He (.e. brother-in-law) will be enthusias-
tic of going to impeccable places and will have

and obtaining Aquarius Navamsa will give many

his sons will incur poverty and will have limited
number of issues. The native will die following

organ.

2962 - 2968. (a) The native of first half of this
Nadiamsa will incur planetary evils.

(b) One belonging to 2nd half will have many
blemishes concerning progeny.

(©) In case of birth in first half, fear of destruc-
tion of progeny will existto some extent, due to sins
committed by his father. To ward off this evil,
bathing in Setu should be done. Donation of
sesamum will destroy diseases. Ritual bath offered
to (the prescribed) deity with milk, and gifting of a
cow and sesamum in Ramesvaram will vanish the
blemishes in question.

(@ Thenative of Cancerascendant, Dhananjaya
Nadiamsa, Ist half, will have two sons, be wealthy
and will-have two wives.

(e) Kubera Nadiamsa - Cancer Ascendant:
Should there be a malefic in the Sth, he will have
two adopted sons out of whom one will enjoy
excellent fortunes. The other one will be fortunate
(of a moderate order), be a houscholder and be
wealthy. The native will in his old age incur grief
on account of loss of progeny.

sloka 2968 defies proper application.

2979 - 298813. Kubera Nadiamsa - Cancer
Ascendant: (a) From the first to fourth dasa, the
native’s fortunes will gradually improve. The Sth
dasa will specially increase his fortunes.

(b) Saturn’s 2nd round of transit in Leo will
cause death of mother. InCapricom he will destroy
father. Following this, the subject will lose his
brother and paternal uncle, in that order. After his
36th year, death will occur in the relatives’ circle.

(©) Saturn moving in a sign identical with the
Navamsa occupied by the 8th lord (i.e. of Saturn
himself) ora trine thereof will bring about the death
of the native’s paternal grand-father, during the 3rd
dasa. After this, the eldest of the paternal uncles
will quit the world in the native’s third dasa with
Saturn moving in Leo etc. These apply to Kubera
Nadiamsa (read “Kuberamse” meaning Kubera
Nadiamsa instead of “Kuliramse” - Cancer Nav-
amsa).

(d) Irrelevant: Satum’s journey in Capricorn,
Taurus, Leo and Libra or trines thereof will be a
period of intense difficulties. Famine and strife
will destroy the king.

(e) The end of 2nd dasa or beginning of 3rd dasa
will cause much auspicious effects to the subject.
His father will obtain a son in the 4th dasa. (This
should be applied to exceptional cases.)

(© Saturn at birth occupying the 4th from the
ascendant Cancer and in aspect to the Moon will
cause death of father due to dropsy. The native will

obtain paternal wealth in his 5th dasa, in an auspi-
cious planet's sub period.

(g) He will have gains after his 40th year, will
become independent, wealthy and intelligent. After
the age of 43, he will have clashes with his brother.
During that phase he will become shrewd. He will
incur grief on account of loss of progeny.

2989 - 2994, Kubera Nadiamsa: (a) The lord
of the 9th Arudha Pada being in exaltation and
being in the company of Venus will give wealth
right from birth. The native will be very fortunate.

(b) Should Rahu be in the Sth house, his Dasa
will destroy the native’s son. He will lose wealth.
After these debacles, he will recoverhis happiness.

(c) His 3rd dasa will give him progeny after
36th year. Oritcould bein the beginning of the said
dasa. From the middle of the 3rd dasa through the
Sth dasa, it will bea phase of obtainment of progeny
for the native of Kubera Nadiamsa. Afterwards he
will enjoy progeny's wealth. Inhis 6th dasa he will
be happy. His children will be prosperous. His
younger brother will cause him happiness and his
(ie. younger brother's) son will earn wealth but be
inimical to the native’s son.

Notes: (a) “Kuliramse” should read as
“Kuberamse” meaning Kubera Nadiamsa.

2996 - 2999. (a) Saturn in his sign of exaltation
or in own Navamsa while the ascendant lord is in
amovable sign will bless the native of Dhananjaya
Nadiamsa, Ist half, Cancer ascendant, with lon-
gevity.

(b) Kubera Nadiamsa: Should the Navamsa
ascendant fall in Aquarius, life span will range
from middle to end of full extent. The full length
ofllife for this native willbe 70. After the age of 50,
he will incur physical illness for which immediate
remedies should be undertaken.

3000 - 3002¥4. (a) Mental perturbation will
come to pass in the sub period of Mars or in the end
of the sub period of the Moon, in the Sth dasa.
Physical emaciation will also be experienced by
the native of Dhananjaya Nadiamsa.

(b) Suitable remedies have to be directed to be
performed. The images of Rabu, Mars, Jupiter and
the Sun separately and remedies be performed as
per family tradition.

(©) The native of 2nd half of this Nadiamsa will

have timely death at the age of 51. But the one
belonging to first half of the said Nadiamsa will
face untimely death which should be remedied.

Notes: (b) Reference to Sameerana Nadiamsa
is out of context. Neither there is such a zodiacal
division.

3003 - 3006. (a) First Half - Dhananjaya
Nadiamsa: The Moon in Aries, an angle from the
ascendant, in aspect to Saturn and begetting Libra
Navamsa will instil great fear in the junction of the
(Sth) dasa. During the junction of Sth dasa, fear of
untimely death will persist.

(b) In case of birth in 2nd half, death will be
timely (i.e. there will be no fear of untimely death)
due to remedial measures.

(c) Kubera Nadiamsa - First Half: The begin-
ning and ending portion of the Sth dasa, or during
the sub period representing the 6th dasa (i.e. the 2nd
sub period of 5th dasa), the native will incur
physical iliness.

3007. The Sun in the Arudha Pada of the 6th
house in aspect to the Moon while Satur is in a
trine from the Sun will cause tuberculosis of the
lungs.

Notes: The text uses a strange term
“Shashtadhipa Pade” which strictly rendered leads
to the Arudha Pada owned by the 6th lord which
otherwise is the 6th itself counted from the ascend-
ant. In my view, to make proper sense, it should
read as “Shashtarudha Pade” denoting the Arudha
Pada obtainable for the 6th house.

3008 - 3014. (a) The native of 2nd half of
Kubera Nadiamsa will be sick for long durations of
time.

(b) Satur in the 4th gives heart diseases.
Abdominal disorders are also possible with Saturn
in the 4th. After some time, good health will
prevail.

(©) Effects for the whole of the subject Nadi-
amsa are now stated. In the dasa of the 9th lord,
after the age of 52, happiness will prevail. The
native’s son will attain prosperity and the native
will perform highly charitable deeds.

(@) Incase of birth in the Isthalf of Dhananjaya
Nadiamsa, the dasa of Jupiter will give much
happiness except in the sub period of Jupiter. In the
Sth dasa, the sub period of Jupiter will cause evils
to father’s brother, and loss of one’s own grandson.

(©) 70 will be full life-span for a native of
Dhananjaya Nadiamsa, Ist half whereas one born
in the later half will live upto 61 or 51 at the
maximum.

(© According to’sage Kasyapa, the Sun’s tran-
sitin a sign equal to the Navamsa occupied by the
natal Moon will cause death. At that time, the
transit Moon will be in a movable sign.

3016. If the Arudha pada of the 12th house
counted from the Moon is occupied by malefics,
the native will not be happy. If Jupiter aspects the
said Pada, some happiness will exist.

Notes: The text suggests Arudha Pada counted
from the Moon which is unheard of. At least in
available original Jaimini and Parasari literature, 1
have not come across such an expression. Hence I
have my own doubt about the authenticity of this
instruction.

Possibly there is a copying error. The original
could have read as “Janmalagnaad vyayaarudhe”
(which could have been simply done away with the
expression “Vyayaarudhe”) instead of “Chandra
lagnaad vyayaarudhe”.

3017 - 3018. Gaja Kesari Yoga: This yoga
will give the subject some wisdom. Results have
to be ensured based on the chapter “Lokaantara”
(relating to the “other world”, following death).
Details should be told with the help of Prastara
Ashtaka Varga for the native of Kubera Nadiamsa.

3019 - 3021. Movable Ascendant - Kshama
Nadiamsa: (a) One born in a movable sign in the
first half of Kshama Nadiamsa, while the Sun is in
Leo will be a Brahmin. He will be the second issue
of the family. His older co-bomn will be destroyed
## Page 93

8 Deva Keralam

(ie. will not live for a long time). He will have
after-born (who will live long enough). He will
either be bom or will live in a town of forestregion.

(b) The rising sign being a movable one as the
Moonis in an immovable sign with Libra Navamsa
will cause birth in a colony of Brahmins near a
forest region.

Notes: (a) The Nadiamsa position is for the
ascendant and not for the Sun in this particular case.
The birth is to be treated as Kshama Nadiamsa, first
half, in a movable sign.

Kshama Nadiamsa extends thus: from 6° 36°
to 6" 48' of a movable sign; 23° 12' to 23° 24' ofa
fixed sign, and from 21° 36' to 21" 48° of a dual
sign.

3022 - 3025. (a) Ist Half: According to sage
Kasyapa, the subject of Ist half of Kshama Nadi-
amsa, in a movable sign, will be born and will live
ina colony of Brahmins, on a river bank, in a town
enriched by forests. He will be fortunate and
intelligent. The street of his birth will be spredd
from south tonorth and house facing the west or the
east. The house of birth will be in the end of the
street.

(b) 2nd Half: This person’s birth will be in a
region of river. The street concerned will extend
from east to west. The house will be a dilapidated
one facing the south. He will be the 4th issue of the
family or the 7th one and will have no younger
brothers.

3028 - 3031. The native of 2nd half of Kshama
Nadiamsa will lose his father in his very childhood.
He will be happy through his older brother forsome
time (i.e. will be brought up by him for some time).
He will be of blood-red complexion. His first dasa
will produce intense difficulties, and destruction of
father. His younger sisters will marry elsewhere
(possibly in another religion or country). He will
be intelligent, will incur poverty in early days and
will suffer loss of paternal grandfather.

3035 - 3041. Paternal Grand-father: The
paternal grand-father of the native of first half of
the subject Nadiamsa would have an exceedingly
poor livelihood. He would eke out his bread
through Panachangas (i.e. would be a small time
“astrologer”). He would have no wife for a long
time, and be grieved on account of loss of son and
co-bom. He would live in the homes of his older
brother and sister. His happiness would be through
his sister’ shusband. He would eam wealth through
men of business community and would eat regu-
lated diet. He would depend on others and would
live in Kasi. These views are of Garga. Due to
specified food habits, he would take to ascetic
order and would die. During the course of ascetic
order, his death would occur in the 4th year of the
native due to quadrupeds. According to another
text, death would be in the beginning or concluding
part of the 5th year or the 6th year of the native and
amidst great difficulties.

Notes: “Madhya Khanda” in sloka 3035 and
others in this portion of the text are redundant.

3044. The native’ s paternal grand-father would
go begging for food for some time. He would
maintain celibacy for some time. In between he
would be happy. His co-born and son would be
destroyed.

Notes: This verse has three lines and conveys
what has already been conveyed.

The first line has certain defects. Sama Nadi-

first half.

meaningless.

3046 - 3047. The brother-in-law of the said
relative would be a promoter of Dharma Sastras, ”
would be famous in royal service and would follow
## Page 95

80 Deva Keralam

the codes set by the Vedas. His wife would be
short-tempered. He would be wealthy, be endowed
with sons and daughters and would lose his eye
sight in his old age. He would have a good
“livelihood through the learning meant fora Smartha.
Notes: “Smartha” denotes an orthodox Brah-
man guided by traditional law and usage, espe-
cially a follower of Sankaracharya and Vedanta
doctrines. Thus the relative under discussion would
be a priest of the town performing recommended
Vedic rituals for its inhabitants.

3050 - 3052. (a) Due to defective past Karma,
abrother-in-law of the paterna grand-father will be
childless and will incur destruction of spouse and
progeny (the latter though born will be destroyed
early). His wife and dynasty will incur destruction
due tohis dealings with spirits and reciting destruc-
tive Mantras.

(b) According to sage Narada, the said relative
will be a religious preceptor of the town and will
later indulge in sinful deeds. Due to sins, his
dynasty will be destroyed. By performing good
deeds, he could get rid of the evils.

Notes: These 3 verses also deal with a brother-
in-law of the native’s paternal grand-father.

3054 - 3063. Father: The father of the native
of former half of Kshama Nadiamsa, movable
ascendant, will be wealthy. He will be a promoter
of ancienttraditions, be well-informed of the Vedas
and will have many students. He will be fond of
good deeds, be honourable and will lose his older
brother. He will eke out his livelihood by his
learning, be passionate, and will promote secret
activities. He will be famous in royal service, will
earn wealth through Brahmins, will have paternal
## Page 96

Chandra Kala Nadi 81

wealth and be fond of his wife. Afterbirth ofa son,
he will obtain landed properties, quadrupeds and
grains. He will have many sons and friends and
much wealth. He will be an excellent personage,
will earn money through his father and be liked by
the queen. He will be chief among Tantriks and be
fond of performing Vedic deeds. He will have a
windy body, with excess of bile. Due to these, he
will have troubles with shoulders. He will also
incur eye disorders. Occasionally he will incur
fever, or shoulder pains. He will be wealthy,
intelligent and will possess lands, quadrupeds and
coms. He will be passionate and will live through
Vedas. In the native’ s first dasa, he will incur fever.
With the good offices of astrologers and due to the
meritorious deeds of his past birth, he will impart
free education and will overcome the fever. He will
be endowed with longevity.

sign and joining the Sun denotes that the native’s
father will be devoted to Lord Siva and will per-
form His worship. Due to the blessings of his
preceptor, he will obtain progeny and fortunes.
Due to worship of Lord Siva, he will beget fortunes.
He will have worthy sons and grand-sons and be
ever happy.

3066 - 3070. (a) Father: Should the Moon be
in Kshama Nadiamsa, the native’s father will be
charitable, happy and will recite Panchakshari
Mantra with devotion. He will celebrate birth of a
son, be happy and wealthy.

(b) Father’s Preceptor: The Moon in the
subject Nadiamsa in Leo denotes that the father
will have only one preceptor who will have rich
knowledge of the Vedas. He will incur grief on
account of loss of brothers. After some time, grief
on account of loss of progeny will also come to

(©) The son-in-law of the native’s paternal
great grand-father (i.e. grand-father’s brother-in-
law discussed earlier) will be a sinful person. The
said person’s wife will incur grief on account of
loss of son and daughter. Thus should be under-
stood effects about the daughter of paternal great
grand-father. She will lose many sons due to her
husband’s sins.

3071 - 3076. (a) In the family of the said
daughter, evils to the spouse of a relative will
persist.

(b) The house denoting the father-in-law of
‘one’s paternal grand-father being in aspecttoRahu
will cause many sins to the son of the said relative.

(©) Native’s Father: He will be a highly meri-
torious person if the Moon is in Kshama Nadiamsa.
He will be quite wealthy and be disposed to study
the Vedas and perform such deeds as prescribed by
## Page 97

82 Deva Keralam

the Vedas. He will patronise his kinsfolk and
friends. He will be happy through his sons and will
spend his time in acquisition of learning, will have
one spouse, be somewhat sinful, of secretive dispo-
sition, attached to his undertakings and subjected
to loss of fame through friends, He will gather
wealth through Brahmins, with the mercy of the
king and minister. He will have amicable co-born,
behighly fortunate, will in between incur adventof
wealth and will be disciplined in eating others’
food.

Nadiamsa - 2nd Half: The native’s paternal uncle
will be long-lived and will eke out his livelihood
through a brother of paternal grand-father. His life
will be marked by hardships. His wife will be
crooked, unsightly and ugly-faced. He will have
progeny after initial delays.

(a) The native’s paternal aunt will lead an unhappy

life. For some time she will receive happiness
through her brothers. She will incur grief on
account of loss of son.

(b) Father: The native’s father will have only
one sister, but many brothers apart from a step-
mother.

(©) Paternal Uncle: He will lead a perpetually
difficult life, will live through agriculture, be the
chief of a village and be sinful.

3096 - 30971. Venus in aspect to Saturn will
cause abdominal disorders in the native’s boyhood

days. He will obtain happiness through father. He
will have seven brothers two of whom will be quite
prominent. Two brothers will be endowed with
longevity, education and intelligence. They will be
skilful in the Vedas and will receive royal honours.

Notes: Venus is referred to here as the lord of
Kshama Nadiamsa which is far from truth and
suggests a clear possibility of corruption in trans-
mission. Apparently it refers to the lordship of the
Sth lord Venus, for Capricorn, as abdominal disor-
der is the prime theme of the verse. Since the
ascendant dealt with is a movable one, the refer-
enceis to Capricom ascendant, Kshama Nadiamsa.

ascendant, as Venus is in the 12th from the Moon,
will produce the following effects for the native of
Kshama Nadiamsa of a movable ascendant. He
will be skilful in knowledge related to the Vedas
and traditional laws. He will be charitable and
exceedingly intelligent. His intelligence will flour-
ish after the age of eight.

3100 - 3102%. (a) Kshama Nadiamsa - 2nd
Half: Venus aspected by Saturn and placed in a
Navamsa of Saturn denotes that the native will
walk slowly in his boyhood days. In his second
dasa, in the 7th year or in the later half of the 6th
year, he will receive Brahmopadesa (initiation into
spiritual order). In his Sth year, his tonsure cer-
emony will take place:

(b) Ist Half: In his 3rd or Sth year, tonsure
ceremony of his brother will occur.

(c)For thenative of 2nd half, tonsure ceremony
and thread ceremony will occur simultaneously in

will be separately held.

3103. -3107%. (a) The Moon in Leo with Libra
Navamsa while Venus occupies a Navamsa of
Satur will cause abdominal disorders for a period
of one year from the age of 6. To overcome this
blemish, prayers to Venus should be offered, and
recitation of praises of Goddess Lakshmi be under-
taken. Oil-cakes (of sesamum seeds) should be
donated for 27 days. Donation of sesamum will
revive health and destroy abdominal disorders.

(b) The Moon in Pisces with Libra Navamsa
while Venus (read “Sukre” for “Simhe”) is in a
trine from the said Pisces will cause fear of infantile
mortality during the first dasa. If he survives, he
will be long-lived. He will have co-born, paternal,
wealth, learning and intelligence.

3108 - 3111. Taurus Ascendant - Vitta Nadi-
amsa: The subject of first half of this Nadiamsa
will be born as a Brahmin, in the region of Maha
‘Nadi (or a great river) in a colony of Brahmins. He

will be charming, intelligent and be the 3rd or the
Sth issue of the family. He will have male co-born,
be eloquent in speech and intent upon gathering
wealth. He will locate underground treasure and be
liberal in disposition. He will be a great devotee
of Lord Siva.

Notes: The name of the Nadiamsa referred to
in this part of the text, is Vitta Nadiamsa. Itshould
be Viswa Nadiamsa (as given in 3553 etc. in the
ensuing pages).

‘Viswa Nadiamsa rules thus: from 7° 12' to 7"
24' of a movable sign, from 22° 36' to 22° 38' of a
fixed sign, and from 23" 12'to23° 24' of adual sign.

company of a benefic will indicate the following.
‘The native will gather wealth as per the profession
prescribed for his family. He will enjoy pleasures
and will please Lord Siva by worshipping him as

version.

3120 - 3121%. (a) Should the Moon be in the
Lthin aspect to Mars, one of the paternal aunts will
be widowed and will live fora long time. Another
will have a long-living husband but be emaciated
due to utter poverty.

(b) The family of paternal grand-father will be
destroyed. So also the mother's family. One
paternal uncle will be long-lived, will have prog-
eny through re-marriage and will receive charities,

from questionable sources. Effects stated for pater-
nal uncle will bear truth.

(c) The native’s father will enjoy happiness.

(b) If birth be in the first half, Rabu in the 2nd

3139 - 3140%. Taurus Ascendant - Yama
Shashtiamsa: One bom in this part Taurus will
have fear of infantile mortality in a malefic’s sub
period in the first Dasa, coinciding with the Sun’s
transit in an adverse sign. To overcome this
blemish, the discerning should seek suitable rem-
edy. A silver image of the Moon-God should be
worshipped, and donationsas prescribed by Sastras
shouldbe done. The mother of the native will (also)
be in good health and be blessed with longevity
(following these remedies).
## Page 102

Chandra Kala Nadi 87

Notes: The word “Shashthamsa” (denoting 1/
6th part ofa sign) should read as “Shashtiamsa” (1/
60th part of a sign. Yama Shashtiamsa in Taurus
extends from 12° 30' to 13° (an even sign). One
sixth part of a sign (in equal measures of 5°) is not
a part of traditional Hindu natal astrology.

3141-31514. (a) The Moon in Pisces in aspect

to Mars, and begetting Libra Navamsa, will cause

the end of the mother prior to that of the father. To

overcome this blemish of the Moon, one should

conduct suitable remedial rituals according to his

family traditions.
(b)Remedial measures as prescribed should be

sought during the sub period of amalefic in the dasa
of Saturn. This will ensure happiness to paternal

grand-mother, and will counteract blemish of in-
fantile mortality for the subject.
(c) During the native’s first dasa, paternal

. uncle’s son will be subjected to evils.

(@ When the planet Jupiter moves in the
ascending sign, the native’s education will com-.-
mence.

(e) Jupiter in transit attaining the sign identical
with Navamsa ascendant will cause investiture of
sacred thread.

(©) The person’s brother will beget married
with Jupiter moving in the 7th or its Navamsa or the
sign identical with the Navamsa occupied by the
lord of the ascendant, or atrine thereof. This transit
should occur in the first dasa of the subject.

(g) The native’s first marriage will occur in
Jupiter’s sub period during the dasa of Saturn.
Then the Sun will be in his northerly sojourn. At
the time of marriage or prior to that, he will be
troubled by (wild) fever. He will also be endan-
gered by smallpox (or haemorrhoids) during the
adverse transits of the Sun.

(h) Note the planet occupying the 4th lord’s
Navamsa (i.e. Leo Navamsa). In the dasa of the
said planet and in the sub period of the lord of the
‘ascendant, the native of Vitta Nadiamsa (Taurus
ascendant) will be married. His father will also
gain wealth, clothes and the like.

(i Effects stated for the first dasa will bear
truth. One will be happy in this dasa but for malefic
sub periods thereof.

() General Principle: Take a Bhava and note
the 3rd, 6th and 8th thereof. In the dasa of the said
Bhava lord and in the sub periods of the said lords
of 3rd, 6th and 8th, injury to the (good) effects of
the Bhava concerned will occur. This estimation
should be done in respect of the various Bhavas
commencing from the ascendant. With an aspect
froma benefic, or from the lord of atrine oran angle
(from a Bhavaunder consideration), happiness will
only follow.

3179-3184. (a) One born in Taurus ascendant,
Vitta Nadiamsa, as the Moon isin Porrvabhadrapada
Nakshatra, will incur fear of untimely end in his
48th year or in 24th year. His full life span will be
61 as arrived at Amsayurdaya,

(b) The Moon in “Santikamsa” while Marsisin
Cancer Navamsa or in Gemini (in Navamsa) de-
notes that the subject will follow left-hand Tantric
doctrines (Vama Marga). He will be ever devoted
tothe Almighty and interested in Tantric activities,
fond of Saivites, honourable and specially devoted
toLord Siva. He will have no step-brother. He will
recite the Pranava Mantra. A Soodra reciting this
Mantra will be in trouble. The native will not have
male issues. “His wife will be of questionable
character. He will join harlots, be libidinous and
enthusiastic of union with Brahmin females. He
will have bad conduct, sharp-minded and will be
inimical to the men of his own race.

Notes: (b) “Santikamsa” is not a proper term
and is not hence amenable to suitable interpreta-
tion, The implication could be that the Moon
should be in Sri Sakti Nadiamsa (vide sloka 3185
infra which has however a different Yoga) while
Mars is in Gemini or Cancer in Navamsa.

“Vama marga” (also known as Vaamaachaara)
indicates left hand doctrines of the Tantras, i.e. the
worship of the Sakti or Female Energy personified
as the consort of Lord Siva, as opposed to
“Dakshinaachaara” or “Dakshina Marga”(right
hand doctrines of the Tantras, i.e. the worship of
a Male Energy).

3191 - 3192. Mandara Yoga: The lord of the
Moon sign in exaltation while the Moon sign is in
aspect to a benefic will cause Mandara Yoga.
However, the Moon should be in the 2nd from the
ascendant. One born in Taurus ascendant with
Mandara Yoga will be served by the ruler. He will
be wealthy, munificent, will own elephants and
horses, will perform good deeds and be highly
virtuous. He will earn merits by worshipping gods
and Brahmins.

applicability to other ascendants in varied degrees
is not ruled out.

3207 - 3215%. Movable Ascendant -
Paramesvara Nadiamsa: (a) One born in
Paramesvari Nadiamsa in one of the movable
ascendants, as Venus is in Aries will be of fair
complexion and auspicious appearance.

() Venus, Mars and Saturn in order occupying
Aries, Taurus and Gemini will cause livelihood
through various kinds of trading activities.

(©) Venus in the 10th in a malefic Navamsa
while his dispositor is in the 1 1th will cause liveli-
hood through truthful and untruthful means. He
will have brothers and sisters, be devoted to Lord
Siva, will perform charitable activities like con-
structing tanks and gardens, be inimical to his elder
brother’s son and attached to domestic duties. He
will follow the path prescribed by the Vedas, be
wealthy through paternal inheritance.

(@ Saturnin the Arudhaof Venus andin Parsva
## Page 108

Chandra Kala Nadi 93

Nadi (read Paramesvara Nadiamsa) will give the
following effects. The person concemed will be
merciful, argumentative, libidinous, addicted to
material pleasures, and be unorthodox for some
time. Later on he will adopt a good path. During
the time of his marriage, there will be some misun-
derstandings. His father will also be in troubles.

(©) Should Saturn be in the 11th house with
Aries Navamsa, one’s older brother will be af
flicted by a great disease and will have an adopted
son, The native will have two brothers, out of
whom one will have sons, and possibly two mar-
riages. The said childless brother will after some
time obtain or adopt a male issue. The eldest
brother will have many sons and much wealth.
After some time, he will suffer from lung tubercu-
losis and will die, losing his wife.

Notes: (a) Paramesvara Nadiamsa is known as
Isvarya (wealth) Nadiamsa also, apart from “Isa”
(Lord). Other names given to this Nadiamsa are
Devi (goddess), Paramesvari (feminine gender),
Soolini (i.e. Durga) and Isvara (Lord), vide sloka
3232 infra.

Atsome places, this Nadiamsa is referred to as
“Visha Nasa Nadiamsa” for Lord Siva swallowed
and destroyed the Great Poison, called “Kaalaahala”
during the process of churning of Milk Ocean.

The present information is collected by the
author from Sukra Nadi, It could be seen that
Venus is the center of the current discussion.
Generally, the clues refer to Cancerascendant. Yet
the other three movable signs can also suitably be
considered.

Extent of the subject Nadiamsa could be found
in the notes under sloka 1213, page 109, Book 1.

(e) Reference to a dual sign is only out of
context. In case of a movable sign, the 11th is an
immovable one. Hence this condition is excluded
in the rendering.

3216 - 3219. (a) Venus in the 10th house from
the natal ascendant and the 9th from Navamsa
ascendant will produce much fortunes and abun-
dant wealth, The native will beget sons through his
first wife. He will have younger brothers and be
passionate. Two of his brothers will be destroyed.
His elder brother will be long-lived.

(b) Saturn in the 12th while the Sth lord (in Rasi
chart) is in the 9th in Navamsa will cause birth of
many daughters and limited sons. The native will
have many dead children. He will ultimately have
two sons (and many daughters).

Notes: (a) The Nadiamsa position for Venus is
irregular.

“Mrita Praja Bahutvam” denoting dead children.

3237 - 3243%4. Cancer Ascendant -
Paramesvara Nadiamsa: (a) One will have end-
less quarrels with his relatives if Venus is in the
10th house with Sagittarius Navamsa. After some
interval, his enemies will incur destruction and he
will prosper with great happiness.

(b) Venus placed in the end of Aries will obtain
wealth of the relatives in one’s old age, coinciding
with the later half of the Sth dasa. His business
activities will expand and he will have permanent
wealth, Due to the blessings of Lord Siva, he will
eam wealth everyday (i.e. uninterruptedly).

(© Saturn moving in Leo during the middle
part of 5th dasa will produce much difficulties and
will damage one’s undertakings. The beginning
and ending phases of Mercury’s sub period will
cause one’s rise. Special gain of wealth will occur
for the family including acquisition of cattle.

(@) When Jupiter arrives in the sign Aries,
during the operation of Mercury's sub period, one
will begetason. Following this, his prosperity will
increase in the Sth dasa.

(©) Should Mercury, the 12th lord, join a ma-
lefic in transit during the rule of his own sub period,
‘one will experience evils to his spouse and child
and mental distress for himself.

Notes: “Panchame kalasamstite” insloka3238
is an interruption as the text deals with Cancer
ascendant - a movable one - and not Sagittarius
ascendant.

3244 - 3249. (a) Rahu in the 3rd: One having
the planet Rahu in the 3rd from the ascendant will
gain fortunes in Rahu’s dasa. If, in this Yoga,
Rahu’s dispositor is in the ascendant, 2nd half of
Rahu dasa will produce wealth. The sub periods
‘owned by the lords of the 6th, 8th and 12th will be
troublesome in this dasa. Further, relatives will
face evils.

(b) Saturn’s Movements: Saturn arriving in
the sign, represented by the natal Navamsa of the
Sth lord, or a trine thereof, will produce evils to the
progeny of one’s brother. This transit should be in,
the native’s 5th dasa.

(©) The transit of Saturn as above, with refer-
ence to the Sth lord or the 4th lord, as the case may
be, will destroy one of the relatives’ sons.

(@) Jupiterian Movement: Evils in the in-
laws’ family will come to pass and spouse will be
physically ill but will recover soon. These effects
will result Jupiter’s sojourn in the sign denoted by
the Navamsa of the 7th lord at birth, or a trine
thereof.

3252-3258. Cancer Ascendant: (a) Venus in
the 10th will make one charitable and fortunate.

(b) Sth Dasa: In the 5th dasa, he will develop
acharitable disposition due to the merits of his past
birth. More so in case of birth in the 2nd half of
Paramesvara Nadiamsa, He will become famous in
the world.

(©) 4th Dasa: His 4th dasa will give limited
happiness, acquisition of a son and good and bad
effects.

(@) 3rd Dasa: In his 3rd dasa he will be sinful.

(@) 5th Dasa & Sub Periods: He will change
for good in the Sth dasa, and will earn abundant
wisdom. He will develop charitability and will
earn wealth. His business activities will grow. In
the sub period of Venus, great happiness will come
to pass. Mercury's sub period will cause division
and distress. Increased auspicious effects will be
given by the sub period of Ketu. Mercury's sub
period will, however, cause auspicious effects for
his son. After this, the native’s fortunes will
register progressive trends. Perhaps the sub-sub
period of Mercury (in Mercury's sub period) will
cause evil and auspicious effects. The Moon’s sub
period will usher distress. Mars sub period will
cause division and grief. Due to the blemish of
Venus position in Nadiamsa, the sub period of 8th
Jord (Saturn) will cause troubles to wife and prog-
eny apart from mental distress.

3259. Saturn transiting in the sign Virgo will
promote a family marriage. The native’s daughter
will receive much happiness and auspicious effects
when Saturn gets, in the process Leo Navamsa.

Notes: “Susantaapam” meaning much distress
should read as “Susantosham” meaning much hap-
ss, in respect of the daughter, seeing the imme-
ely following effect in the text. Further, the
noun “Santaapam” is never qualified by the adjec-
tive “Su”,

3260 - 3262. (a) Irrelevant: The above transit
of Saturn will cause quarrels and revolutions in the
country.

(b) Mars ruling the 7th Arudha Pada and placed
in a fixed sign with a movable Navamsa, will
indicate one wife. In the middle of the native’s Sth
dasa, she will lose her physical strength and acquire
physical illness. For 2 or 3 weeks, she will suffer
windy disorders in the process of delivery. To
overcome this blemish, remedies should be sought.

3264 - 3268. (a) Should Venus be in Aries, the
6th dasa will bring happiness to the native through
his son. He will gather wealth of cattle.

(b) In the dasa ruled by the Navamsa dispositor
of Venus, one’s prosperity will expand abundantly.
But the first sub period will produce some conster-
nation.

(©) The sub period of the 8th lord during the
dasa of the 6th lord will usher health troubles to
wife and mental distress. Later on, the female will
recover her health. The sub period of Mercury will
bring in fear of untimely death which should be
remedied.

(@) In the dasa referred to at “b” above, one will
enjoy pleasures attended by diseases.

(e) The dasa and sub period of the 9th lord will
destroy one’s employer(?) The sub period of the
8th lord will produce mental distress due to revo-
lution.

3273 - 3274. In his old age, he will face eye
diseases. In the middle of his life, he will be
troubled by indigestion. He will experience much
happiness in his old age on account of his son. He
will have two long-living sons and be happy in the
6th dasa. He will later be born as aruler or the head
of a region.

3275 - 3276, (a) In the sub period ruled by the
8th lord (Saturn) during the dasa which is the 7th
from birth, he will die when he will be 62. The Sun
will then be journeying in one of the 3 signs
commencing Aquarius (the 8th)

(b) His father will die in a shrine in his own
country with the transit Sun in Aries, in dark half on
the day ruled by Satu.

3277 - 3280. Venus in the 9th either from the
ascendant or from the Moon will cause truthful-
ness, conduct and prosperity according to one’s
family of birth. This position from the Moon will
cause a Raja Yoga (royal status). The person will
have rebirth. He will be happy from birth and will
gather much wealth inhis old age. He will have two
Jong-living sons and three daughters. His sons will

3281 - 3282. (a) Effects stated for Isvara
Nadiamsa, based on Sukra Nadi, will bear truth.
(b) One born in Lagnadhi Yoga will enjoy
much prosperity. He will protect men, will have
elephants and wealth. Fora fixed sign ascending,
Lagnadhi Yoga will be possible. One born in royal
family with this yoga will obtain a great kingdom.
Notes: Why a fixed sign is mentioned is not
understandable. Further the terms of Prajesa and
Pradesa concerning the Nadiamsa should actually
mean Paramesvara Nadiamsa.

3283 - 3287. Capricorn Ascendant - Sura
‘Nadiamsa: (a) The native belonging to the Isthalf
of the subject Nadiamsa will be a Brahmin and be
the 4th issue of the family. Prior to his birth, his
mother would have abortions and difficult preg-
nancy. She will give birth to twin children.

(b) Jupiter in the sign Aquarius with Aries
‘Navamsa, and with the aspects of Saturn and Mars,
will cause Yamala Yoga (birth of twins).

(c) Saturn in Leo with Aries Navamsaand Mars
(apparently in Leo) with SagittariusNavamsa (form-
ing part of the above yoga, aspecting Jupiter) will
cause births of twins in two different ascendants.

(d) With Saturn in the 8th from the ascendant
along with Mars (i.e. in Leo), the twins will be
entwined by umbilical cord.

3288 - 3289. According to Manu, the sign
Capricorn ascending with the same decanate and
Pisces Navamsa while Satur joins Mars inLeo and
obtains Aries Navamsa will cause Yamala Yoga
(birth of twins). Though he may be the eldest issue,
he may be given away in adoption. The native will
have fear of infantile mortality. In his childhood,
he will incur complaints of indigestion.

Notes: Reference to Capricorn decanate is just
an addition. The subtle clue is Pisces Navamsa in
the ascendant.

Pisces Navamsa as Mandi is in the 9th, one will be
an adopted issue.

3291 -3291'. (a) The Moon and Satu should
in order be in Libra and Aries Navamsas while the
ascendant Capricom falls in Pisces Navamsa. This
‘Yoga will ensure that the subject is brought up by
two mothers.

(b) The Navamsa of the ascendant being in
Pisces will denote that the child will be breast-fed
by another woman (than the mother).

3292 - 3293. (a) Scorpio Ascendant -
## Page 114

Chandra Kala Nadi 99

Durbhaga Nadiamsa: One born in Scorpio as-
cendant with Capricorn Navamsa, as the Moon is
in the 4th, will look after his parents.

(b) The 2nd line of sloka 3293 is incomplete:
Birth in first half of Sura Nadiamsa, as... is in
Durbhaga Nadiamsa .....

Notes: Durbhaga Nadiamsa of Scorpioascend-
ant intervenes the present discussion on Capricom
ascendant’s Sura Nadiamsa. Sometimes, refer-
ence to a fixed sign with Durbhaga Nadiamsa can
also be found in this part. These are easily identi-
fiable with sub-headings provided in the transla-
tion.

3294-32967. Scorpio Ascendant - Durbhaga
‘Nadiamsa: (a) Should the lord of the ascendant be
in aspect to Jupiter, one born will bea Brahmin. His
birth will be ina street spread between the southern
and north-eastern quarters, ina town surrounded by
forests. Orbirth could be in a town of a riverregion
in the western quarter.

(b) With Mercury in Durbhaga Nadiamsa while
the Moon is in Sagittarius Navamsa, one will make
fortunes (source unclear). His physique will be
sturdy and attractive.

(©) Venus in Leo, and Rahu in Sagittarius,
while the Moon being in the company of Mercury
acquires Libra Navamsa will deprive one of happi-
ness during his boyhood days.

3297 - 3302. Capricorn Ascendant - Sura
Nadiamsa: (a) One will have great fortunes in the
Sth dasa: His first dasa will give less happiness. In
the later part of the first dasa, his father will enjoy
happiness. The subject will be in the grip of fear of
untimely death in the 4th dasa.

(b) Mars related to Jupiter by aspect or con-
junction should be pacified with remedial meas-
ures (for it can promote untimely death).

(c) During the first dasa, the subject will be
endangered due to blemish caused by Ketu. In the
3rd month from the time of birth, with the Sun
moving in amalefic sign, remedies for this blemish
be sought.

(@) One born in the 2nd half of the subject
Nadiamsa will face unavoidable death in the 5th
dasa. His 4th dasa will register possibility of
untimely death.

(e) The said native will dieat the age of 20if the
sign Leo contains Mars and Saturn. He will have
short life and cannot cross 20.

3303 - 3304. Immovable Ascendant -
Durbhaga Nadiamsa: (a) For a native of 2nd half
of the subject Nadiamsa, due to Ketu’s blemish, ..
amalefic .. first dasa will cause evils.

(b) Venus should be the ruler of 2nd dasa, and
be with an exalted planet in the 6th or 8th. Asa
result, one will face (early) death.

Notes: (a) The 2nd line of sloka 3303 has some
confusion. “Pape” meaning amalefic should read
as “Chaape” meaning “in Sagittarius”, Seeing the
instruction contained at “b” the first dasa should be
of Ketu placed in Sagittarius. Thus the hint given
hereof is: For a fixed sign ascending, Ketu in
Sagittarius will cause evils in his dasa, if ithappens
to be the first one.

3307. In case of birth in the Isthalf of Durbhaga
Nadiamsa (immovable ascendant), Jupiter in the
4th and the Moon in the sign Aries - the latter in
Libra Navamsa - will not produce infantile mortal-

3308 - 3311: (a) Due to blemish of the 8th
lord, the person will be troubled in his childhood.
To overcome the lunar evils, prayers to the Moon
god should be offered and donation of conch shells
and brass be undertaken which will counter child-
hood diseases. The discerning should perform
charities asmentioned in the work “Chandra Kalpa”.

(b) For one of the Ist half of the subject
‘Nadiamsa, the Moon in the 6th will notbe the cause
of any blemish (for health and life-span). Should
the said Moon be associated with Mercury, rem-

edies will be somewhat essential.

(©) Should the first dasa be of Vens, his dasa
will not cause infantile mortality proviued he is in
aspect to Jupiter. Further the child willbe endowed
with longevity.

(A) These apply to first half of Sura Nadiamsa
as well. So also for one born in Capricorn ascend-
ant with Pisces Navamsa as the Moon is in Aries
with Libra Navamsa.

3312 - 3315. Capricorn Ascendant - Sura
‘Nadiamsa: (a) The subjectbelongingto the Isthalf
of this Nadiamsa will be blood-red in complexion
with an auspicious appearance.

(b) Saturn in the Navamsa ascendant, or
aspecting the natal ascendant, or his being in
debilitation Navamsa, denotes that the person will
be the 3rd issue.

(c) If Saturn joins the natal Nadiamsa (i.e. rises
in the same Nadiamsa in Capricorn), one will be
given away in adoption in the very first year of his
birth.

(@ Saturn joining Mars as the 8th (Leo) is
aspected by Jupiter will cause troubles to some
extent in childhood.

Notes: (d) The Avastha specified as “Vandhya
stree Dosha” meaning “the blemish of a barren
woman” is not indicative of any standard term.

3316 - 3319. (a) Saturn in Pisces joining the 4th
and 11th lord Mars as Jupiter is in the 2nd (Aquarius)
will make the person well-educated and intelli-
gent. He will be wealthy, will serve the king,
possess a sound physique and be of peaceful mind.

(b) Jupiter in the 2nd will cause happiness and
prosperity.

(c) Should Jupiter be in the 4th or 1 1th, one will
be blessed with prosperity.

(@) If Jupiter acquires the company of the 4th
lord (Mars), one will have palanquins (i.e. convey-
ances).

(©) One will possess excellent vehicles if the
Jord of the ascendant is in the 10th in aspect to or
association with the 4th lord as Jupiter is in the 4th.

Notes: (b) “Dwi-tri Bhagyavan” is a wrong
copy. “Dwi” means 2, “Tri” means 3. Hence only
“prosperity” is included in the translation.

() Jupiter’s position is wrongly mentioned as
“in an immovable sign”. For Capricom ascendant,
the 4th is only amovable sign. To avoid confusion,
this term is excluded from the rendering.

3320 - 3327. (a) Capricorn Ascendant: Ji
ter in the 4th (Aries) with Aries Navamsa (i.e. in
Vargottama) will deprive one of happiness in child-
hood. In the middle of his life, fortunes will
increase. He will be famous through a brother, be
surrounded by men (attending upon him), will
serveaking and be endowed with pleasures, wealth
and a high order of intelligence. He will be dear to
his mother. His brother will have sharp brain of a
minister. All these when Jupiter is in the 4th (as
above).

(b) Capricorn Ascendant: Jupiterin Aquarius
with Aries Navamsa will grant service with inde-
pendent authority under a king. The person’s val-
our will be like that of aking. He will be bold and
intelligent.

(©) Scorpio Ascendant: Should Scorpio as-
cend with Capricorn Navamsa, Jupiter in Aquarius
will cause much prosperity. One will have rich
conveyances, be equal to a king and be an expert
three languages.

(@) Capricorn Ascendant: Jupiterin Aquarius
for Capricorn ascendant which has Pisces Nav-
amsa will make the person very intelligent.

(e) Capricorn Ascendant: If Jupiter (in
‘Aquarius as at “d”) is related to Saturn by associa-
tion or aspect, the person will be emaci~ted due to
loss of a son. He will be skilful in authorship and
learning. Both of his wives will be perished. He
will make a good deal of progress in the 4th dasa
and will develop intelligence (or wil! be endowed
with good disposition) in the Sth dasa.

(f) Capricorn Ascendant: Jupiter begetting
two malefics’ aspects and being in Aquarius with
Aries Navamsa will make one irascible, honour-
able and gentle. According to sage Garga, quoted
by another text, the subject will be a fool, valorous
and opulent. He will also be illustrious, be ever
truthful and inwardly of crooked disposition. He
will enjoy pleasures, be sacrificing in nature, hon-
ourable and kind to others.
