4305 - 4308. (a) The dispositor of Saturn in the
9th (Libra) with a benefic Navamsa will contribute
to one’s life-span.

(b) Satur in the 8th (Virgo) in Mohana Nadi-
amsa with the aspect of Jupiter will give a life-span
of 74 years through Amsayu or Yogayu, which are
synonymous terms (in giving effects, only in this
case).

(c) 49th year or 52nd year will cause death.

(@) Jupiter joining Venus will cause death at 71.
Deva Keralam has thus brought to light the effects
mentioned in Guru Nadi.

Notes: (a) “Maalamsa” and “Malika Yoga”
appear to be redundant terms. These are excluded
in the translation. The yoga mentioned is favour-
able for a long life.

(b) Life span will be 74 in this case and Yogayu
method and Amsayu method will yield the same
age for this particular native.

(©) The Ist line of sloka 4308 is possibly
missing. Hence only the effect - life span being 49
or 52 - is found without the relevant condition.

(@ This is by itself another Yoga to know of
one’s length of life.

4309 - 4319. Capricorn Ascendant: (a) The
ascendant lord in Sachiva Nadiamsa as Ketu is in
Pisces (in the 3rd) along with the Moon will
produce “Visha” Yoga. As a result, the native’s
mother will be evil, wicked among her family
members and of questionable character.

(b) Saturn in Sachiva Nadiamsa and conjunct
Mars will cause a mother with a polluted body (i.e.
an immoral mother). So also her older sister.

(c) In the Yoga mentioned at “a”, the conjunc-
tion of the Moon with Ketu implies immorality on
the part of sisters of the mother.

(@ One born in Capricorn while Saturn is in
Sachiva Nadiamsa in the company of Mars leadsto
existence of blemish in the family of brothers (of
the native).

(©) The 9th lord (Mercury) in Gemini Navamsa
while the 9th house (Virgo) is occupied by Rabu, in
aspect to the Moon (from Pisces in the company of
Ketu) will cause one’s sister haveillicit association
with other men.

() Capricorn ascendant with Leo Navamsa,
while the ascendant lord Saturn is in the company

of Mars, will give an unfortunate sister who will not
care for her husband’s words.

(g) Venus in the company of Satum will give
the following effects in respect of mother. She will
be long-lived and be handsome but corrupt in
character.

(h) The maternal family will be highly prosper-
ous if Saturn is in Sachiva Nadiamsa and in the
‘company of the 4th lord (Mars). Further, his father
will obtain the wealth of the mother.

@ With the 4th lord (Mars) and Jupiter obtain-
ing the sign Sagittarius, while Aquarius is held by
Saturn by occupation, one’s paternail grand-father
would be highly fortunate and would have many
sons and co-born and much wealth.

@ There is another authority with the view that
Satum joining Raja Yoga planets will give no
sisters to the native’s mother. But she will have
male co-born.

Notes: (a) “Vishakya amsa udbhavasya cha”
appearing twice in sloka 4309 is possibly amiscon-
strued term for Visha Yoga or Poisonous Yoga or
for Visha Nadiamsa. It is difficult to guess what
exactly the term is. However, Visha yoga denotes
a “poisonous” woman or one with undesirable
effects bringing disgrace to the family. Such a
Yoga, particularly applicable toa female, could be
found in many standard text books. To enable a
proper utility of the instruction, some liberty is
bound to be taken over-stepping the text.

Also see slokas 548 etc. (page 53 onwards) in
Book 1 where the present Nadiamsa is termed as
“Sachira”.

Saturn’s position in the particular Nadiamsa is
to be understood to be in Capricorn, aspecting the
duo - Ketu and the Moon - in Pisces. The result is
a bad mother as above who is as destructive as
poison or “Visha”. Her sisters also will be so as
mentioned at “c”.

(b) The association of Mars with Saturn, while
the whole Yoga asaat “a” is present will include the
older sister of the mother in the list of corrupt
persons.

(g) “Jaaravastha” is nota standard term. “Jara”
in respect of woman shows her corruptness and the
result is mentioned by the term “Jara vathi”.
## Page 190

Chandra Kala Nadi 175,

Another term “Gatedhise” reads as “Suthadhise”
elsewhere denoting the Sth lord (Venus). Thus the
conjunction of Saturn and Venus will give said
results.

(i) “Chaapa” denoting Sagittarius appears sepa-
rately in case of occupation by Mars as well as
Jupiter. Hence itis to be interpreted that these two
are to be together in Sagittarius.

(j) Itis not understood why Raja Yoga causing
planets will act this way.

4320 - 4335. (a) Somany number of brothers of
one’s mother will be endowed with longevity as the
number of the Bindus obtained by the Moon in her
own Ashtaka Varga.

(b) Saturn in Pisces with Libra Navamsa and in
the company of Mars will cause 7 or 8 brothers to
one’s mother. Two of them will live long while the
rest will incur destruction.

(©) One’s maternal grand-father would be a
famous personage and would construct a colony of
Brahmins if Saturn is in his own sign with Taurus
Navamsa.

(@) Mercury denoting maternal uncles (by 6th
lordship) and placed in Capricorn in the company
of the Sun will cause lung tuberculosis to a mater-
nal uncle.

(©) Saturn in the ascendant (Capricorn) while
the 4th lord (Mars) is in Taurus Navamsa will lead
to tuberculosis of the lungs to the members of
mother’s family, As a result two maternal uncles
will incur death.

(© The 4th lord in thé company of Saturn in
Rajavastha (?) will cause birth of sons to the mother
(i.e. native will have brothers). She will indulge in
seret activities against her own family members.
Her older sister will obtain dead children. The
native's father would have brothers.

(g) If Mars is in Jaaravastha (?) in the company
of Saturn, one of the paternal uncles will be an
expert in illicit association with women and thiev-
ing. He will suffer from urinary disorders and will
obtain dead children. The native will have two
paternal uncles (father’s brothers) one of whom
will be endowed with progeny.

(h) Saturn and Jupiter in order appearing in
Sachiva and Mukunda Nadiamsaat birth will cause
four paternal uncles.

(i) The number of paternal uncles can also
correspond to the number of Ashtaka Varga bindus
found in the sign occupied by the Sun in his own
Ashtaka. Varga.

@) The Sun in Mukunda Nadiamsa will cause
three long-living paternal uncles.

(k) One’s paternal grand-father would be fa-
mous if Saturn and the Sun respectively occupy
## Page 191

176 Deva Keralam

Sachiva and Mukunda Nadiamsas. Further he
would have brothers and sisters.

(Royal service, living in a foreign land,
passionate disposition, and attachment to agricul-
ture will result the position of the Sth lord Venus in
the sign Capricom with Gemini Navamsa, Mer-
cury should also join Venus in Capricorn, Addi-
tional effects of this Yoga are the said relative will

disposed to be in service.

(m) The Moon in the 3rd from the ascendant
andin Aquarius Navamsa along with Ketu will give
3 sisters and2 brothers, each endowed with longev-
ity. Rest of the co-bom will be destroyed (prema-
turely) in such dasas which will be capable of
inflicting death upon them.

Notes: (k) Details about Mukunda Nadiamsa
could be found in the notes given for sloka 603, on
page 59, Book 1.

Nadiamsa will give wide fame in royal service.
Further, one will have two wives, will enjoy pleas-
ures and will build up wealth by his own efforts.
His fortunes will rise in his 3rd dasa will his older
brother will also beget auspicious results. The
goddess’ of wealth will shower her mercy on the

‘ous employment and will have two long-living

4342 - 4344. (a) If the 3rd lord (Jupiter) is in
his exaltation Navamsa, one will have two long-
living brothers.

(b) The 6th lord Mercury in Kshayavastha (?)
in the ascendant (“Vilagnage” is included in an-
other version for Mercury) while Satur is in
Sachiva Nadiamsa will give the following effects.
He will have two maternal uncles who will have
progeny. One will be emaciated due to tuberculo-
sis. These are the effects for the Sth house(?)

(©) Saturn in Sachiva Nadiamsa (while Mer-

sister will be happy. His daughter will be endowed
with longevity and will be fortunate in respect of
her husband.

4345 - 4348". (a) Sister’s Husband: Saturn in
Sachiva Nadiamsa in the company of the 11th lord
(Mars) will give following results. His elder sis-
ter’s husband will be long-lived. He will have no
full brother but half-brother and be honourable. He
will (initially) obtain dead children. Later on
children born will survive. He will incur prosperity
and fortunes.

(b) Saturn in Sachiva Nadiamsa (implying

ness to the said brother-in-law through his father in
his 18th year. The native’s younger sister's hus-
band will be somewhat thin-bodied due to diseases,
will have many children but limited prosperity.

4349 - 4351%. If Satum and the Moon are
respectively in the signs Aquarius and Pisces, the
latter being in. Aquarius Navamsa, the following
effects will come to pass. The maternal uncle will
be greatly distressed and will suffer from tubercu-
losis when Saturn reaches the sign Pisces during the
native’s first dasa. The natives mother's family
will experience prosperity and his father will be
somewhat happy. His brother's marriage will take
piace. In the end of the first dasa, his thread
ceremony will be celebrated. He will marry in the
2nd dasa. Wealth will accrue in the 3rd dasa.

“Kumbhe Mandasya Jatake” loosely denoting Sat-
um in the sign Aquarius.

4356 - 4365Ys. Saturn’s Evil Transits for
Capricorn Ascendant: (a) One will lose his spouse
in the 3rd dasa, if Saturn is in the 2nd (Aquarius)
and Rahu is in the 9th (Virgo) as the lord of the 7th
(the Moon) is with a malefic. He will immediately
get re-married.

(b) Saturn moving in the sign denoted by the
Navamsa occupied by the lord of the 2nd, ora trine
thereof, or the sign aspected by the 2nd lord will kill
one’s wife.
## Page 193

178 Deva Keralam

(©) One will incur evils to his progeny when
Saturn is in transit in the sign identical with the
‘Navamsa occupied by the 12th lord, or a trine
thereof, or the sign that is at birth aspected by the
12th lord.

(@) Evils and grief concerning one’s maternal
uncle will come to pass when Saturn journeys in
any of the following places: the sign represented by
the Navamsa occupied by either the lord of the
ascendant or the 8th, or a trine thereof. In the
absence of these results, destruction of some im-
portant relative from the mother’s side will have to
be foretold. Unpleasant changes for kinsfolk can
also occur with the Sun’s undesirable transit (when
the planet Saturn is in said movement).

(e) Saturn’s sojourn in the sign equal to the
Navamsa occupied by the 11th lord, or a trine
thereto, will produce distress to one’s mother. Her
kinsfolk will be subjected to some calamity.

() The dasa of Venus should be in operation
when Saturn transits the sign denoted by the Nav-
amsa occupied by 10th lord (Venus), or a trine
thereof. These zodiacal phenomena will usher
evils to one’s co-bon.

(g) One’s father will fall ill when Saturn’s
movements prevail in the sign caused by the Nav-
amsa occupied by the 4th lord, or a tine thereof.

(h) Saturn’ s journey in the sign aspected by the
said 4th lord will cause a great danger to father.

(@ If the 3rd dasa simultaneously operates
when the yoga at “h” above exists, one will lose his
father. Further, distress to mother and paternal
uncle will also be included in the effects. Father or
someone equal to father will die in the said dasa.

4366 - 43684, Saturn & The Sun: Saturn and
the Sun in Sachiva and Mukunda Nadiamsas at

birth will produce the following effects to a Capri-
- corn native. There will be danger to father when

Scorpio’s concluding space is transited by Satu.
Oreelse Saturn in transit can be in Capricom. This”
will coincide with the adverse journeys of Jupiter
and the Sun, The native’s mother will, as a result
of these Nadiamsa positions of Saturn and the Sun,
become a widow and will live for a long time.
Danger to mother can occur in the last part of 3rd
dasa or in the first sub period of the 4th dasa.

Notes: “Sphuta Yogam Gathe Sanau” in the
last line is not connected with this part and is for
something else.

4369 - 4377. (a) The conjunction of the lordsof
the 9th and the 10th in the 8th from the ascendant
be a reason for obstacles to prosperity which
will be limited as such. This Yoga will give
fortunes (as due) after the age of 24 for a period of
6 or years following which grief (i.e. loss of for-
tunes) will come to pass.

(b) Rahu in the 9th (Virgo) as two malefics are
in the 2nd (Aquarius) will produce troubles in old
age.

(©) The 12th lord..... (status not mentioned, but
seems to be in the 9th in Virgo) will cause some
prosperity. He will obtain progeny through a re-
marriage. Prosperity and diseases will also result
## Page 194

Chandra Kala Nadi 179

this position. One will beget many dead children.
Maybe two or three will survive. The number of
children with longevity will correspond to the
number of Navamsas passed by the Sth lord (Ve-
nus).

(@)Inthe 4th dasa, (while atbirth Saturn and the
Sun are in Sachiva and Mukunda Nadiamsas, vide
sloka 4366), one will be humiliated in royal assem-
bly. The wealth accumulated by him will perish.
He will incur prosperity for 3 years (only) in the
said dasa.

(e) In case of Nadiamsa positions of Saturn and
the Sun as above, one will be in intense difficulties
in the sub periods of Jupiter and Mars, in any dasa.
Saturn’ sub period will cause a mix of auspicious
as well as inauspicious effects. Great fear will e:
in the sub periods of Jupiter, Saturn and Mars. The
sub period of the Sun in the dasa of Venus will
produce grief on account of evils to one’s kinsfolk.

4378 - 4382. (a) Irrelevant: Venus sub period
will endanger the king greatly. The king will be
troubled during the dasa of the (Navamsa dispositor
of the) 4th lord or of the 9th lord.

(b) The dasa of the (dispositor of the) Navamsa
lord of the 12th lord will produce extreme anguish
to the members of the mother’s family. The
relevant sub period will be the first one of the dasa.

(©) Irrelevant: The king of the country will
face near-death. Due to enmity with one’s own
people, one will incur enmity with the army chief
and minister. Rahu in the 9th in aspect to Mars will
denote that the king of the country will be disposed
to perform cruel deeds, will give serious punish
ments and will be ever interested in music.

Notes: (b) For Capricon. ascendant, the first
sub period in the dasa of the planet ruling the
Navamsa occupied by Jupiter is said to cause the
said results

4383 - 439114. (a) Rahu in the 9th (Virgo) with
Taurus Navamsa will cause prosperity after the age
of 20, and happiness after 24. 3rd dasa will cause
birth of children, for a period of 8 years. After-
wards his prosperity will be at stake. The 4th dasa
will cause anguish for half of its duration. Much
happiness will come to passin the 5th dasa. Due to
a changed king, he will be happy. He will be
abundantly grieved due to loss of children being
bom.

(b) If the lord of the Sth dasa, being the Moon
(in Pisces), is associated with the nodes (i.e. one
node in Pisces and the other in Virgo), good and bad
effects will be equal.

(c) The Moon in Pisces in her dasa will cause
much anguish in the 39th or 40th year.

(@) The Moon in Pisces with Aquarius Nav-
amsa will produce much anguish in the 30th year,
## Page 195

180 Deva Keralam

and enmity with own people in the 32nd year.
Auspicious results will exist in the 34th year which
will instantly transform into anguish. Royal en-
mity will prevail for two weeks and wealth gath-
ered will perish. The subject will live in a remote
village and will grieve losing his position.

(e) Rabu being in the 9th (in the sign Virgo,
with Taurus Navamsa) will promote anguish, penury
and royal wrath in the 6th dasa. Its 2nd half will
give some happiness and create a balance between
good and bad.effects. End of this dasa will instil
fear of untimerydeath. The sub period of the Moon,
thereof, will itvolve him in great danger.

4392 - 4399, (a) Should the 10th lord (Venus)
be in Sachiva Nadiamsa, the 7th dasa will cause
death. A sub period owned by an adverse planet in
the dasa of the 8th lord (Sun) will promote prob-
ability of untimely death. The month will corre-
spond to Sun’s adverse movements. He will incur
harm to his eyes in his old age. In between, he will
suffer from disorders of eyes and teeth. The
beginning or end of the 56th year will kill him.
Satur in Sachiva Nadiamsa will cause death in the
month when Pisces is transited by the Sun.

(b) Saturn obtaining the Navamsa ruled by the
8th lord (i.e. in Leo Navamsa) white Deha or Jeeva

Rasis is occupied by Rahu, will cause fear of
untimely death. This will coincide with the adverse
transits of Jupiter and the Sun.

(©) The concluding part of the dasa of the Sun
will cause much distress.

(@) The sub period of Jupiter in all dasas will
produce mental distress with adverse transits of the
Sun. ‘

(e) The conjunction of the lords of the 9th
(Mercury) and the 10th lord (Venus) will give
prosperity for a period of 8 years. This yoga will
also produce diseases when the native is about to
prosper. Toovercome this blemish, donation of the
image of zodiac be done.

These are the effects for Saturn’s position in
Sachiva Nadiamsa, in case of Capricom ascendant,
as reflected in Deva Keralam.

Notes: (a) “Karma Nathe” indicating 10th lord
should read as “Lagna Nathe” to mean Satur, the
ascendant lord.

4400. Pisces Ascendant - Kunda Nadiamsa:
Incase of one born in Pisces ascendant, note the 4th
lord Mercury in his own sign (Gemini) in the
company of the Sun. The said Mercury in aspect to
the 10th lord Jupiter will cause rise of fortunes.
Notes: For Kunda Nadiamsa, please see notes
under sloka 638, page 62, Book 1.

4401 - 4404. (a) Vipra Kala: One should
belong to the first quarter of the subject Nadiamsa
as Mercury becomes the lord of the Moon sign and
is aspected by Jupiter. As a result, he will be
wealthy through paternal inheritances.
## Page 196

Chandra Kala Nadi 181

(a) Kshatriya Kala: The native of 2nd quarter
of Kunda Nadiamsa, Pisces ascendant, will be
devoted to Lord Siva. He will serve a great king.

(b) Vaisya Kala: If birth be in the Vaisya Kala
(3rd quarter of the said Nadiamsa), the person will
have business activities related to metals. He will
also be endowed with plenty of wealth and grains
and befriend Brahmins.

(©) Soodra Kala: In case birth is in the last
quarter of the Nadiamsa in question, the native will
bein the service of a king and will lord over landed
properties and villages. He will be an agriculturist
and will have abundant cows and coms.

Notes: The position of the Moon is implied in
Gemini or in Virgo. But Mercury should simulta-
neously be aspected by Jupiter. These two condi-
tions apply to all the four cases.

4405 - 4406. Should Mercury be in aspect to
Jupiter and occupy amalefic Navamsa, one born in
the Ist quarter of the said Nadiamsa in Pisces
ascendant will have no after-bomn. He will however
have older co-born, be honourable and will enjoy
fortunes through father. He will also have step-co-
bom.

4407-4412. Thenative willbe devotedtoLord
Vishnu and Lord Siva if Mercury is aspected by

Jupiter. He will be devoted to gods and Brahmins
and be dear to his parents. He will eam fame in
royal circles and will own three conveyances.
Simultaneously, the following results will occur in
respect of father. His father would in the middle of,
his life enjoy conveyances and great fortunes,
would be addicted to boasting and would help
others. He would have five brothers and two
sisters. Due to loss of an older brother, he would
incur grief. He would make a lot of fortunes in the
southern direction and enjoy the good luck of
meeting Brahmins in a royal assembly. He would
live in forest regions and would serve a mean king.
Due to enmity with Vaishnavites, he would un-
dergo a lot of difficulties.

4413 - 4414. If Mercury is in Capricom Nadi-
ama, it denotes much grief to father at the time of,
native's birth. For four years, father will be men-
tally distressed. Afterwards, he would obtain
fortunes and his enemies would be destroyed. The
native will have step-brothers and his sisters will be
very happy.

4415 - 4424. (a) In the Ist dasa of the native, his,
maternal uncle will lose his children. The native’s
step-brother will beget married and will incur loss
of children. His maternal grand-mother will be
troubled by diseases and will escape near-death.

(b) Fhe Moon in the 7th (Virgo) causing Kesari
‘Yoga will give long lives to parents. He will have
two maternal uncles.

(©) In the 2nd dasa, Saturn arriving in the sign
denoted by the Navamsa occupied by Jupiter, or a
trine thereof, will destroy matemal uncle. His
mother will be greatly grieved due to this loss.

(@) Saturn's transit in the end of Scorpio will
produce abundant troubles to mother.

(©) Saturn moving in Libra while Jupiter is in
Cancer or in the end of Gemini will cause thread
ceremony to the subject.

(0 Sth Lord’s Dasa: The dasa of the Moon will
cause much happinessto the native. His father will
receive honours from the king and will enjoy
happiness after the destruction of his enemies. He
will obtain conveyances, omaments and continu-
ous happiness. The native's step-brother will
enjoy happiness and good prosperity through his
father. Father's friends will also enjoy abundant
prosperity. The native will have his desires ful-
filled. His maternal uncle will enjoy many auspi-
cious results but will be grieved due to loss of a
child and will nearly escape death. The native’s
step-sisters’ husband will obtain a prosperous em-
ployment following the birth of a son and become
famous.

4425 - 441%. (a) Mercury joining the 6th lord
Sun will cause grief to father in the native’s first
dasa. During the period of evil solar transits, fever
will trouble the father. Saturn's journey in Leo will
cause much anguish and dysentery to father. The
native will lose his co-born. His mother will be
somewhat subjected to fear of small-pox. Quadru-
peds and grains will be lost and much anguish will
follow.

(b) Saturn moving in the sign caused by the
Navamsa position of Rahu, or a trine thereof will
cause royal enmity in the first dasa. Saturn moving
## Page 198

Chandra Kala Nadi 183

~ in Virgo will trouble the king(?) The concluding
part of the dasa will cause anguish through the king
and minister. Co-born occurring in Venus sub
period in the first dasa will be destroyed. The king
will be troubled due to windy diseases. The
native’ s relatives will initially be distressed and be
later on happy. His paternal grand-mother will
enjoy happiness but a maternal uncle will be sub-
jected to evils.

(c) The 2nd dasa will cause wealth with transit
Jupiter in the end of Aries or in Taurus. In Gemini,
he will produce much fortunes, wealth and frater-
nal happiness.

(@) When Saturn transits the sign identical with
the natal Moon's Navamsa, or a trine thereof, his
father will incur troubles from fever. There will be
a family marriage. His older sister will enjoy
happiness. Except in evil months, Satum in Virgo
will give balanced effects. Transiting in Libra, he
will improve one’s fortunes. These apply toMoon's
dasa. Further in this dasa, his father will enjoy
much prosperity, and happinessexpectin the months
denoted by evil transits of the Sun.

(e) Saturn's transit in the sign identical with the
Navamsa occupied by Venus, ora trine thereof will
cause evils to one’s relatives.

(© The 7th lord Mercury placed betwixt ma-
lefics and in aspect to Jupiter will cause marriage
in the 10th year or the 12th year. There is another
version to state that the Moon in Cancer will cause
marriage in early boyhood days, possibly in the 2nd
dasa itself, with an auspicious transit of Jupiter.
The native will marry in a very prosperous family
and will beget an excellent spouse. His 3rd dasa
will cause birth of a son and he will enter royal
service. 2nd dasa will cause beginning of educa-
tion. He will be an expert in three languages and
be leamedin literature, drama and Sastras. He will
beapoetin Sanskritand Telugu and be honourable.
The 4th dasa will give him wide fame. His profes-
sional prosperity will multiply and he will perhaps
be happy after his 22nd year.

4442 - 4449. (a) His father will be subjected to
evils in the dasa of the 8th lord counted from the
Moon. Jupiter’ sadverse transitin the end of the 3rd
dasa will produce much distress.

(b) Death of father will occur with Satum
moving in Aries, or in the end of Pisces or a trine
thereof.

(©) The 9th lord placed at birth in Kunda
Nadiamsa will during his sub period covered by the
4th dasa cause danger to father. Then Satum’s
movements will be noted in the end of Pisces or in
Aries,

(@) Surya Nadi attributes excellent results for a
Pisces native with Kunda Nadiamsa and the Sun in
Harina Nadiamsa. It prescribes prosperity and
decline as well. The three Nadiamsas featuring
together thus, viz. ascendant in Kunda Nadiamsa
(Pisces), the Sun in Ambuja Nadiamsa and Jupiter
in Harina Nadiamsa, will be a source of excellent
prosperity.

(e) The 4th lord, Mercury, in the 10th, in aspect,
to Saturn will contribute to much prosperity in the
4th dasa, One will acquire three conveyances and
much fame, When Saturn in his second round of
transit arrives in the end of Cancer or in Leo, one
will acquire a great disease. Suitable remedies be
sought in this context.

4450-4453, (a) The sub periods of Ketuand the
‘Sun in the dasa of Rabu will produce much difficul-

ties for one born in Pisces ascendant with a malefic
Navamsa.

(b) The sub period of the 11th lord Satum
during the currency of the 4th dasa will produce
much prosperity provided the Sun and Mercury are
in order in Ambuja and Kunda Nadiamsas.

(©) The dasa of the Sun and the sub period of
Mercury will bring forth wealth to the family.
Much prosperity and many sons will be enjoyed by
the native.

(@) The 4th dasa will cause much prosperity.
‘The sub period of Mercury thereof will cause much
fame and continuous royal favours.

Notes: Reference to the dasa of Libra (“Tula
Chakra Kale”) is an interruption and hence not
added to the rendering.

4454 - 4456. (a) Should the Moon at birth be in
Virgo, transit Jupiter in Aries or its trine will cause
much prosperity. ‘If the Moon is in Capricom
Navamsa (while in Virgo), one will enjoy much
fame. Probably he will be happy after 27.

(b) Jupiter in transit in Aries or its trine will
cause abundant fortunes while the natal Moon is in
Virgo. Prosperity and diseases will occur. The
native will patronise his kinsfolk. He will ever
donate food to others, be passionate and highly
libidinous.

Notes: (b) “Meena trikonage jaatascha” mean-
ing “one bor in Pisces or its trine” . “Tula Chakra
Kalage” means “in the Kala chakra dasa of Libra”.
These do.not meaningfully form part of the sloka.
Hence these are excluded in the translation.

4457 - 4468. (a) The Moon in Scorpio in the
company of Mars will cause destruction of one’s
friends and employer (or king). The native will
earn fortunes through a changed king. The Moon
in Libra will give wide fame.

(b) Mercury in Kunda Nadiamsa will cause
prosperity fora period of ten years (in the 4th dasa).
The middle part of this dasa will usher a high
degree of fortunes.

(©) The 7thlord Mercury in association with the
Sun, as the 7th is in occupation by the Moon will
cause two wives. Some say itcould be three wives.

(@) The 7th lord Mercury in Kunda Nadiamsa
will cause loss of wife, prior to that of father, in the
dasa of the 2nd lord (Mars).

(©) Rahuin the 11th (Capricorn) will in his dasa
cause 3rd marriage to the native. He will obtain
progeny through re-marriage (i.e. not through first
## Page 200

Chandra Kala Nadi 185

wife) and will enjoy abundance of wealth and
grains.

(® The 10th lord Jupiter receiving Mercury's
aspect and in his own sign and Navamsa will give
merits of feeding others continually. He will enjoy
wealth which will be more than that of the father.

(g) In the dasa of the 9th lord (Mars), good and
bad effects will be in equal measure. This will not
apply to sub periods ruled by malefics. In this dasa,
he will enter in royal service.

(h) The dasa of the Sth lord (Moon) will give
much wealth. His father will prosper and step-
brothers will beget good effects

(i) The 1st dasa will give abundant difficulties.
The native’s father will be highly anguished.

G) Supiter’s Dasa: The later half of the sub
period of the 2nd lord (Mars) in the dasa of the 10th
lord (Jupiter) will destroy one’s wealth. The first
half of Jupiter's dasa will usher happiness, but the
native’s younger brother's wife and son will be
subjected to evils, The native himself will incur
physical troubles. Mercury's sub periodin the 10th
lord’s dasa will produce great difficulties.

Notes: The 2nd line of sloka 4468 is not very
clear and does not seem to be-in relation to the
current discussion. “Mithune” reads as “Jataka” in
another version. Reference to Abala Nadiamsa is
found and it is not known whether it is the same as
Kunda Nadiamsa.

4469 - 4470. (a) The Sun in Ambuja Nadiamsa
while Jupiter is in Kunda Nadiamsa will cause
diseases and death in their sub periods. The main
dasa will be that of the Navamsa dispositor of the
Moon.

(b) The end or beginning of Jupiter's dasa, or
the sub period of the 1 Ithlord will cause death. The,
month concemed will coincide with the Sun's
movement in Virgo or Pisces or in the sign denoted
by the Moon’s Navamsa dispositor.

4471 - 4475. (a) After Death: Jupiter in the
Arudha Pada of the 12th lord will send the subject
to the Heavens after death.

(b) Father: As a result of the said position of
Jupiter, his father will have two brothers and will
attain the world of Brahma after death.

(©) Sickness: The native will be troubled due to
bad health, in the Kala Chakra dasa junctions. To
overcome this blemish, the discerning should adopt
remedial measures. Note the adverse transits of
Jupiter and the Sun. Also that of Saturn in the sign
represented by the Navamsa position of the 8th
lord, or in a trine thereof. This will be the time
during which remedial measures be attempted (in
order to get desired results concerning health,

(©) Note the Moon in Virgo with Capricom
‘Navamsa. The junction of the 3rd dasa will then be
the proper one for remedies.

(@) The native’s death will occur in the 57th
year. He will later be born as a Brahmin.

(e) Mercury in Kunda Nadiamsa indicates that
the father of the native will attain the abode of Indra
after death. ("Indra + Yaatana” should read as
“Indra + Aayatana” meaning the abode of Indra,
heavens.)

4476 - 4479. Virgo Ascendant - Dhanada
Nadiamsa: The ascendant lord in Vargottama
Navamsa with Sura Nadiamsa in the 2nd (Libra)
will cause the birth of a good-looking Brahmin. He
will be an expert astrologer, be in royal service and
be the 2nd issue of the family. Or else he will be
the 3rd issue. He will have elder brother. His birth
will be in aremote village. He will be dark-bodied.
His father will be fortunate, saintly and be devoid
of co-born.

Notes: In this part, Dhanada Nadiamsa of
Virgo ascendant is discussed while the caption
refers to Sura Nadiamsa. Of course there are
reference to Mercury's position in Sura Nadiamsa
on some occasions.

For Dhanada Nadiamsa, please see notes under
sloka 714, page 69, Book 1.

Vargottama position of Mercury is redundant
in the face of his Nadiamsa position.

4480 - 4489Y (a) Grand-father: The 5th lord
(Saturn) in Scorpio Navamsa in the company of
Mars denotes that the native’s paternal grand-
father would be a famous man, heading a village
resided by Soodras. Or else he would be serving a
Mlechcha king.

(b) Father & Grand-father: With Venus and
the Moon in Virgo Navamsa, as Mercury is in a
Navamsa of Venus, the person’s father will serve
Soodras in Mlechcha kingdom and will enjoy
prosperity. So also would be his paternal grand-
father who would be the head of a village tenanted
by Mlechchas. He would be greatly anguished due
to enmity with Brahmins equal to him. He would
also be jailed. Afterwards, his prosperity would
increase but he would live by servitude.

(©) Venus should be in the 11th place with
reference to Mercury and be in an inimical sign
with Virgo Navamsa. As a result, the natives
paternal grand-father would be grieved acquiring
enmity with his kinsfolk.

(@) If the 9th lord (Venus) is in debilitation
Navamsa, father will live in a small village. If
Venus joins the Moon, father’ s prosperity will be in
a Mlechcha kingdom.

(e)In caseof birth in the former half of Dhanada
Nadiamsa, Mercury's position in Sura Nadiamsa
will cause long-living parents. The family will
have increase of wealth and grains. Mercury
causing Chitra Yoga (being in Libra as above) will
give a lot of wealth to the subject. He will be
famous in royal service and will eam prosperity
exceeding that of father. He will have three
brothers and two sisters and be honourable. Rest of
the co-bom will be destroyed. There may be a
possibility of 8 co-born (out of whom 3 may die
prematurely). He will have five brothers two of
whom will be well-known and prosperous.

Notes: (¢) There is some confusion in the text,
about number of co-born.

4490 - 4500. (a) Jupiter in transit in the sign
equal to the Navamsa ascending, or a trine thereof,
will cause birth of co-born. The 2nd dasa will cause
happiness to father.

(b) The native will have one sister who will be
happy possessing the splendour of gold and deco-
rated with ornaments. (In Capricorn?) she will be
devoted to her husband and will after some time be
anguished.

(© Satur in the 11th (Cancer) in the company
of (debilitated) Mars will deprive one of after-born.
If they are born, they will be short-lived. His elder
co-born will be endowed with longevity and wide
fame.

(@) Should the 9th lord Venus be in the com-
pany of the 10th lord (Mercury), he causes Bhagya
Yoga - one for prosperity. As a result, the person
will undertake a path of good deeds and good
conduct.

(e) If birth be in the Ist half of the subject
Nadiamsa, father will be happy in the 2nd dasa, will
have increased wealth and grains and a pure heart.

(® Birth in the Ist quarter of the subject Nadi-
amsa, as Mercury is in Sura Nadiamsa will cause
marriage in the dasa of Venus. His spiritual

initiation will occur within 2 years after the Sth
year. Then the Sun will be in his northerly course.
Elder brother's marriage will occur with Jupiter in
his first round of transit in the end of Aries or in
Taurus, when the Sun is anywhere from Aries
through Gemini. Elder brother's thread ceremony
will occur in the end of the native’s Ist dasa, or in
the Ist sub period of 2nd Casa. His father will be a
knower of others’ minds, will have an attractive
face, be skilful, aminister and an expert in Vedanta
and Wisdom.

4501 - 4502. Now described are the qualities of
the native belonging to Dkanada Nadiamsa, Virgo
ascendant. He will be black in complexion, be
highly intelligent, fond of helping others and per-
forming 5 kinds of Yagnas. He will be a believer
in the Almighty, will have knowledge of various
kinds of moral codes, be eloquent in speech and be
firm in friendship.

4503-4506. (a) Venusin debilitation Navamsa
while the planet Mercury occupies a Navamsa
ruled by Venus will give the following effects. The
person will inwardly be irascible but be pleased.
He will be somewhat miserly.

(b) Mercury placed in the 2nd house with a
benefic Navamsa will make one radiant, intelli-
gent, craft, good-looking, skilful, bold and learned.

(©) The Sun in the sign Libra with Libra Nav-
amsa will cause expertise in the meanings of the
Vedas and Philosophy. One will please the saints
and will perform pure acts. His older brother will
have four sons while his younger one will have two.

‘Two brothers and two sisters will be blessed with
longevity.

4507 - 4512. (a) Mercury in Sura Nadiamsa in
the 2nd would confer lordship over many villages
and fortunes to paternal grand-father. After the 8th
year of the native, a great deal of wealth will accrue
to father’s family.

(b) The ascendant being in Virgo as Mercury is
inthe 2nd (Libra) with Libra Navamsa will produce
prosperity to father in the dasa of Mercury. But
Mercury should not be, in the process, related to
malefics. If at all Mercury is with a malefic, the
dasa of the said malefic will promote anguish and
troubles from fever. The native will have aco-born
in the 6th year. Some worries will come to pass in
his 7th year of age. A change of place will occur
due to some calamity. Perhaps, happiness will be
experienced after the 10th year of age.

(©) Father will be happy in the period when
natal Mercury is aspected by transit Mars but only
‘after debacles in undertakings related to the vil-
lage. Happiness will also exist after the 9th year of
age, in the dasa of Virgo (KCD). Following mar-
riage activities, father’s prosperity will rise. With
favourable transits of Jupiter, auspiciousness will
prevail, while his evil transits will promote an-
guish.

4513 - 4521. (a) In the concluding part of the
‘Virgo dasa (KCD), his father will become famous.
It could also be in the dasa of Libra (KCD) or that
of Venus (Vimsottari). This phase will produce
great prosperity, and wealth to the family.

(b) After the 12th year of age, father will be
subjected to evils. This will coincide with a
malefic sub period in the dasa of the 12th lord (Sun)
when the transit Sun will be moving in adverse
signs.

(©) The 12th lord Sun in an angle from the
ascendant while the ascendant lord (Mercury) is in
the 2nd (Libra) will cause happiness in Virgo dasa,
and distress in Leo dasa. The dasa of Cancer will
cause happiness after 14 years (of its commence-
ment). Except with adverse Jupiterian movements,
the dasa of Cancer will promote happiness. During
this time, his elder brother will obtain a son and the
younger brother will enjoy happy effects. The
person will enjoy much happiness through his
cobom due to marriage activities.

(d) Saturn transiting in the sign denoted by the
natal Navamsa position of the Sun, or a trine
thereof, will trouble father through physical ail-
ments.

(©) Irrelevant: The country’s ruler will change
in the dasa of Virgo when Satur is found in the end
## Page 204

‘Chandra Kala Nadi 189

of Virgo orin Libra in transit. The country will ree!
under loss of crops and the population will be in the
grip of a calamity. Saturn moving in Leo will
promote commercial activities and the people will
be happy. The native’s father will be anguished
due to reversals in village undertakings.

4522 - 4527. (a) Transit of Saturn: Saturn's
sojourn in the sign caused by the Navamsa position
of the 8th lord (Mars) ora trine thereof will produce
mental distress to father and others, with the Sun’s
transit in adverse places.

(b) If Jupiter joins Saturn in transit, one will
gain wealth and be exceedingly happy in royal
circles.

(©) Jupiter occupying the sign held by Rabu (at
birth) and transited by Saturn will cause a displace-
ment to the native due to calamity and he will
migrate to another place.

(d) Cancer - Moon Dasa: The dasa of Cancer
will give happiness, prosperity and wealth after the
20th year (of age, instead of its commencement).
His father will also be greatly happy in such years
except when Jupiter will be in adverse transits.

(© Gemini - Mercury Dasa: The dasa of
Gemini will throw up much distress. Its 2nd half
will endanger one’s father who will take to ascetic
order as a result of some calamity.

(© 30th or 27th year of age of the native will
endanger his father if Mercury is found in Sura
Nadiamsa (in Libra). This will be finally caused
with Jupiter's adverse movements within the said
age bracket.

4528 - 4538. (a) Cancer - Moon Dasa: Mer-
cury should join a benefic (i.e. only Jupiter) and be
inaspect to the 9th lord (Venus). Asaresult, theend
of 11th Rasi’s dasa (i.e. Cancer dasa) will usher
performance of specially notable deeds. He will
feed the poor continually. His fame will increase
and he will be abundantly happy. Within 5 years
after the age of 30, he will have division with his
brother and will procure much wealth and convey-
ances.
(b) Taurus - Venus Dasa: The dasa of Taurus
will cause much prosperity. He will head over ten
villages, will feed the poor and be widely famous:
But the years denoted evil transits of Jupiter will
bring forth intense troubles and he will lose money
in some calamity. Good transits of Jupiter will give
him wealth and a prosperous employment.

(©) Aries - Mars Dasa: The dasa of Aries will,
after the 40th year, cause anguish. His 44th year
will be marked by abundant anguish.
## Page 205

190 Deva Keralam

(d) Pisces - Jupiter Dasa: The dasa of Pisces
will stand to get his son married and his daughter
will give birth toa female baby. During this phase,
transit Jupiter should be in an angle from the
ascendant.

(© Aquarius - Saturn Dasa: The dasa of
Aquarius will balance the good and bad effects.
But distress will come to pass due to loss of a child
for older brother.

(0 Capricorn - Saturn Dasa: The dasa of
Capricorn will cause death. His life span will be
56 years.

(g) The 12th lord joining the Sun will consign
one to Brahma’s world after death.

(b) The dasa of Capricorn (vide “f” above) will
register a fear of untimely death with adverse
Jupiterian and solar movements. Suitable rem-
edies be sought in this context.

@ Mercury in Sura Nadiamsa will produce
prosperity and fame in the dasa of Cancer.

(k) Results culled from Dhana Nadi (meaning
the Nadi dealing with 2nd house, as Lagna Nadi
deals with ascendant) are reflected in Deva Keralam
which will bear truth.

4539 - 4545, Pisces Ascendant - Kamala
Nadiamsa: (a) For one born in this space of the
zodiac, Saturn joining Mercury in the sign Aries
will give a blood-red physique. He will be leamed

and will cause distress to his enemies.

(b) If Saturn obtains Leo Navamsa (in the
above Yoga), he will hate his religion and will show
interest in other religions.

(c) He will be devoted to Lord Vishnu and will
have no co-bom. (This has no bearing with Leo
Navamsa.)

(@) Satum in the company of the Sun while
Mars is in Gemini will make one bold, heroic and
highly intelligent. His prosperity will pick up in
another country. Mars in the Sth will make him
garrulous.

(e) Saturn in Apampathi Nadiamsa will make
one righteous. He will be able to perform his job
well, will be a knower of everything, be gentle,
irascible, will break secrets and perform penance.

(© Saturn in a malefic Shashtiamsa will bless
one with a high degree of intelligence. He will be
inwardly cunning, be libidinous, will have eyes
resembling a lotus petal, be valorous, independent
and will have secretive vices. He will be instantly
irascible but be pleased. His body will be thin.

Notes: For Kamala Nadiamsa, please see notes
under sloka 778, page 74, Book 1.

## Page 206

Chandra Kala Nadi 191

4546 - 4554. (a) Rahu in the 10th (Sagittarius)
as Satur is in the 2nd (Aries) with Leo Navamsa
causes Lakshmi Yoga, leading to acquisition of
wealth. The subject will be somewhat foolish with
this yoga, be inwardly short-tempered, but pleased.
He will have friends in royal circles, will enjoy
fortunes through father but be bereft of happiness
conceming children. He will have self-earned
wealth and be grieved in the middle part of his life.

(b) Saturn in Aries with Leo Navamsa will
cause poverty in childhood. After the age of 30, he
will acquire much prosperity. He will suffer from
windy disorders and loss of consciousness. He will
incur grief in respect of his brother, be passionate
and will have a deformed son. Alternatively, he
will have twin children.

(c) Satum should be in a sign and Navamsa of
Marsand should join a benefic. Asaresult, one will
not be happy concerning co-bomn and will have no
after-born. He will be short-tempered, passionate
and will follow the religion of matemal grand-
father. In his childhood he will be initiated into
Vaishnavite order and will later on switch over to
his father’s religion. His prosperity will rise after
marriage. He will be happy after his 20th year of
age. Following the death of his maternal uncle, he
will resume his father’s home. He will have three
long-lived paternal uncles and two maternal un-
cles. His mother’s sister will be fortunate. One of
the paternal uncles will have two wives.

Notes: (a) “Swa Pita Bhagya” in sloka 4547
should read as “Swapitru Bhagya”.

4555 - 4557. Saturn in Kamala Nadiamsa will
cause four paternal uncles. Out of them, (the first)
two will be childless. The last two will be blessed
with sons, His maternal aunt will be fortunate in
respect of her husband. During the native’s first
dasa, she will undergo mental anguish. Paternal

grand-father’s prosperity will be destroyed in a
foreign land.

4558 - 4563. (a) Mars in the 4th in the company
of a malefic planet will cause difficulties in the
mother’s family during the native’s first dasa. His
matemal grand-mother and one of the paternal
uncles will be endowed with long life.

(b) The natal ascendant of paternal uncle will
correspond to the Navamsa occupied by Satu or
a trine thereof. The said relative will have two
wives, one son and two long-living daughters. Rest
(of the progeny) will be destroyed.

(c) The lord of the 3rd, denoting the issues of
paternal uncle, being in exaltation sign and debili-
tation Navamsa will cause anguish about daughters
and destruction of sons.

(@ Satum holding charge of one’s paternal
uncle (being the 1th lord for Piscesascendant) and
placed in the sign Aries with Leo Navamsa will
‘cause a paternal uncle with bad conduct (addicted
to vices). But he will be famous in royal assembly.
His (paternal uncle's) son will incur illness, be
libidinous, associated with barren women, ever in
trouble due to obstacles and will lose his adopted
Progeny.

4564 - 4575. (a) Two planets in exaltation
while Saturn is in Aries will be the source of the
following events. One's paternal uncle's daughter
will be somewhat immoral. She will have limited
number of daughters. She will be in the grip of
poverty and will lose her husband in the middle of
her life. Further there will be (such) blemish
concerning the females of paternal uncle’s wife.

(b) Satur in Aries in the company of Mercury
will give the native an excellent wife and wealth.
But there will exist blemish (of immorality) in his
wife’s family. His brother-in-law will be sinful, be
attached toa low class woman, morally fallen, will
indulge in inimical deeds, incur penury after some
time, betray his father and be bereft of a son.

(©) Venus in Pisces (in the ascendant) with
‘Virgo Navamsa while Rabu is placed in Sagittarius
(10th) will torment one’s wife’s sister. She will
further be wicked and unfortunate.

(@) Lakshmi Yoga: The native will obtain
fortunes after his 40th year through the formation
of what is called Lakshmi Yoga. The said yoga is
caused by Satu in Aries (2nd) with Leo Navamsa,

or in Pisces (in the ascendant) with Sagittarius
Navamsa.

(©) Pisces - Jupiter Dasa: The Moon in the
ascendant (or in the Arudha of the ascendant) will
act in a different manner in the dasa of the ascend-
ant. His mother will be anguished and will not,
enjoy happiness.

(© The 8th lord (Venus) in the ascendant
(Pisces) with an aspect or association from Rabu,
but without Jupiter's aspect, will kill the wife
(prematurely).

(g) Pisces - Jupiter Dasa: If the 8th lord is in
an angle while Jupiter is in a trine - both with
reference to the ascendant - one will nearly die in
the dasa of the ascendant. Further, the person will
incur more poverty than his father has, and will be
in the grip of deep anguish. His relatives will also
be in anguish. His paternal uncle will enjoy the
happiness of getting married.

(b) Aries - Mars Dasa: The 2nd lord Mars in
an angle in association with Rahu by company or
aspect will give wealth in the dasa of Aries.

Notes: (e) The dasa referred to is Pisces -
Jupiter in KCD.

(g) Reference is to Kala Chakra Dasa of Pisces
- Jupiter.

(h) Reference is to Kala Chakra Dasa of Aries
- Mars.

4576 - 4592. (a) Mars - Ketu Conjunction:
Birth in the first quarter of Kamala Nadiamsa,
Pisces, will cause thread ceremony in the Dasa of
Aries - Mars provided Mars at birth joins Ketu. In
addition to this, his education will commence. His
life will be marked by troubles. His maternal
uncle’s progeny will beget a bad end due to a
calamity. The king of the country will change(?)

(b) Taurus - Venus Dasa: The 3rd lord (Ve-
nus) in exaltation (in the ascendant, Pisces) with
debilitation Navamsa will cause the death of a
bride in mother’ s family in the dasa of Taurus. His
maternal grand-father will pass away. Perhaps a
great calamity will hit mother’s family. Father's
family will pass through a phase of utter poverty.
However, paternal uncle will be somewhat happy.

(©) Gemini - Mercury Dasa: The native will
be busy in marriage rituals in this dasaif the 4th lord
(Mercury) is in the 2nd (Aries)

(@ Gemini - Mercury Dasa: Malefics in the
4th will be’a source of loss of landed and housing
properties. In the said dasa, the native will lose his
place of living (and migrate to another place).

However, he will be happy after marriage. He will
be somewhat troubled by fever.

(©) Mars in the 4th will destroy family peace,
evils to father and great dangers to self in birth
region, Following his marriage, his wife will lose
her mother.

(© Cancer - Moon Dasa: The dasa of the Sth
Rasi will cause (second) marriage to one’s father-
in-law. One’s paternal uncle will receive much
happiness (on other counts) but be grieved due to
loss of co-born.

(g) Cancer - Moon Dasa: The lord of the Sth
(Moon) in the Sth in aspect to Jupiter will allow
entry in royal service in the captioned dasa. This
period will also help one to prosper for a period of
two or three years. He will beget a son but lose his
father.

(b) The 4th lord (Mercury) in aspect to Jupiter
and begetting Pisces Navamsa will produce much
happiness in the dasa of Gemini - Mercury. Further
many auspicious events will accrue to the native in
royal service.

@ Mars in the 4th (Gemini) will produce
anguish after the age of 34.

@ Leo - Sun Dasa: This dasa will cause
physical thinness due to penury.

(K) One will be humiliated in royal assembly in
the dasa of Leo - Sun occurring under the following
conditions. The ascendant is Pisces, the Sun is in
Aries and Rahu is in the 10th (Sagittarius)

( Effects for One’s Daughter: One’s daughter
will beget auspicious effects in the dasa of Leo -
Sun, if the Sun is in Aries along with Mercury.
Further the Sun should be in the 9th from the
Navamsa ascendant. The phase of anguish will be
compensated by auspicious effects and the exalta-
tion effects (of the Sun) will remain even. The end
of the dasa will give marriage to her. Further, the
native’s son will also get married and his friends
will receive happiness.

4595 - 4599, (a) Leo - Sun Dasa: Saturn or
Rabu in transit in the sign denoted by the Navamsa
position of the 6th lord (Sun) will torment one’s
adversaries. But the dasa of the Leo - Sun shall be
in currency at that time.

(b) General: When Saturn transits the space
caused by the sum of longitudes of the lords of the
6th, 8th and 12th, he will produce mental distress,
physical ailment and financial decline.

(©) In the Dasa of Leo - Sun, one will eam
enmity of Vaishnavites as Saturn at birth is in
Kamala Nadiamsa (in Aries). ‘The last one third
art of the dasa will be congenial for destruction of
enemies. One's fortunes will rise after a change of
the ruler.

(@ Virgo - Mercury Dasa: This dasa will
produce much prosperity.

strength will contribute to acquisition of convey-
ances.

4601 - 4608. (a) Libra - Venus: For one born
in Lakshmi yoga (vide 4546-54 and 4564-75), this

dasa will cause prosperity of one’s progeny. But
the last one third part of the dasa will produce great
calamity.

(b) The lord of the 8th (Venus) getting the
aspect of Jupiter and being in his exaltation sign
(Pisces) with Virgo Navamsa will cause medium
life-span. There will be (untimely) death in rela-
tives’ circle and evils to one’s own progeny. His
wife will be subjected to evils with adverse transits
of the Sun but will recover her health early.

(©)Scorpio-Mars Dasa: One born in Lakshmi
‘Yoga will see his sons greatly prospering. He will
also enjoy prosperity and happiness.

(q@) Sagittarius - Jupiter Dasa: If Rabu is
found in the 10th at birth, the said Rasi’s Dasa will,
be a source of calamity.

(e) In the dasas that are trine to Sagittarius (i.e.
in Leo - Sun and Aries - Mars dasas), one will be
nearly involved in death.

(6) The junction of the Dasa of the Moon sign
will cause evils to one’s kinsfolk and consequent
grief.

(g) Death of the native will occur in the Dasa of
the 10th ign (i.e. Sagittarius - Jupiter) in the “year”
ruled by the 8th lord (i.e. the phase held by Libra -
Venus). The corresponding month will be re-
## Page 210

Chandra Kala Nadi 195

flected by the Sun journeying in Cancer, Scorpio or
Pisces.

(h) Sani Nadi is brief on the effects of Bhavas
in connection with Lakshmi Yoga while Sukra
Nadi is quite elaborate. Astrologers should under-
stand these effects through solar return horoscopes.

Thus end the effects for Kamala Nadiamsa in
Pisces ascendant.

4609 - 4617. Libra Ascendant - Nirmal
Nadiamsa: (a) One belonging to the Ist half of the
subject Nadiamsa will be born asa Soodra. He will
be the 9th issue of the family.

(6) The Moon in conjunction with Rahu and
being in debility (in the 2nd) with Capricorn Nav-
amsa while the ascendant is held by Saturn by
occupation will cause one’s birth in a forest region.

(©) Ifthe ascendant Libra is aspected by Saturn,
birth and living will be in a town of a forest region.

(@ One of the former half of this Nadiamsa will
be born in a street extending from south to north-
east. The house will be located in the eastern
direction with north-facing entry. In case of the
latter half, birth will be ina city near ariver region.
He will be the Sth or 2nd issue of the family.

("Veethyostu Chakrapaassinoh" in the second line
of sloka 4613 denotes nothing understandable.
Veethi means street; Chakra means wheel and
Paasa means noose.)

(©) The native of first half will belong to an
excellent family and be handsome in appearance.
One of the 2nd half will be black in complexion and
thin-bodied.

(O Thereis another authority to specify longev-
ity and a fat physique in case of Jupiter's aspect on
Libraascendant. The native of Ist half will receive
full effects of Jupiter's aspect.

4618 - 46267. (a) At the time of birth of the
native of Vipra Kala ("Viprakalagnau" shouldread
as "Viprakalajau”) .... will be present. In case of
birth in 2nd half, "results will be slow” and doctors
and Brahmins will be present.

(b) Saturn aspecting Libra ascendant with 2nd
half of the subject Nadiamsa will cause pains to
mother at the time of delivery. In case of 1st half,
pains will be less and delivery instant. Jupiter’s
aspect will usher happiness (to the childand mother)
and remove the blemish of infantile mortality.
## Page 211

196 Deva Keralam

(©) Saturn in Leo while Jupiter is in Aries with
Aries Navamsa, bereft of malefic relations, will
produce blemish of the Moon (i.e. Balarishta) to
some extent.

(@) The Moon in Scorpio with a Navamsa of
Saturn will endanger the child’s father. The rem-
edy lies in donating gold. In case the birth star is
Poorva or Uttara Phalguni (it is Jyeshta according
to another version), remedies should be sought for
aLibra ascendant native. Then the parents will be
long-lived.

(©) Should Rabu be in the 2nd with the Moon
while Marsis in Gemini, Balarishtais produced for
a Libra native: To overcome this blemish, the
Moon-God’s image made of silver should be wor-
shipped and a cobra’s image made of gold should
be donated.

(© The blemish of the Moon (i.e. Balarishta)
will not (fully) exist if birth is in the Ist half of the
subject Nadiamsa. But in the other case, blemish
will be aplenty for a period of three months. The
partial blemish in case of the native of former half
can be overcome by remedies.

"a" are not quite coherent.

4627 - 4636. Father : (a) If birth is in Libra
ascendant while Jupiter is in the sign Aries with
Aries Navamsa, the native's father will be right-
eous and intelligent. He will be a devotee of Lord
Siva and will honour gods and Brahmins. After
some interval, his fortunes will increase buthe will
have enmity with his son. He will be passionate and
be leamed in moral law, meritorious acts and
Paranas,

(b) Birth in Nirmala Nadiamsa, Libra ascend-
ant, would cause troubles to father in his early days
on account of his two brothers. He would eam a
great deal of prosperity and be endowed with sisters
as well. He would construct tanks and gardens, and
would follow the code of conduct prescribed by the
Vedas.

(c) For the subject native, if Mars is in the 9th
from the ascendant (i.e. in Gemini), declare the
following. The native’ s father would bea cruel and
short-tempered person and would incur enmity
with co-bom, For some time he would not be
independent, i.e. would be in servitude. Later on,
he would seek fortunes with independence. In
childhood, he would be wicked and would acquire
the sin of having illegal ties with women. Forsome
time, he would be a thief. In his youth, he would
suffer from diseases of blood vessels. He would
repent for his sins, turn righteous and would wor-
ship Lord Siva.

(@) If the birth is in the former of half of the
subject Nadiamsa, father would be happy in the
middle 6f his life. He would be ever attached to
righteous deeds but would have enmity with his
kinsfolk. In his old age, he would acquire a lot of
prosperity through his offspring. He would have a
total of ten or twelve brothers and would have an
adopted son (as well). One of his sisters will have
long-lived married life, be sickly and endowed
with offspring.

Notes: The results mentioned in the above ten
slokas apply to the native’s father.

4637 - 4643. (a) Cousin: As a result of birth in
the Ist half of the said Nadiamsa, following is to be
predicted about the native’s paternal aunt’s son.
He will have a step-mother, will enjoy much pros-
perity and wealth and be inimical to his step-
brother. He will beget Raja Yoga effects and be
devoted to acquire a high degree of sacred knowl-
edge. These are the effects relating to the son of
father’s younger sister.

(b) Aunt: Further to the above, father’s elder
sister will be emaciated due to widowhood. Her
son will be in the grip of utter poverty and will
probably have two wives.

(©) Saturn in the 11th (Leo) will cause two sons
the native’s paternal aunt. There will be two
adopted sons in the family. This applies to the Ist
half of Nirmala Nadiamsa. The native’s cousin
will be of bad conduct and will possess many
friends and employers. Due to undertakings re-
lated to step brother, he will lose his sons. After
some efforts, he will obtain a son who will be
endangered in between. He will have two wives
and be sinful.

4644 - 4653. Paternal Uncle’s Son: (a) Satur
in the 3rd (or) “in a trine to Sagittarius” (that is, in
the 7th in Aries or in the 11th in Leo) will cause the
following effects concerning paternal uncle’s son.
He will incur planetary evils, be a thief and will
steal the wealth of his kinsfolk. Due to these
blemishes, he will face loss of progeny. By main-
taining vows to the Sun-god, his health will be
normal; he will be somewhat happy and will beget
ason.

(b) Saturn in the 11th (Leo) in the company of
Venus and begetting Libra Navamsa will cause
some fame to a paternal uncle's son in the royal
assembly. He will have two wives, be passionate
and be grieved on account of loss of progeny due to
the sin accruing out of enmity with apaternal uncle.
After some delay, he will beget a son. He will be
happy right from his birth. In the middle of his life,
he will be somewhat distressed and emaciated due
to windy diseases. He will face much grief due to
misunderstandings with his kinsfolk.

(©) Due to the blemish caused by Saturn being
in the 11th, the native will lose cousin in the very
first dasa. One of the native’s younger sister will
also pre-decease her husband. If she survives (i.e.
lives after husband’s death), some important rela-
tives will die in the end of the native’s first dasa.

(@) In the sub period of Venus in the 2nd dasa,
## Page 213

198 Deva Keralam

or in the middle of the said dasa, one’s paternal
uncle will quit the world. In the later years, father
will acquire special (or mentionable) wisdom.
Wealth and grains will be on the increase in the
native’s family and he will acquire a prosperous
employment.

4654 - 4660 (a) Due to the blemish of Mars
being in the 9th (Gemini), one’s father will be
distressed in the very first year of his (native’s)
birth. Right from the native’s childhood, his father
will be mentally tormented but will enjoy fortunes.

(b) If the birth be in the 2nd half of Nirmala
Nadiamsa, Libra ascendant, one’s father will face
untimely death. His paternal uncle’s children will
incur evils. So also other kinsmen.

(©) Incase of Ist half of the subject Nadiamsa,
father will be subjected to diseases but will recover
health early. Paternal grand-mother will enjoy
happiness. Elder brother will beget auspicious
effects,

(d) Grand-father: The Sth lord Saturn in the
company of Mercury and betting Libra Navamsa
will cause a famous paternal grand-father who
would have a number of co-born.

(e) Grand-father: Rabu in the 2nd (Scorpio)
while the Sun is in the 10th (Cancer) would cause
anguish to paternal grand-father in childhood who
would be emaciated due to penury. He would
wander ina street spread from south to north. After

his marriage, he would acquire happiness follow-
ing birth of a son.

(© Birth in the subject Nadiamsa will cause
wisdom to paternal grand-father. In the end of his
youth, he would acquire fortunes and live happily
in a forest region.

4661. Thenative’ s paternal grand-father would
worship two teachers (i.e. would have two teach-
ers), would follow Vedic code of conduct, be
righteous, would earn fortunes towards the end of
his youth and would migrate to a forest region.

4662 - 4665. Libra Ascendant + Nirmala
Nadiamsa - 1st Half: (a) Should Satur, as a ruler
of the house of paternal grand-father (the Sth) be
conjoined with two benefics, he (the said relative)
would be a pure person, would be the best among
his co-born, ever happy, would have one virtuous
wife, would be highly revered among his kinsfolk
and would honour his co-bom,

(b) If Jupiter aspects the said Saturn, paternal
grand-father would have only one co-born, be
honourable and endowed with virtuous sons, wealth
and grains. Due to the meritorious ‘deeds of the
native’s paternal great grand-father, the paternal
family would acquire waxing prosperity. Paternal

‘grand-father would be highly prosperous and would
acquire wealth in excess of his older brother's
earnings.

4666 - 4680¥. (a) The native of Nirmala
Nadiamsa, Libra ascendant will be wealthy and

yy.

(b) Elder Brother: The 11th (Leo) having
Mercury, while Saturn is conjunct Venus (else-
where) will cause great prosperity to the elder
brother of the person belonging to the Ist half of
subject Nadiamsa. He will be skilful in three
languages, be blood-red in complexion and hand-
some, He will have two wives, will enjoy pleas-
ures, will have many sisters and be disposed to
think of (or indulge in) various business activities.
He will ever honour his father’s words, will respect

gods and Brahmins, be happy with limited progeny
and wealth and will have three sons. He will eam
his livelihood by trading in gold in another island
(Lein a foreign region). The 2nd dasaof the native
will cause wealth to the older brother who will
become very prosperous with servants and a lot of
wealth.

(c) The native of 2nd half of the subject Nadi-
amsa will acquire co-bor in the middle of his life.
(That is, there will be a wide gap between the
‘subject and his after-born.) He will lose his elder
co-born and will grieve aplenty.

(Satur in Leo will cause destruction of older —
co-bor for a person born in Libra ascendant
provided Satum is in aspect to a malefic planet.

(©) The older brother of one born in the Ist half
of subject Nadiamsa will be endowed with longev-
ity. But he will have no sister and will lose brothers
bom prior to him. Three or four of his sisters will
be endowed with longevity. in case of birth in
second half, the younger brother will be long-lived.
For birth in Nirmala Nadiamsa's firt half, four
brothers with long lives are indicated. Two sisters
will have long-living husbands.

(© There is another authority to state that three
sisters will be long-lived while younger brothers
will incur destruction.

(g) The number of long-living co-bom will
correspond to the number of Bindus obtained by
Mars in his Ashtaka Varga.

(h) The family of the native of Nirmala Nadi-
‘amsa will enjoy increased prosperity. The native
will be happy and rich.

(@ The 3rd lord (Jupiter) in Vargottama Nav-
amsa in Aries, without the association of amalefic,
will give a long life-span to older brother, much
prosperity and happiness. Some of the brothers will
lose progeny. He-will have nomaleissues but many
female issues.

4681 - 4690. (a) Sisters: One born in the Ist
half of Nirmala Nadiamsa, Libra ascendant, will
have a total of 4 sisters (vide sloka 4683). One of
the two sisters will be blessed with sons, be prosper-
ous and handsome and the other one will be an-
guished and emaciated due to penury. These
effects will turn true.

(b) One's mother will be long-lived if the 4th
lord is aspected by Jupiter and is in exaltation
Navamsa.

(c) Movable Ascendant: The Moon in Pisces,
Venus in the 11th and Saturn in the 3rd, 6th or 11th,
This disposition of the said three planets will cause
destruction of the mother’s family. This applies to
amovable sign ascending. Moreover, the mother
will be a virtuous and pure female, enjoying for-
tunes of co-born. But the native will be devoid of
maternal happiness and be unfortunate concerning
mother. He will have half-co-bo and will acquire
happiness through father. Such are the effects for
birth in the 2nd half of Nirmala Nadiamsa. His
mother will predecease her husband. Her death
will occur with Saturn journeying in the conclud-
ing part of Scorpio during his 2nd round of transit.
This will coincide with the junction period of the
3rd dasa. The native will lose his father when
Saturn is in Gemini in his 1st round of transit,
during the middle of the 3rd dasa. Saturn's transit,
ina trine thereof (i.e. in Libra and Aquarius) will
be a source of untimely death for father, for which
remedies should be done.

Notes: (a) Out of the 4 sisters, the text gives

some effects for 2 sisters only.

(©) The events given hereof are applicable the
Ist half Nirmala Nadiamsa of a movable ascend-
ant, particularly toLibra, and in general tothe other
three, viz. Capricorn, Aries and Cancer.

4691 - 4698. Libra Ascendant - Nirmala
Nadiamsa: (a) In case the birth is in the Isthalf of,
the subject Nadiamsa, parents will be long-lived.
One belonging to the 2nd half of the subject
Nadiamsa, will lose his father in his 10th, 8th or
20th year of age.

(b) The above-mentioned years of age will
cause illness to father if birth is in the Isthalf of the
subject Nadiamsa. Further, evils will spread among
relatives. For both of these, suitable remedies be
Tesorted to.

(©) Rahu in the 2nd (i.e. Scorpio), while the
Moon is in “Sakata”, will give a lot of learning,
wealth and reasoning skills.

(@ The 4th lord Saturn joining Venus and
begetting Libra Navamsa will grant learning to the
subject according to his family traditions. He will
be an expert gem examiner.

(©) Jupiter in the 7th will cause fondness for
listening to mythological stories. The subject will
## Page 216

Chandra Kala Nadi

be an expert in ancient laws and scriptures, will
store the merit of sacred rites and be very righteous
and sacrificing in disposition. He will earn the
liking of all. He will enjoy more prosperity in
comparison to his paternal grand-father and be
highly charitable. His education will commence in
the 5th year. Fear of fever etc. will occur in his 3rd
year. In his childhood, he will be troubled by
indigestion and small-pox. To overcome this
blemish, prayer to the Moon-god shouldbe offered.
Donation of Cobra’s image (serpent god) be also
done.

Notes: (c) “Sakata” position of the Moon oc-
curs when Jupiter and the Moon are in mutual 6th
and 8th positions or vice versa. Moon in the 12th
from Jupiter or vice versa is not considered as
“Sakata” by many standard writers of ancient times
which is quite logical.

The results given from “b” to “e” above apply
to the Ist half of Nirmala Nadiamsa, Libra ascend-
ant.

4699 - 4706. (a) Jupiter in the 7th in Vargot-

tama will grant longevity and will remove fear of

infantile mortality.

(b) Birth in the 2nd half of the subject Nadi-
amsa will cause fear of Balarishta. If he survives,

201

long life will come to pass. These have been told
in detail in “Bhava Nadi”.

() One born in the Ist half will have eyes
resembling a lotus petal. He will be endowed with
asoftand radiant physique, be gentle, fond of sweet
and sour juices, and will have imbalances of the
three bodily temperaments, viz. wind, phlegm and
bile, He will have two names, be truthful, passion-
ate and will somewhat be sinful of illicit ties with
females.

(4) Venus and Saturn in conjunction will cause
adisposition to enjoy pleasures. Such a person will
be dear to the king, will join harlots, be libidinous
and will later on conquer his senses due to repent-
ance. He will be happy with his elders, will have
a limited number of friends, be tall, emaciated,
pure, highly intelligent, very timid, distressed and
righteous in conduct. He will be fond of ancient
laws, be endowed with wisdom, be philosophical,
subdued, pure, crafty, eloquent and blessed with a
high degree of charitability. He will be somewhat
sickly, bea satisfied soul, attached to accumulating
wealth and be wealthy.

4707. Debilitated Moon: The Moon joining
Rahu and being in her sign of debility with Capri-
corn Navamsa will cause fickle-mindedness. The
native will be somewhat a dunce and be short-

tempered.

4708, Rahu- Moon Yoga: The conjunction of
the Moon with Rahu will cause fear from the king
and thieves for a native of Nirmala Nadiamsa,
Libra ascendant. In the middle of his life, he will
incur enmity with co-born.

4709 - 4711. The Sun in Cancer: One will
acquire merits by having dips in the Setu if the Sun
is in the 10th (Cancer). He will also bathe in the
Ganges. He will be on a pilgrimage to the Setu for
a period of three weeks. In the middle of his life,
he will be highly charitable and construct tanks and
parks for public use. In his old age, he will donate
abrown cow in the region of Setu. On the banks of
the Ganges, he will give charities, without motive
for any gains. He will help others to visit the
Ganges and will thereby acquire moral merits.

4712. The Sun in 6th: The Sun in Pisces with
Libra Navamsa will bless one with longevity.
These effects will be due in the dasa of the 10th
lord.

Notes: The dasa referred to should be for the
effects mentioned, vide slokas 4709 - 4711, due to
the Sun's position in the 10th (Cancer). To wit, the
dasa of the Moon will reflect those results. But this
should not be applied to long lease of life due to the
Sun being in Pisces with Libra Navamsa.

4713. Venus Dasa: The native of Nirmala
Nadiamsa will gain fortunes in the 2nd balf of the
ascendant lord’s dasa. He will be righteous and
charitable in the said dasa.

4714-4718¥ (a) One born inthe Isthalf of the
subject Nadiamsa will get married in the month of
Chaitra, in the 12th or 14th year, during 2nd dasa.

(b) The 7th lord (Mars) in Aries Navamsa will
cause marriage in one’s native region. The bride
will hail from the eastern part of the town. The birth
sign of the bride will bea trine to the natal Sun. The
native will have a re-marriage in his twenty-fourth
year, during the dasa of Venus. In his 30th year, he
will lose his wife and will marry again.

Notes: (b) There is some confusion about the
age of marriage. It should be understood that the
first marriage will take place in the 24th year. The
wife will die in his 30th year as a consequence of
which immediately re-marriage will take place.
These events are due to Mars occupying Aries
Navamsa.

Some of the lines are repeated without any
change conveying identical meanings. These are
avoided in the renidering.

baa pan Indra Yoga: The ascendant
lord Venus should be in the 11th (Leo) in the
company of the 9th lord (Mercury) and the 4th lord
(Saturn) and be in the 9th house in Navamsa. Asa
result Indra Yoga is formed for a native of Libra.
Such a native will enjoy material pleasures, be
liked by the ruler, will take to right path of living
and will enjoy illimitable wealth. He will construct
temple towers etc. and be charitable. More details

have been stated in the Yoga Nadi.

Notes: In simpler terms, this Yoga is caused by
the conjunction of Venus, Saturn and Mercury in
the 11th in Leo. Venus should, however, be in the
9th from the Navamsa ascendant.

4722 - 4724, Saturn in 11th: In case of Libra
ascendant, Saturn in the 11th will cause two wives.
The person will have 3 long-living daughters and 4
long-living sons. In his old age, he will be in much
grief due to loss of his son. In the Ist dasa, he will
enjoy happiness through father. 2nd year will give
wealth (to the family). In his Ist year of age, his
older brother will beget married.

4725 - 4727. Transit of Saturn: (a) Saturn’s
transit in the sign denoted by the Navamsa occu-
pied by Venus, or a trine thereof, will spoil the
native’s health and his father and others will be
distressed.

(b) Saturn transiting as above with reference to
the Moon’ s Navamsa will produce evils in the birth
country. Ministers etc. will be troubled(?). The
native’s relatives will be anguished.

(©) Saturn's transit on the Moon sign will
distress his father to a great extent.

Pada. The dasa of the Navamsa dispositor of such
aplanet will cause increase of prosperity to father.
The relevant sub period will be that of the Moon.

Notes: Reference to first dasa found in the
original is not included in the translation. Oritmay
be an alternative dasa.

4730-4736. (a) Indra Yoga: One bornin Indra
Yoga (vide sloka 4719 etc.) will be exceedingly
wealthy right from his birth, He will enjoy golden
omaments and robes. The 2nd dasa will help the
family acquire golden vessels. The 3rd dasa will
give full effects concerning wealth. The 4th dasa
will be special in this regard. The Sth dasa will give
limitless wealth.

(b) The sub periods of the lords of the 6th
(lupiter) and 8th (Venus) will cause physical ail-
ments in the junction of Dasa. The native will die
in the end of Mars dasa with the transit Sun in
Scorpio, Sagittarius or Capricorn. This will be in
his 60th year. In his 54th year, his older brother will
die. The said older brother will incur fear of
untimely death in the native’s 27th year for which
remedies should be sought. 36th year of age
cause the subject much anguish and physical ail-
ments. After his end, he will attain a good world.
Effects for Nirmala Nadiamsa will bear truth.

Notes: (a) Mention of 3 months commencing
from Scorpio vide sloka 4730 - Vrischikaadi traya
‘maasage - does not serve any purpose.

4737. One will attain a good world, if the 12th
(Virgo) is occupied by Venus while Saturn and
Mercury are in the 11th (Leo). Later on, he will

beget an excellent birth. The effects for Nirmala
Nadiamsa will be a truth as reflected in Deva
Keralam.

4738. Movable ascendant: Venus in the sign
Taurus with Aquarius Navamsa will be a source of
Raja Yoga if birth is in a movable ascendant
(Cancer, Libra, Capricom or Aries). Such a person
will prosper after the age of 27.

Notes: “Raja Yogamsake” is an erroneous
term but apparently it conveys the capability of
‘Venus causing a Raja Yoga.

In relevant places, from now onwards upto
sloka 4780, the Nadiamsa is Kutila in Cancer
ascendant. In some places, a movable ascendant
only features, ignoring Nadiamsa requirement.

For Kutila Nadiamsa, please refer to the notes
please refer to page 15, Book 1.

4739 - 4742, (a) Cancer Ascendant: The
native of Cancer ascendant will enjoy Raja Yoga if
the lords of the 9th (Jupiter) and the 12th (Mercury)
are aspected by or conjunct Venus. Asa result, the
person will be aking or equal toaking. He will be
courageous, valorous and fond of drama, rhetoric,
poetry and music, be eloquent, truthful, and fond of
scents and garlands.

(b) Scorpio Navamsa: When a movable as-
cendant prevails, Scorpio should be its Navamsa.
‘Then Mars in the sign Pisces and the Moon in the
3rd from the ascendant will make one sickly and
weak-bodied. He will suffer from bleeding cough
and tuberculosis and will be troubled at the time of,

prosperity.

Notes: (a) The trio - Jupiter, Mercury and
Venus - being together will bestow on the native
much prosperity, akin to that of a king, and spe-
cialisation in fields like poetry and drama. He will
have a taste for good things in life. He will remain
truthful while his speech will be marked for its
eloquence. This aphorism can be applied to Cap-
rico ascendant also, and with some caution to
Taurus. In case of Taurus, Mars is the 12th lord.
Libra ascendant is to be excluded because the 9th
and 12th houses are ruled by only one planet, i.e.
Mercury. Hence the question of conjunction of 9th
and 12th lords does not arise.

4743 - 4746¥. (a) The lord of the ascendant in
Capricorn Navamsa produces an irascible and fool-
ish man,

(b) Vishnu Yoga: The Sun in the sign Aries
with Leo Navamsa, as Jupiter is conjunct Ketu,
causes what is called Vishnu Yoga. Its subject will
be fortunate to follow Vaishnavism (the order of
Vishnu).

(©) Marsin the ascendantand Saturn in the 12th
also produce Vishnu Yoga. Asaresult, one born in
a movable ascendant will (particularly Cancer)
incur anguish and poverty in childhood. His 27th
year will be troublesome. He will be weak-bodied
and dark in complexion. He will possess Sacred
Knowledge, be rich, valorous, intelligent and fond
of promoting quarrels. He will have ten brothers
out of whom two will be dear to the king. He will
also have two sisters both of whom will enjoy
longevity. His co-born will include younger ones.
## Page 220

Chandra Kala Nadi 205

Notes: (b) This is a Yoga for spiritualism in a
broad sense.

4747 - 4750%. In case of Cancer ascending,
Venus in the 11th with Aquarius Navamsa (vide
sloka4738 supra) will cause younger brothers. The
subject will be passionate and will have older
brothers (as well). He will lead a difficult phase in
his 27th year. After that, he will enjoy Raja Yoga
effects, particularly after 30. His mother will be
long-lived. One of his sisters will be bereft of
husband and be anguished. Another willbe blessed
with a long-living husband. She will die in the
native’s 4th dasa. The native will beget wide fame.

Notes: Certain terms like Vishnu Yoga and
Kutila Nadiamsa are an interruption found in the
original which are not included to the translation.
