4751 - 4753. Cancer Ascendant: For Vishnu
‘Yoga caused by the Moon in Virgo the following
effects be declared. During childhood days, the
person will be in the grip of anguish and poverty.
He will live by narrating mythological stories and
will be fond of fun-filled accounts. He will be ina
position to read others’ mind, disposed to cheat his,
friends, skilful in completing his undertakings,
wealthy, an impediment to the undertakings of his
adversaries and be miserly. He will also obstruct
others’ work.

Notes: The Moon in Virgo is a partial condi-
tion, According to sloka 4739 - 4742 (b), the

complete Yoga is: The Moon in the 3rd in Virgo,
Mars in the 9th in Pisces, and the ascendant Cancer
having Scorpio Navamsa.

“Haasyavastha” presently referred to is not a
standard term.

4754 - 4756Y2. (a) In the formation of Raja
Yoga caused (by Venus in Taurus with Aquarius
Navamsa), a malefic in the ascendant will give the
following effects. The person will enjoy royal
authority but will commit many sinful deeds.

(b) The Moon (vide sloka 4739 - 42 b) will
produce a person who will follow the order of
Vaishnavites. He will patronise his kinsfolk, will
subdue the king and be lustfully attached to his
spouse. He will have sexual union even on probib-
ited days.

4757 - 4765Y2.(a) Cancer ascendant with Scor-
pio Navamsa will cause a warm body. The native
will incur aberration of the two temperaments -
wind and phlegm. He will suffer from imbalancing
of bile due to the sin of distressing others. To
‘overcome these blemishes, one should worship the
image of the zodidic made on a single-footed plank.
Worship of planets should be done as prescribed in
the Vedas. The names of the Nakshatras including
t should be written in the said image. This
should (after the worship) be donated to the astrolo-
ger. As a result, the great disease about to strike
will vanish,

(b) The 2nd line of sloka 4761 is unclear. “He
will notdistress othersif Vishnu Y ogais present for
one born in Rajamsa.”

(©) One will suffer from a great disease in the
Ath dasa due to betrayal committed to Lord Siva.
For remedying this ill, the image of the zodiac be
worshipped for two weeks and donated at the end.
Recitation of Mrityunjaya Mantra for a hundred
thousand times be undertaken in a temple of Lord
Siva. Nava Grahas should be worshipped accord-
ing to one’sfamily traditions, Donations will cause
happiness and bring back health. In the absence of
all these, Maha Mrityunjaya should be recited for
one crore (or ten million) times. By installing a
Siva Linga, bleeding cough will disappear. Dona-
tion of a pot filled with honey and ghee will ward
of urinary complaints.

4166 - 4768. The Moon in Virgo with Capri-
com Navamsa will in the later half of the 4th dasa
promote Raja Yoga effects. The subject will have
many female issues but limited number of sons.
His 4th child will be an excellent son.

version as “Chaturthe Garbhe” denoting the 4th
issue.

4770 - 4773. (a) Brothers: In case of Cancer _
ascendant, Kutila Nadiamsa, declare two wives for
olderbrother. He will besickly, will marry a barren
female and will face obstacles in obtaining off-
spring. The younger brother will have only one
wife who will be virtuous, become famous through
co-born and will have plenty of wealth and many
sons.

(b) The native will lose his father in the 16th
year of age during the 3rd dasa. He will not survive
beyond this phase.

(©) Saturn transiting the sign represented by the
Navamsa position of the ascendant lord, or a trine
thereof, will endanger one’s father. Friends and
employer will also incur destruction, Afterwards
the native will be prosperous in Mercury’s sub
period of the 4th dasa.

4774 - 4781%. (a) The Raja Yoga caused by
Venus by being in, the 11th (with Aquarius Nav-
‘amsa) will last for a period of 8 years.

(b) Saturn moving in Leo or Gemini will inflict
a great diseases on a Cancer native with Kutila
Nadiamsa. The sub period of the Sun (in the 4th
dasa) will cause much fear. To overcome these,
donations should be made.

(©) One born in Kutila Nadiamsa, Cancer as-
cendant, while Saturn is retrograde, as the luminar-
ies are in the end of Leo will die of tuberculosis of
the lungs and will meetabadend. 28th, 36th or 41st
year will cause his death. From 32 to 36, he will be
in the grip of fear of untimely death. Even if he
survives, he will die in the 40th year.

@ One born in Vishnu Yoga will perform
religious ceremonies for 5 nights. He will meet a
bad end and will go to hell after death,

(e) Saturn in the 12th will deprive one of final
rites by his son who will not look after him in his
last days and will live in another village at the time
of the native’s death.

4782 - 4784¥s. Libra Ascendant - Indra N:
diamsa: One bom in this space of the zodiac, as
‘Venus and Satur are together will be wealthy right
from his birth. He will be far-sighted, wide eyed
and will enjoy sonsand daughters. He willbe long-
lived, famous, scholarly, happy, an excellent per-
sonage, radiant and endowed with wealth and
grains. He will be libidinous, learned, honourable,

fickle-minded and righteous.

Notes: In this part of the text, in some cases
“Indra Yoga” isan interruption and hence removed
from the English rendering. At some places, this is
a replacement for Indra Nadiamsa, Libra ascend-
ant.

sloka 1105, page 100, Book 1.

4785-4788. (a) The Moon in debility in the 2nd
and being with Rabu will make one serve a mean
employer. His prosperity will be ina base kingdom
(ie. under a base employer).

(b) The Moon in Scorpio with Capricom Nav-
amsa will produce a subdued person who will be
pure, crafty, honourable, attached to pleasures, and
fond of music. There is another version to mention
that this native will be less sinful but highly libidi-
nous. After some time, he will turn righteous and
honour gods and Brahmins. He will be happy with
his elders, will have an attractive nose and a tall,
emaciated physique. He will be pure, highly
intelligent, very timid, be devoted to his work and
fond of charitable acts.

4789. The Moon in Uttara Phalguni Nakshatra
with Capricom Navamsa will make one dear to the
king. The person will be passionate, eloquent and
skilful.

Notes: Indra Nakshatra means Phalguni
Nakshatra which includes Poorva Phalguni and
Uttara Phalguni. But Capricorn Navamsa occurs
only to the 2nd quarter of Uttara Phalguni.

4791 - 4794, If the ascendant is occupied by
both benefic and malefic planets, the native’s
father will incur professional impediments, imme-
diately after nuptial ceremony, due to misunder-
standing with his kinsfolk. Further, both the
parents would be subjected to evils. The Ist year
of the native will cause anguish to father. - But
auspicious effects will prevail among his kinsmen,
particularly to paternal uncle who will celebrate
birth of ason. The said son will indulge in thieving
in his own home, will incur enmity with his rela-
tives and will steal the possessions of his kinsmen.

4795 - 4800. (a) One.born in the subject Nadi-
amsa will have long-lived parents if (Venus) joins
the 9th lord. Soalsohis older brother. His paternal
uncle will possibly have two wives, be endowed

with abundant fortunes, much wealth and many
sons,

(b) Father: The father of the native of subject
‘Nadiamsa would indulge in thieving at home in his
childhood. Due to calumny caused by his wife (ie.
the native’s mother), he will be somewhat an-
guished.

(c)Incase Venusis conjunct Saturn, the mother
will enjoy long married life. Father will be highly
righteous and very intelligent.

(@) Marsin the 9th will be a blemish (for father)
as a result of which father will indulge in foolish
deeds. To ward off this blemish, remedies should
be sought. Father's health will be sound by the
donation of an image of the zodiac.

Notes: (a) There is no mention in the original
‘as to who should be with the 9th lord. Itis only my
guess that the ascendant lord Venus should join the
9th lord Mercury.

4801 - 4810. (a) Father & Uncle: One born in
Indra Nadiamsa, Libra ascendant, will in his 19th

|
|
## Page 224

Chandra Kala Nadi 209

year find his father in danger of untimely death to
overcome which remedies should be undertaken.
In the 10th year, father will be grieved due to loss
of older brother. During the sub period ruled by
Jupiter, in the very first dasa, the subject will incur
evils to his paternal uncle who will somewhat be
endangered by untimely death. Butlater on he will
enjoy sound health.

(b) Saturn’s Transit: Note the sign identical
with the Navamsa occupied by the 4th lord (Saturn)
at birth. When Saturn himself comes in transit to
the said sign, or its trine, paternal uncle will be
involved in a great danger. There will be loss of
progeny for some relative. His father will incur
physical illness in a month when the Sun will be in
bad transit. Troubles to the king (?) and to paternal
uncle will come to pass.

(c) Remedy: To overcome the blemish to
paternal uncle due to Saturn’s transit inflicting the
4th lord (vide “b” above), prayers to Saturn God
should be offered. Donation of an iron image of
Saturn will bring forth health and happiness and
ensure longevity.

(@ The sub periods of Rahu and Jupiter (in the
first dasa) has been described as above. The ruler
of the country will be much anguished(?)

(e) The subject will be afflicted by small-pox in
his 3rd, 4th or 6th year coinciding with a malefic’s
sub period, with the transit Sun in an adverse place,
or on his natal sign position and on a Thursday. To
eliminate such ablemish, necessary remedies should
be adopted.

4811. Venus- Saturn Conjunction: For Indra
Nadiamsa, Libra ascendant, the conjunction of
Venus and Saturn will ward off a thousand evils
(relating to life-span).

4812, Eye Troubles: The subject will be trou-
bled by eye problems in the first year of birth, or in
the sub period ruled by the owner of the 6th dasa
from birth. The relevant dasa will be the very first
one,

Notes: Suppose, one is born in the dasa of
Mars. Sadhaka dasa will be the 6th from that of
Mars, which works out to be the dasa of Ketu.
Hence, Ketu should be known as “Sadhanesa” or
6th dasa lord. Eye diseases in this case will be in
Ketu’s sub period in the Ist dasa, i.e. of Mars. If the
required sub-periodis already pastin the womb, the
child will suffer in the Ist year of age.

Similarly, “Sampat bhukti” means the bhukti
identical with the 2nd dasa. Hence “Sampat Bhukti”
of “Sampat Dasa” means the Ist sub period of 2nd
dasa, which for example occurs in sloka 4832 infra.

4813 - 4815. (a) Venus - Saturn in Leo: This
yoga will cause troubles to eyes in one’s childhood.
By donating the image of a Cobra, happiness
(concerning eyes) will prevail. Troubles could also
occur (on account of the said Yoga) to head, shanks
and heart.

(b) Facial Diseases: Rahu in the 2nd from
ascendant (i.e. in Scorpio) will cause unbearable
disease of the face in childhood. Donation of a
cobra’s image will cure facial diseases. Health of

seyes (as at “a” ) will prevail and there will be no
infantile mortality.

4816 - 4817'. (a) The Arudha Pada of the 9th
being occupied by Venus, Satu and Mercury
denotes birth in a prosperous family. The native
will enjoy pleasures.

(b) Venus in Indra Nadiamsa will cause two
wives for a Libra native. His older brother will
have two sickly wives. He will have two sisters
both of whom will be in grief in between. The two
## Page 225

sisters will have long-living husbands and daugh-
ters.

the conjunction of Venus, Saturn and Mercury
which applies to Libra ascendant.

4818 - 4825. (a) Venusin the subject Nadiamsa
in the company of Saturn denotes happiness to a
sister who will be handsome and will have an
adopted son.

(b) For a native of Indra: Nadiamsa, Libra
ascendant, the 3 planets, viz. Venus, Saturn’and
Mercury joining in the 9th, causing Indra Yoga will
give two conveyances. The person will be passion-
ate, wealthy, famous and happy. These effects will
occur in the later half of the Dasa of Indra Yoga (i.e.
the dasa of one of the 3 planets).

(e) Jupiter’s Bhukti: The sub period of Jupiter
in the dasa ruled by the Moon’s dispositor will
endanger one’s father following which prosperity
of the native will occur. The said danger (during
Jupiter’s sub period) will come to pass at a time
when Venus or Mars is combust. Distress (danger
to father) will (alternatively) occur with Mercury's
transit in Taurus or Gemini, or when Mercury is
conjunct or aspect to Mars. Anguish will be
experienced by the subject in the form of physical
illness, mental distress and head-aches with ad-
verse solar transits when Mars or Venusis combust.

4828 - 4830. Deha & Jeeva Signs: (a) If the
Moon is in her sign of debility with Capricom
Navamsa, the sign Gemini is Jeeva Rasi while
Taurusis DehaRasi. When amalefic planet comes
to the Deha Rasi in transit, it will be a period of
physical illness. Trouble to life-span will occur
withamaleficmoving in JeevaRasi. Both transited
by malefics will cause a great calamity.

(b) Mars moving in Jeeva Rasi, during the Ist
year of birth will produce indigestion, ulcerandeye
troubles to some extent.

Notes: (a) The position of the Moon is in
Jyeshta 2nd quarter forming part of Mrigasira
group, Apa Savya Nakshatra, as per Kala Chakra
Dasa scheme. Then the Jeeva and Deha signs will
be as mentioned above.

4831 - 4833. According to Indra: (a) The dasa
of Mercury (Vimsottari) who at birth is in the sign
Pisces will cause prosperity and fame to one of
Indra Nadiamsa, Libra ascendant.
(b) The Ist dasa will bring forth happiness to
father. The 2nd year will produce auspiciousness.
(©) Second Dasa: Marriage of the native will
occur in this dasa, His elder brother will acquire
wealth. The first sub period of this dasa will cause
illness to the native, apart from loss of quadrupeds
and omaments for the family. The paternal uncle
will see his son under a spell of evils, due to loss of
spouse to his utter grief.

4834 - 4838. (a) Ketu in the 8th both from natal

ascendant and Navamsa ascendant will produce,

fear from thieves to some extent during Ketu dasa,
Ketu’s sub period.

(b) Rahu in the 2nd will destroy one’s wealth
due to enmity with relatives in Rahu dasa, Rahu’s
sub period. Happiness (i.e. recovery of financial
losses) will occur after some interval.

(©) The 2nd dasa’s 2nd sub period will cause
illness but some prosperity to one of the sons of
paternal uncle. Another son will lose his spouse,
will be distressed due to troubles to mother and loss
of an important relative. As for the native, he will
see his own brother in the grip of evils, during the
firsthalf of the 2nd dasa. Happiness will existin the
2nd half of the said dasa and the older brother will
obtain a progeny.

4839 - 4841. Underground Treasure: (a)
Venus in the 11th will help the native locate
underground wealth in the 3rd or 4th dasa.

(b) Venus in the 11th (Leo) in aspect to Saturn
and avoiding debilitation Navamsa as well as the
Sun’s company (i.e. not being combust) will also
lead to Knowledge of underground treasure. Fur-
ther, the subject will be greatly prosperous and will
have illicit ties with others’ wives.

(© Venus in the 11th, with a Navamsa of
Mercury, will give livelihood through business
activities. A Soodra will attain fame as well as
abundant business gains.

account of the ruler and thieves. These effects will
occur also in Rahu’s sub period of the 2nd dasa in
case Venusis Indra Nadiamsa. Jupiter’ ssub period
will cause a mix of good and bad results.

Jupiter in various dasas will produce physical
ailments. With evil transits of the Sun, distress and

periods of Ketu and Venus will be a source of

will cause a great danger and fear of fever. So also

4850 - 4852. Rahu in 2nd: (a) Should Rahu be

in the 2nd (Scorpio) in Vargottama Navamsa, the

subject will be given to enjoy pleasures. He will

incur diseases in childhood. In the middle of his
life, he will enjoy a great deal of prosperity. Old
age will place him in debts and he will, to some
exjent, steal others’ wealth. He will be attached to
his race, be famous among his family members and
will suffer from physical illnesses. He will be
honoured by the king of kings, be revered by
scholars and will earn fame.

(b) If the said Rahu is not in Vargottama, the
native’ son will be in the grip of debts. Vargottama
position will be auspicious.

(©) Rahu conjunct a benefic (in Scorpio) will
lead to fame.

4853 - 4863¥2. (a) General: The sub period of
a planet that is an adversary to the lord of the
ascendant will in the various dasas cause much
anguish in one’s undertakings. The sub period
ruled by frierfdly planet will lead to acquisition of
## Page 228

Chandra Kala Nadi 213

wealth. A planet that is neutral to the ruler of the
ascendant will only produce such effects which are
just neutral. The sub period of a planet which is a
temporary friend to the lord of the ascendant will
give exceedingly auspiciousresults in various dasas.
A planet that is conjunct a benefic will in its sub
period prove auspicious.

(b) For a native of Indra Nadiamsa, Libra
ascendant, the dasa of the lord of the ascendant will
give happiness. Exceedingly auspicious effects
will occurin the dasa of the 9th lord. The end of the
8th lord’s dasa (i.e. Venus dasa) will produce evil
effects concerning one’s mother.

(c) The sub periods as well as sub-sub periods
of the Moon in various dasas will cause fear from
poison and thieves to the family members.

(@) The sub period of Mars will cause physical
ailments except when the Sun is in strong’ (or
favourable) transits. Distress to father to be fol-
lowed by happiness (or recovery) will also form
part of the adverse effects.

(©) The dasa of the 11th lord (Sun) and the sub
period of the 10th lord (Moon) will cause anguish
and expenditure crossing one’s income. This will
bedue to blemished Rahu. The said dasa will cause
troubles to brotherand other family members. End
of the Sun’s dasa will result in distress. Its junction
(with the Moon’ s dasa) will, to some extent, cause
distress.

(O The dasa of the Moon will cause uninter-
rupted happiness due to prosperity of one’s son.

(g) Saturn moving in the sign caused by the
Navamsa occupied by the 6th lord (Jupiter) or a
trine thereof will lead to anguish to co-born and
grief torelatives. With the help of sub periods, the
dasas ruled by the lords of the 10th and 11th be
estimated in detail.

illness to wife etc. In this dasa, the sub period of the
planet placed in the 2nd (Scorpio) will lead to the -
native’s timely end.

(b) The 6th dasa will lead to great calamity.

(©) Venus in Indra Nadiamsa will cause an
excellentre-birth. The native’s death will occur in
the month of Chaitra. Effects reproduced from

(@) The subject will achieve great prosperity
after the age of 20. His total life-span will be 63.

ourable and be valorous (i.e. arrogant) because of

4874 - 4888. (a) Saturn - Ketu Yoga: Should
Ketu be with Satu in a movable sign, the Yoga
would cause the following effects in respect of
one’s father. He would have a very thin body due
to anguish in the native’s childhood. He would not
have any younger co-born. His older ones would

Deva Keralam

also incur destruction. His prosperity would be in,
a foreign land. He would have two sisters, two
wives, be passionate and will have a windy phy-
sique. He would become wealthy due to his own
efforts, possess conveyances, incur much enmity
with Vaishnavitesand asa consequence would face
troubles with the king.

(b) If Saturn and Ketu join in one and the same
Navamsa and are in the company of Venus (in Rasi
chart), the native’s father would dislike
Viashnavites. As a result, he would face distress,
and will lose villages, lands and wealth. Prior to the
native’s birth, or in the first dasa of the native,
father would incur the said losses. For a period of
2% years, father would be anguished.

(© Saturn in the 3rd in Navamsa will cause
anguish for 4 years after which father’s prosperity
will increase. The end of the native’s Ist dasa
would cause prosperity to father.

(@ Satur in Cancer in the Sth would cause
distress to the father of the native of Pisces ascend-
ant, Seetala Nadiamsa. He would suffer from fever
with cold fits and from dysentery. The native’s first
dasa will cause mental worries and various kinds of
anguish to father. His co-born would not survive.
He would be troubled by small-pox. Due to his
position in the sign owned by the Moon (ie.
Cancer), Saturn will acquire the blemish of causing.
fever (i.e. the above health problems) for which
remedies be sought. Donation of a vessel filled
with sesamum seeds will cause health etc. to father.
Donation of an image of Goddess Lakshmi will
cause him wealth at a later phase. He would incur
auspicious effects in the royal circle and will
destroy his enemies.

(© Another Authority: Donation of an image
of Lakshmi and sight of one’s face in ghee in a
golden vessel will cause prosperity to father later
on, and will cause him happiness. The Mantra
given in sloka 4886 should be recited by father.
Brass vessel filled with ghee weighing one“Adhaka”
along with a gold coin should be gifted away to the
astrologer whereupon health and destruction of
poverty will occur, and will father turn wealthy.

Notes: The results mentioned from “a” to “e”
above apply to father of Pisces native.

(©) “Kanakaajya Nirikshanam” strictly means
## Page 230

Chandra Kala Nadi 215

seeing gold and ghee which makes no sense. Hence
ithas been interpreted as “vessel filled with ghee”.
Donation of such a vessel is also discussed in the
ensuing slokas.

“Aajya Nirikshanam’ is a classical remedy in
the context of which father sees the face of his
inauspicious baby in a ghee-filled vessel for the
first time. This is done at the end of the prescribed
Vedic ritual for birth of a child, for example, in
Mula Nakshatra.

Prastha = 1/4th of an Adhaka or 32 Palas;
Prastha Chatushtaya = 1 Adhaka (128 Palas) - an
ancient measurement.

4889 - 4890. Venus in Cancer: Seen from
Pisces ascendant, if Venus is found in Cancer with
two malefics, donation of ghee in a golden vessel
will bring forth wealth to the family. After the Sth
year of the native, prosperity will occur and his
father will endlessly be happy. The 4th year will
give him some happiness while the Sth year will
record mixed trends.

4891 - 489674. (a) Irrelevant: The first year of
birth will cause calamity to people of the country.

(b) Saturn (in Cancer) will cause prosperity in
the 2nd dasa,in case of Pisces ascendant, Seetala

Nadiamsa. The middle part will cause anguish
through kings and ministers in a special manner.
He will face fear of untimely danger during the last
one third part of the said dasa and will lose his father
after which he will experience happiness. End of
the native’ s first dasa will cause happiness to father
apart from acquisition of wealth. He would beget
step-brother’s wealth,

(b) Libra Navamsa: Saturn in Cancer with
Libra Navamsa will deny happiness to father till he
crosses in transit the sign denoted by the Navamsa
of the natal ascendant. In the end of Leo and in
Virgo, he will grant some happiness to father, but
the native’s paternal grand-father will die in the
end of the first dasa.

(© Satur and Venus in the Sth from the
ascendant Pisces will cause prosperity to father in
a foreign land.

(@ Saturn transiting in Virgo will cause wealth
to father in the native’s first dasa.

Notes: Results mentioned above also apply to
father of the native.

(b) “Sapitu” should read as “Svapituh” and
“Bhagya Janma dasa” as “Janma Dasa” only.

4897 - 4903. (a) When Saturn moves in Virgo,
Jupiter found in Gemini will cause thread cer-
emony to the native of Pisces ascendant in his 2nd
dasa.
(b) His marriage will occur with Saturn moving
in the ascendant while Jupiter is in end of Aries or
## Page 231

216 Deva Keralam

in Taurus.

(©) Jupiter's transit in Aries during the Ist dasa
will cause happiness to father. Progeny will be
bom toa step-brother. In Pisces, Jupiter will cause
evils to one’s elder sister.

(@ Satur (in Cancer) will destroy younger co-
bom in case of birth in Seetala Nadiamsa, Pisces
ascendant. The native's step-sister’s husband will
enter in royal service. His 2nd dasa will give great
fortunes. His step-sister will achieve happiness.
Her husband will prosper but he may face the
possibility of losing his father.

Notes: (b) “Janma Daye Janma Bhratru
Gochare” however disallows a meaningful inter-
pretation of this part of instructions.

4904- 4906. (a) The native will enjoy happi-
ness on account of his step-brother (and) father.

(b) For a native of Seetala Nadiamsa, Pisces
ascendant, Saturn in Cancer and the Moon in Maha
Maya Nadiamsa will give the following effects. He
wilbhave two long-living sisters and be respected
by is 3 brothers. His step-brother will be endowed
with longevity, will have two sisters, will marry a
barren female and will beget progeny after delay.
The native’ selder sister’s husband will beget wealth
in 3rd dasa. He will be happy in the last part of 2nd
dasa through brother-in-law.

Notes: (b) Maha Bhagyamsa should read as
Maha Maya Nadiamsa which is again a misnomer
for Mahamari Nadiamsa. “Sasi” in sloka 4904
should read ac “Sani”, a repetition for “Manda”.
Thus the condition is the involvement of Saturn
only, to the exclusion of the Moon, The aphorism
now will be: Satum in Mahamari Nadiamsa in
Cancer will give the said effects to one born in
Pisces Nadiamsa.

Also see sloka 4907 infra.

Seetala Nadiamsa could be found in the notes

under sloka 1096, page 99, Book 1, while Maha
Maya (rightly Mahamari) Nadiamsa could be lo-
cated in the under sloka 1133, page 102, Book 1.

troubles from cholera during the childhood. His
cobomn will be destroyed. His maternal grand-
mother will be long-lived. He will have two

4909 - 4913. Transits: (a) When Saturn tran-
sits the sign represented by the Navamsa occupied
by the lord of the ascendant (Jupiter) or a trine
thereof, one’s maternal uncle will face evils and
maternal grand-mother will be mentally distressed.
(b) In the 2nd dasa, Saturn moving in Sagitta-
rius with Libra Navamsa will cause the death of
maternal grand-mother and as a consequence (the
other) maternal uncle will have a change of place.
(c) Inthe Ist dasa, Saturn moving in Virgo will
give a son to his maternal uncle. So also, his step-
## Page 232

Chandra Kala Nadi 217

sister will beget a long-living son.

(@) Jupiterin Ariesand Rabuin Libra will cause
prosperity and exceedingly auspicious effects
through the king, to the native’s father during Ist,
dasa.

(©) Satum’s Ist round of transit on the natal
Moon sign will give abundant happiness and Raja
Yoga effects (prosperity) to one’s father. If it
happens to be Libra, these effects will multiply.

(® When the Sun-occupied Navamsa or its
trine is in transit by Saturn, one;s father will face
much anguish through his friends. In the dasaof the
Sun, the said transit will kill one’s father. Elder
brother andkinsfolk willalso incursome evils. End
of the dasa will cause distress toa paternal uncle on
account of his offspring.

4921 - 4928. (a) Satumn’s journey in the sign
denoted by the Navamsa occupied by the Sun or a
trine there of will cause physical illness to father.
He will be in anguish with evil transits of the Sun.
For this position of Saturn, malefic signs should be
decided. Cancer, Leo, scorpio, Pisces, Aquarius
and Capricom transited by the Sun are the evil
months according to leaned astrologers for the
subject Nadiamsa.

(b) The nodes and Saturn in the said evil signs
will cause evils to one’ skinsfolk. When Satu and
the Sun transit in the said signs, father and others
will be anguished.

(©) The sub periods ruled by malefics in the
various dasas will cause physical illness to father,
and evils to one’s own men.

(@) Saturn moving in Aries will cause happi-
ness and prosperity to father. This will be in the
dasa of a benefic planet.

(e) 4th dasa will cause Raja Yoga effects. The
period after 24th year will bring forth prosperity for
the native.

4931 - 4936. (a) Rahu Dasa: The sub periods
of Saturn and Ketu in the dasa of Rahu will give the
said results. At the time of prosperity, one will be
troubled by physical illness. The sub period of the
Sun will promote fear of untimely death, apart from
causing a great danger, at the time of prosperity,
due to disorders of lungs. To overcome this
blemish, remedies should be undertaken.

(b) Saturn's sub period in the 4th dasa will
cause destruction of friends and the ruler due to
fever(?) After a change of the king, the native will
be happy.

(c) Incase of Seetala Nadiamsa, Pisces ascend-
ant, the Moon should at birth be in Virgo. As a
result, the middle one-third portion of Rahu’s dasa
will give effects of Raja Yoga. One will construct
a colony for Brahmins (i.e. will do some public
service) and will be at the services of the ruler.
However, this dasa will cause him (health) troubles
due to betraying friends. Later on, he will enjoy
sound health. The end of the dasa will promote
anguish.

will cause danger to mother, when Saturn moves in
the end of Scorpio or in Sagittarius in a trine to his
natal Navamsa position.

4939 - 4941. Danger to Spouse: (a) Satu
journeying in the sign identical with the Navamsa
occupied by the 2nd lord (Mars), or atrine thereof,
orin a sign aspected by Mars, will kill the native’s
wife (in the 4th dasa).

(b) When the 4th dasa is in operation, Saturn's
sojourn in Leo will (alternatively) kill one’s spouse.
While in Gemini, Saturn will cause anguish to her
destroying the members of her family. Her death
will occur when Satur is in adverse signs with
simultaneously adverse solar movements.

will give a number of female issues and two male
issues. Two daughters will have worthy progeny
out of whom two sons will be long-lived.

4946- 4950. (a) Saturn moving in Scorpio with
Libra Navamsa will produce evils to one’s younger
brother etc.

(®) The effects mentioned in sloka 4945 can
also occur in the dasa of 10th lord and in the sub
period of 8th lord when Saturn moves in Sagittarius
in the 36th year. The person will incur a lot of grief
due to loss of step-brother whose wife will also give
up her life on the pyre of her husband. Thus have
been declared the effects for the dasa of the 10th
lord. In this dasa his king will also be endan-
gered(?)

Notes: The Istline of 4946 and that of 4948 are
identical. The 2nd liné of sloka 4949 is also a
repetition with partial change of Istline unless and
until it relates to full brother and his spouse.

4951 - 4956, (a) Irrelevant: The 4th and 5th
dasas will destroy the king. Due to killing of many
women, the prince will fall sick.

(b) 10th Lord’s Dasa: The dasa of Jupiter will
bless the subject with much fortunes. Children in
the in-laws’ family of younger brother will incur
illness.

(©) Life-tong Fortunes: Satur and Venus
joining in the 1 1th house from the Arudha (i.e. from
the Arudha ascendant) will cause fortunes through-
out life. But the native will be injured in a month
when the Sun in transit is about to promote one’s
prosperity.

(@) Prosperity will come to pass in the begin-
ning and 2nd half of the 4th dasa. The Sth dasa will
be an auspicious one. The Ist sub period of the 6th
dasa will entangle one in untimely death. To
overcome this danger, remedial measures should
be sought. By donating an image of the zodiac,
health will be sound.

(©) Death: According to sage Bhargava, death
of the subject (Pisces ascendant, Seetala Nadi-
amsa) will occur in his 56th year. Timely remedies
will ward offuntimely death (which isalso possible
at 56).

4957 - 4958, The dasa of Saturn's dispositor
will cause the death when the Sun moves in Virgo
orits trine. 66 years will be his full life-span. 48th
and 56th years will cause anguish (of untimely
death).

4959 - 4964. (a) The junctions of various dasas
will cause much anguish, Chandra Nadi in its
chapter on Raja Yogas has stated a host of effects
for Seetala Nadiamsa (Pisces ascendant).

(b) The native will goto the Heavensif the 12th
lord (Saturn) is in Libra Navamsa, while Jupiter is
in Sagittarius with own Navamsa. His father will
reach the reign of Brahma if Saturn is in the
‘company of Venus (lord of the 12th counted from
the 9th) in case of birth in Seetala Nadiamsa.

(©) Jupiter in own Navamsa will cause a Raja
Yoga. The subject will be one of the twins. After
death, he will go to heavens and will have an
excellent rebirth if Saturn 9th 12th lord) is in the
company of an exalted planet.

(d) Joining Venus, Saturn will keep one’s sins
and meritorious deeds in an equal measure.

(e) As per Vriddha Parasara Hora, Saturn.
ing Venus will cause a liking for saints. One will
perform penance and will reach the heavens after
discarding his mortal coil.

4965 - 4976. Effects of Saturn in Aries in
Kokila Nadiamsa for Sagittarius Ascendant: (a)
Satum in Ariesas above will deprive one of younger
brothers. His older brothers will also be destroyed.
‘The native will be lonely (i.e.only issue) but en-
dowed with sonsand friends. He will be emaciated
due to childhood anguishes. His father will be
sickly and the native will live under others’ shelter.
He will be happy through his relatives and after
marriage. In his 22nd or 20th year, he will lose his
father. Later on, he will be deprived of his mother
as well. After 30, he will enjoy happiness.

(b) Locate Saturn placed in Aries in Kokila
Nadiamsa, as Jupiter is in Vargottama in Sagitta-
rius. This combination will bea source of comfort
able living by trading in cotton,

(©) The Moon and Rahu in the ascendant will
cause foolishness and irascible temper. One will
receive happiness after 27. His marriage will take
place in his 3rd dasa. His prosperity will follow the
birth of a son. End of 4th dasa will cause distress.
The Sth, dasa will give wealth to the native and
marriage to his son. The native will die in the Ist
sub period of the 6th dasa (or his) death will be in
the sub period of Ketu (in the 6th dasa). The Sun
in transit will then be in Aries or its trine.

(@) One will turn physically indolent (i.e. pos-
sibly disabled) when Saturn comes into the sign
## Page 236

Chandra Kala Nadi 221

represented by the Navamsa occupied by the 8th
lord (Moon) or a trine thereof.

(e) Saturn in Kokila Nadiamsa (in Aries, the
Sth) denotes that the person would have been a
Soodra in the last birth. The current and next births
will also be that of a Soodra. In the current birth,
he will be endowed with sons and daughters and
will receive happiness after the age of 30. He will
enjoy a good living throughout his life. He will
earn two hundred (gold coins) in his business
activities.

(®) Guru Nadi describes the effects in detail
(concerning the captioned subject).

Notes: For Kokila Nadiamsa, please see notes
under sloka 1194, Page 107, Book 1.

4977 - 4981. Sagittarius Ascendant: Saturnin
Scorpio in Ghaata Nadiamsa will destroy one’s
father in childhood and deprive him of after-born,
He will lose his older brother in the middle of his
life and will be grieved. He will have two long-
lived sisters. One of them will be blessed with
progeny and be handsome. The person will be
happy through the ruler of Andhraregion. Later on
he will live in forest regions and will serve a mean
king. He will have two wives and virtuous sons.
His birth will be in Amala Yoga. He will beget
conveyances through Madhvas (followers of
Madhvacharya) and Vaidikas (followers of Vedic
codes). In the 4th dasa, he will be greatly happy. In
the middle one-third part of the said dasa, wealth
will accrue tao him. The 2nd half of the said dasa

will give conveyances and gain of lordship over
villages.

Notes: The present slokas, from 4977 through
5056 have been attributed to Sani Nadi by the
original. Satumn’s position in “Ghaata” Nadiamsa
often appears but not in every case. The ascendant
referred to is Sagittarius. Twelve slokas discussing
“Dhaata” (instead of “Ghaata) Nadiamsa, vide
Book 1, pp. 109 - 110 also form part of the present
set though with some slight modifications. Bot
these Nadiamsas are not traceable in the list.

native of Sagittarius ascendant, Saturn in Davagni
Shashtiamsa will cause a windy physique. The
subject will have two wives, be honourable and
famous in royal circles.

4984 - 4989. (a) The Native: Satum in Scorpio
(12th) in the said Nadiamsa will cause aheavy body
anda high degree of intelligence. He will be foolish
(as well), be passionate and irascible but instantly
pleased. He will prosper after the age of 28, 40th
year will give him a conveyance. He will be
## Page 237

222 Deva Keralam

prosperous, famous and happy in the 42nd year. In
the 5th dasa, he will lose his wife. He will have
many friends and many children.

(b) Results for Brother: Asa result of Saturn
being placed in Scorpio as above, one’s older
brother will enjoy long life but will incur stomach
disorders in childhood. He will have many dead
children.

(c) The native will have two sisters, step-
brother, be honourable and devoted to serve his
father. He will face obstacles in education, will
have paternal wealth. He will obtain daughters
through his first wife, in his early days as well asin
his old age. In his 6th dasa, a long-living son will
be born. He will enjoy fortunes on account of his
sonsafter his 52nd year of age and be greatly happy.

4990 - 4996, (a) Transit of Saturn: In the 2nd
round of transit, Saturn in the end of Gemini will
cause grief to the subject. His journey in 3 signs
(from Gemini through Leo) will cause enmity with
Vaishnavites. While in Virgo, Saturn will give
wealth.

(b) Rahu Dasa: His Rahu dasa will cause much
prosperity. If Rahu is in the 9th, his sub period in
his own dasa will produce much distress. The sub
periods of Jupiter and Saturn will cause much
happiness (in Rabu dasa).

(©) Mars Dasa: Should the lord of the 8th
(Moon) be in the ascendant (Sagittarius) with Aries

Navamsa, the dasa of Mars will be a source of
anguish. Its 2nd half will cause great calamity. Due
to the blemish of Navamsa position of the 8th lord,
the endof Mars dasa will cause.a Yoga (prosperity).

(@) Rabu in 9th: Rahu in Leo with Sagittarius
Navamsa will cause much prosperity in the sub
period of Jupiter in Rahu dasa. The Moon in a sign
and Navamsa of Venus while Saturn is in the 10th
with Sagittarius Navamsa, the sub period of Jupiter
will produce wealth.

(€) The initial and concluding portions of the
Sth dasa, and the 6th dasa’s first sub period will
cause distress and troubles in royal circles.

Notes: (c) It is not understood why the term
“blemish” is used in the context of giving Yoga.
However, prosperity seems to occur in Mars dasa
because of his lordship over the Navamsa position
of the Moon.

(@ Saturn in 10th (Virgo) cannot be in Sagitta-
rius Navamsa.

4997 - 5001. (a) With the Sun in Sagittarius
Navamsa as Saturn is in Ghaata Nadiamsa, much
anguish will prevail after 50.

(b) Saturn's blemish of being in Ghaata Nadi-
amsa will cause increase of enmity and anguish for
a period of 7 years from the age of 46.

(©) If Satur is in Suprabha Nadiamsa, happi-
ness will occur after the age of 52. Prosperity will
increase during the stay of Saturn in Virgo in his
2nd round of transit. Enemies will be destroyed
with Saturn’s moving in the end of Leo or in the
sign Virgo. When Saturn retrogrades (in these
signs), foes will vanish. Fortunes will occur in a
different country and wealth through kinsfolk. He
## Page 238

Chandra Kala Nadi 223

will enjoy prosperity and fame with the favours of
an emperor.

Notes: (c) For Suprabha Nadiamsa, please see
notes under sloka 2002, page 180, Book 1.

5002-5004. Dasa of Venus: Venusin Virgo in
Sobhana Nadiamsa and with Pisces Navamsa will
in his Dasa cause much happiness through he king
of Andhraregion. Happiness will also prevail at the
age of 35 if Venus and Jupiter are in the same
Nadiamsa. This Yoga (of happiness) will recur in
the sub period of Jupiter (in the dasa of Venus). The
sub period of Saturn will cause special (i.e. notable)
prosperity. The beginning and end of Jupiter's sub
period will cause much happiness.

Notes: Sobhana Nadiamsa isa redundantterm.
Only the Navamsa position of Venus is relevant.

5005 - 5010. (a) Saturn in Davagni Shashtiamsa
will cause anguish and distress after the age of 68
due to increase of enemies. Intermittently, the
person will incur some physical illness and mental
distress. Children born particularly to his son will
be destroyed.

(b) 6th Dasa: Satur joining the Sth lord (Mars)
in one and the same Nadiamsa will cause auspi-

cious effects in the dasa which is the 6th from birth
(in respect of progeny); he (i.e. the native’s son)
will obtain children through another wife, in the 1st
sub period thereof. Jupiter’s sub period will cause
loss of progeny, loss of quadrupeds and grains.
Rahu’s sub period will be a source of great danger.

(©) Rahu Dasa: The dasa of Rahu whoisplaced
in the 9th (Leo) will cause a pilgrimage to Setu in
his sub period. In the Sth dasa, one born in Amala
‘Yoga will undertake visits to shrines, will provide
food to the poor, will enjoy pleasures, be fond of
saints, be truthful and will patronize friends and
relatives.

the Moon is in Aquarius with Suprabha Nadiamsa,
while Satum is in Sagittarius Navamsa.

“Suprabha Nadiamsa”.

5012 -5014. One belonging to Sagittarius as-
cendant, Suprabha Nadiamsa, as Venus is in the
2nd, will obtain much wealth and robes in the Sth
dasa. He will lose his wealth in completing assign-
ments to help the king. To some extent he will
deceive his friends in Saturn’s dasa. As aresult of
this misdeed, his 5th dasa’s end will cause anguish.
The Ist sub period of 6th dasa will cause loss of
wealth,

Notes: “Dhanesa + Arudhage” is a defective
expression which means Venus should be in the
Arudha Pada of the 2nd lord. Apparently, the text
should read as “Dhanarudhage Sukre”. Similarly,
“Dhana dayage” in sloka 5013 is nota proper term.
It should read as “Dhandhipati Dayage” denoting
the dasa of 2nd lord, Saturn.

5015 - 5022. (a) The 11th lord in Sobhana
Nadiamsa ... in Ghaata Nadiamsa ... in the 2nd
dasa. (he text is incoherent and incomplete.)

(b) The dasa of Rahu in the 9th will produce
increase of prosperity.

(©) 6th Dasa: Venus in Sobhana Nadiamsa will
contribute to wealth and happiness in the sub
periods of the lord of ascendant and 2nd. Further,
uninterrupted happiness will prevail due to auspi-
cious functions in the family including marriage.
The subject will earn royal favours. He will also be
responsible for his friends acquiring wealth. Aus-
picious effects through royal association, and ac-
quisition of quadrupeds and wealth for the family
will also come to pass. His older brother will beget
conveyances. The sub period of the 2nd lord
(Saturn) in the 6th dasa will cause auspicious
effects. Due to Saturn's position in Ghaata Nadi-
amsa, the subject will incur obstacles in undertak-
ings ordered by he king. At the time of prosperity,
he will face distress and to some extent financial
losses. But he will be happy due to birth of
offspring. Auspicious effects will occur to his
friends. He will be anguished due to friends
residing ina different island (i.e. a foreign land). In
the sub period of Saturn, placed in the 12th in
Ghaata Nadiamsa, the native’s son will incur ill-
ness and inlaws’ family will be subjected to evils
with the Sun’s adverse movements.

5023 - 5032. (a) If Satur is placed in Davagni
‘Shashtiamsain the 12th, his transitin Capricorn, or
a trine thereof, will endanger the native;s father.

(b) Irrelevant: As a result of the said transit,
the people, king and minister of the country will
face troubles. Famine will spread. His enemies’
Kinsfolk will be destroyed. Afterwards, the subject
will prosper.

(©) Note Saturn being in Scorpio Navamsa in
case of a Sagittarius native. Saturn moving in
Cancer will cause much anguish. But in Scorpio
and Pisces, Saturn will denote less anguish.

(@) The Sth round of Jupiter's transit in the
initial portion of Aries will give uninterrupted
wealth.

(e) The 5th lord (Mars) in the 11th (Libra) with
the 9th lord (Sun) will cause abundant fortunes.

(O Venus should be in Sobhana Nadiamsa. As
aresult, the 6th dasa in combination with 10th lord
Mercury's sub period will help the person achieve
success in his undertakings. The said dasa’s Saturn
sub period will cause a severe disease at the time of
## Page 240

Chandra Kala Nadi 225

one’s prosperity when the Sun is in his adverse
movements. Suitable remedies will stall the dis-
ease.
(g) If Saturn is in Davagni Shashtiamsa (in
Scorpio) his sub period in the 6th dasa will perish
one’s kinsfolk. He will be himself a victim of
windy diseases to some extent. A child being bom
then will instantly die. The family will be busy with
auspicious functions like procreational ceremony
of his daughter. The sub period of Mercury will
cause wealth and offspring to his son. His daugh-
ter’s husband will prosper in the middle of the 6th
dasa and become wealthy. The native’s son will

especially prosper.

5033 - 5041%, (a) Rahu Dasa: In case of birth
in Sagittarius ascendant, Ghaata Nadiamsa, Ketu’s
sub period in Rabu’s dasa will cause abundant
financial gins which will be uninterrupted. The
native will also be happy. When Saturn transits
Scorpio, the said dasa will lead to evils. ‘These

should be remedied.
(b) Saturn’s 3rd round of transit (i.e. from the

beginning of 3rd round) will cause the following:
happiness from progeny, wealth and increase of
fortunes.

(©) Saturn journeying in the sign denoted by the
Navamsa occupied by the 8th lord (Moon) ora trine
thereof will cause fear of untimely death.

(@) The sub period of Venus in the 6th dasa will
be. source of great happiness. Due to his position
in Sobhana Nadiamsa, one will please the king.
Because of rulership of the 6th, Venus will to some
extent cause grief on account of daughter.

(©) The sub period of the Sun (in the 6th dasa)
will produce distress and physical illness.

(0) Other Sub-periods: Rahu dasa’s Moon
bhukti will be a source of anguish. The sub period
of Mars-will cause happiness due to the progress
achieved by his son. The end of the dasa will
destroy the country. The native’s son will obtain
powerful employment under anew king. Fortunes
and continual wealth will exist except in the peri-
ods ruled by adverse transits of the Sun. To ward
off the blemish of (untimely) end of mortal jour-
ney, remedies should be sought (during the conclu-
sion of Rabu dasa).

5042 - 5051%4. Death: (a) The Moon in
Suprabha Nadiamsaand Saturn in Scorpioin Ghaata
Nadiamsa will cause unavoidable death of the
person when Saturn transits the sign Pisces.

(b) In the dasa of the 8th lord (Moon) and in the
sub period of Saturn placed in Ghaata Nadiamsa,
death will occur following the age of 72, in bright
lunar half, with the transit Sun in Sagittarius or
Pisces or in the Sun’s southern course. The lunar
day concerned will be one of Nanda or Rikta.

(c) Mercury in Aquarius Navamsa, Rahu in the
9th (Leo) and Saturn in Scorpio’s Ghaata Nadi-
amsa will cause ascetism following a calamity.

(@ Satur in Scorpio Navamsa at birth will
usher death during his movements in Sagittarius.

(€) One will enjoy health and fortunes with
(Venus) in Sobhana Nadiamsa.

(®) The person’s life-span will be71 if the Moon
and Saturn are respectively in Suprabhaand Ghaata
Nadiamsas. He will not die in times of indication
of untimely death. The Moon in Suprabha N:
amsa will bless one with longevity. Saturn’s transit
in Sagittarius will be a source of his death..

(g) When Satur transits the sign equal to the
Navamsa position of the 8th lord (Moon), it will
cause danger in he 8th lord’s dasa.

(b) Saturn placed in the 12th will cause grief
due to progeny in old age. This will be in the
junction of dasa.

Notes: (b) Sloka 5044 contains confusion re-
garding Sun’s transit using an incorrect term like
“Chaapa + Ayana”.

5052 - 5056. (a) One’s life-span will be 71
whereas Jupiter is in his deep exaltation, Venus is’
in Sobhana Nadiamsa, and Saturn is in Ghaata
Nadiamsa.

(b)The 8th lord Moon in Isvara (i.e.
Paramesvara) Nadiamsa will take one to the reign
of Lord Brahma, after death.

(c) The Moon in Suprabha Nadiamsa will caue
attainment of heavens (Indra's abode). Because of
the "blemish" of being in Ghaata Nadiamsa, afte
death, he will go toheavens. (Indra yaatana sshould
read as Indraayatana meaning heavens.)

(d) Saturn in Scorpio will cause death on a
Monday in an auspicious fortnight.

(e) Venus in Sobhana Nadiamsa will cause
happiness through one’s son towards the end of life
apart from acquisition of wealth.

Effects as stated in Sani Nadi will bear truth as
reflected in Deva Keralam.

5057 - 5058. Aries ascendant - Achala Nadi-
amsa: (a) In case of birth in this segment of this
zodiac, if the Sun in a fixed sign (Taurus & C)
receives Saturn's aspect, birth will be in the ab-
sence of father being on the spot. If Rahu joins the
said Sun, the child’s father would be in a foreign
land.

(b) One born in this Nadiamsa will live in his
matemal grand-father’s home apart from taking
birth therein. At the time of birth, father would be
dwelling in a foreign country,

Notes: “Prabha” and “Vikata” Nadiamsas are
other names used to indicate “Achala Nadiamsa”
by the text. Thus wherever this Nadiamsa occurs;
it can be used for all movable (immovable as well
as dual) ascendants (as the case may be). In some,
versions, “Achala” is referred to as “Abala” Nadi-
amsa. For Prabha (or Achala) Nadiamsa, please
see notes under sloka 54, page 7, Book 1.

5059 - 5064. (a) The Sun in Leo along with
Rahu and begetting the aspect of a benefic denotes
birth in a town of a hilly region containing forests.
He will be either the 4th or the Sth issue of the
family, will have a number of sisters and be devoid
of older co-born.

(b) Venus placed in Aries, with Leo Navamsa,
denotes a Brahmin’s birth as the 4th issue of the
family.

(© Note the number of net (post-rectified)
Bindus obtained by the Sun in his own Ashtaka
Varga. The native’s birth will follow such number
of children, (Thatis, he will have somany older co-
born.)

@ The conjunction of the Sun with Rahu
denotes existence of brothers for the native’s fa-
ther.

(©) Birth in day time, with the Sun begetting the
aspect of Saturn or Jupiter and being placed in
Aquarius Navamsa, will bea source of longevity to
parents. His father would not be a skilful person,
would have brothers and sisters, be indolent and
bereft of learning and happiness.

5065 - 50787. (a) The Sun placedin the subject
Nadiamsa with the aspect of Jupiter will bless one
with all kinds of fortunes. Further he will be lustful,
munificent and happy.

(b) Should the Sun join Rahu and earn Saturn's
aspect, paternal grand-mother would be devoid of
good qualities (i.e. of aquestionable nature). There
would be some blemish (i.e. women of disrepute
would exist) in the father’s family. The mother’s
family would be devoid of any such blemish.

(©) Birthin the Ist half of the subject Nadiamsa,
while the lord of the ascendant (which is amovable
sign) is conjunct Saturn, with Jupiter’s aspect,
denotes virtues (for the women) of mother’s fam-
ily.

(@) The said ascendant lord with Rahu causes.
virtues to paternal grand-mother.

(©) Jupiter in Pisces in aspect to Mars and with
Capricorn Navamsa indicates blemish in paternal
family. - Paternal grand-mother would reflect a
questionable character. So also sisters of the
person's father. Without doubt, the spouse of
## Page 243

228 Deva Keralam

father’s brother will be a questionable woman. The
native’s mother will be virtuous, pure in character
and be a chaste wife. She will be fortunate in
respect of her father and brothers, be somewhat
deprived of luck through husband but endowed
with some happiness thereof. She will have one
brother and one sister, be devoid of maternal
happiness, endowed with paternal happiness-and
will have a long-lived husband.

(f) Long-lived Father: It is stated that the
father of the native of Vikata (or Achala) Nadiamsa
will live long if Jupiter, ruling the house of father
(i.e. the 9th from Aries, a movable ascendant), is in
(joint) aspect to Saturn and Mars.

(g) Father: The 9th lord (Jupiter) in Vikata
Nadiamsa in aspect to Saturn (lord of 10th and
11th) and Mars (lord of the ascendant and 8th) will
cause poverty to the person’s father. Further, he
would live through women and be happy on ac-
count of maternal uncle. Paternal grand-mother’s
family would be endowed with prosperity which
will be a source of livelihood to father. :

(b) Jupiter’s position in the subject Nadiamsa
indicates that the wife of paternal grand-mother’s
brother, or paternal grand-mother herself, would
‘be corrupt and would abuse her husband. Effects
concerning paternal grand-mother will bear truth.

(i) Further, as a result of the said position of
Jupiter, the native will be libidinous and attached
to material pleasures. He will have two wives, be
passionate, endowed with many sons and much
fortunes. He will be indigent in childhood days and
be grieved on account of royal enmity. In between,
his fortunes will register an increase. Towards the
end of his life, he will enjoy happiness from his
sons.

5079 - 50824. (a) Foran Aries-born, the Sun in
Scorpio with Prabha Nadiamsa will deprive one’s
father of who will have no self-made wealth. The
native will be happy with his father’s fortunes and
wealth (whatever that be) and be endowed with
fortunes of giving charities. He will be somewhat
sickly, troubled by planetary evils, be grieved on
account of evil dreams and will live in a colony of
Brahmins. He will in the middle part of his life
prosper due to the strength of his co-born.

(b) Another authority mentions loss of brother
and anguish to sister to some extent.

(©) These (as per “a”) are as per sage Parasara.
According tome, (the author), destruction of brother
will come to pass (as at “b”).

5083 - 5085. Saturn in 6th: One will be
wealthy with Saturn in the 6th (in Virgo) and will
possess a body with windy temperament in pre-
dominance. He will be in the custody (i. at the
mercy) of his kinsfolk and will incur grief on
account of co-bom. He will have a long-lived
maternal uncle and a maternal aunt (i.e, mother’s
co-born). The said maternal aunt’s husband will
enjoy Raja Yoga effects, will have many sons and
be very prosperous. The native will have younger
brothers, be passionate and be happy on account of
father’s younger brother.

5086 - 5089. Saturn and Mars in the 6th (in
Virgo) will deprive one’s maternal uncle of prog-
## Page 244

Chandra Kala Nadi 29

eny. Else, the said uncle will obtain dead children
or will incur obstacles in begetting progeny. In the
native’s second dasa, the native’s father will be a
source of good fortunes to the native’s maternal
uncle. In the 1st sub period of 2nd dasa, the subject
will acquire conveyances. The middle part of the
dasa will prove auspicious. Happiness, auspicious
effects in royal circles and a prosperous employ-
‘ment will occur to maternal grand-father in the Ist
sub period of 2nd dasa of the native. Grief to
paternal grand-father and troubles and anguish to
kinsfolk will also come to pass. His father will be
somewhat distressed.

5090 - 5094. (a) The Moon in Sagittarius in
Kunda Nadiamsa along with Mercury and being in
aspect to Mars will cause a step-mother.

(b) Maternal Uncle: As a result of the above
Yoga, long life to maternal uncle and disorders of
spleen in childhood will come to pass. He will
prosper after marriage, be happy for some time and
be endowed with sons and friends. These effects
are for the maternal uncle.

(b) The Moon in Sagittarius in Kunda Nadi-
amsa in aspect to Mars will cause brothers to the
native of former half of Prabha Nadiamsa, Aries
ascendant. So also to his father. In case of birth in
second half of the subject Nadiamsa, the said Yoga
of the Moon would deny co-born to father. Chandra
Nadi narrates in detail the effects concerning co-

born.

5095 - 5097. (a) The number of long-living co-
born will equal the number of net Ashtaka Varga
bindus obtained by Mercury.

(b) The number of Ashtaka varga bindus ob-
tained by the Sun or the Navamsa passed by the Sun
would denote the number of father’s co-born.
Long-living co-born of father will equal the
Navamsas and rays obtained by the planet, Sun.
These are the effects of paternal uncles.

Notes: (a) The Sun’s position in Suprabha
Nadiamsa is mentioned in the 2nd line of sloka
5095 which cannot be properly connected either
with Mercury at “a” or to the Sun at “b”.

5098 - 5101. (a) The 11th lord Saturn in the 6th
(in Virgo) along with Mars and receiving Jupiter's
aspect will be a source of troubles from ulcers for
one’s older sister.

(b) Saturn in transit in the sign denoted by the
Navamsa occupied by 6th lord (Mercury) or 8th
lord (Saturn) or a trine thereof, will produce trou-
bles to one’s co-born.

(©) Satur in the 6th will cause yoga for obtain-
ment of older sister. But if he be bereft of a
benefic’s aspect, the said sister will be subjected to
anguish. Should Jupiter aspect the said Saturn,
sister will have a long-living husband but limited
number of issues. Sani Nadi mentions in detail the
effects relating to one’s sister.

5102 - 5110¥2. (a) Paternal grand-father will be

endangered when Saturn transits the sign identical .

with the Navamsa occupied by the 12th lord (Jupi-
ter), a trine thereof, or the sign that is aspected by
the 12th lord.

(b) In the 4th dasa, the native will find his son
in the grip of evils. In the 2nd dasa, evils to paternal
grand-father or paternal grand-mother will come to
pass with Saturn’s movements mentioned at “a”
above.

(c) Mental anguish will occur to maternal uncle
with Saturn’s transit in the sign identical with the
navamsa occupied by the 11th lord (i.e. Satum
himself) or a trine thereof. During this transit, the
Sun’s journey in an evil sign will cause great fear.

(@ With the Sun at birth in Prabha Nadiamsain
Scorpio (the 8th), Saturn’s journey in Virgo will
cause evils to co-born; in Sagittarius, Saturn will
ill the co-born.

(e) Jupiter in Prabha Nadiamsa will, in the 19th
or 20th year, endanger one’s parents. Some danger
will however come to pass in the 9th year.

(f) In the 2nd dasa, when Saturn journeys in the
‘sign identical with the Navamsa occupied by the
4th lord (Moon) oratrine, one’s father willbe much
anguished. Father will be endangered in the end of

the 3rd dasa, or in the Ist sub period of 4th dasa.
(g) Saturn’ s transit in Scorpio coinciding with
the 2nd dasa will endanger paternal grand-father
and will cause evils. If he survives, Saturn's
journey in Sagittarius will be decisively evil.
(b) Saturn’s movement in the Sun sign will be
an evil in respect of one’s father.

5111 - 5115. (a) The 3rd dasa will bring forth
much happiness and prosperity due to association
with step-brothers. The 4th dasa will cause em-
ployment.

(b) Saturn’s moving in the sign reflected by the
‘Navamsa of the 8th lord (Mars), or a trine thereof,
or the sign aspected by the 8th lord, will trouble
one’s close relatives.

(©) In Virgo, Saturn’ s transit will be a source of
trouble to the ruler. The native will be subjected to
illness, evils and abundant grief.

(d) The lord of the 9th (Jupiter) in Vikata
Nadiamsa in aspect to Saturn and Mars will cause
limited pleasures. The person will resort to evil
designs while in royal service. He will serve a
mean king with praises of unusual nature.

5116-5121. (a) With Jupiter's transitin Virgo,
or during his retrogression movement, the person
will have his thread ceremony and see his father in
happiness. He will be subjected to infantile mor-
tality to some extent, for which remedies will have
toberesortedto. His marriage will take place in his,
16th year or in the 14th year with a bride hailing
from his maternal uncle’s family. He will have a
number of male and female children.

(b) Jupiter in Pisces with Leo Navamsa will
cause no fear of infantile mortality to the native of
first half of the subject Nadiamsa, in Aries ascend-
ant. However, there will strike a great danger in the
4th year of birth, ‘The 7th, 8th or 11th month from
birth will to some extent cause troubles, on a
Trayodasi day (13th day of either fortnight), due to
indigestion. In the 2nd dasa, during the 2nd year,
his older brother will enjoy auspiciousness.

(©) The (beginning of the) dasa of the 4th lord
(Moon) or the end of the 5th lord (Sun) will
endanger the mother of the native.

5122 - 126. (a) The end of the dasa of Mars,
or the Ist sub period of Rahu dasa, will cause fear
of untimely death of the native, during his 45th
year. He will be threatened by delirium or danger-
us vitiation of the three bodily humours and will
die with the Sun journeying in Sagittarius.

(b) The Sun in Prabha Nadiamsa in Scorpio and
the Moon in Kunda Nadiamsa in Sagittarius will
cause the death of an Aries-born in the dasa ruled

by Rabu.
(c) Rahu or Ketu in the 8th in aspect to Saturn

will cause a great disease and a bad end. The end

of the dasa of Mars or the first sub period of Rahu

will kill him in the middle (i.e. untimely). If at all

he survives, 45 will be his maximum life-span.

5127 - 5130. Aquarius Ascendant - Mala
Nadiamsa: (a) One born in this part of the heavens
with the Sun in Libra will have a dark physique, be
highly intelligent and be valorous.

(b) The Sun in Libra along with Mercury and
obtaining Pisces Navamsa will make the subject as,
the Ist issue of the family. He will have a bluish
body with handsome appearance.

(©) The Sun in the 2nd (the sign Pisces), as-
pected by Saturn, and acquiring a Navamsa of
Jupiter will bless one with pleasures, learning and
intelligence.

(@) With Malika Yoga present, a benefic in the
2nd house, will help one to beget fame in royal
circles and bring forth the mercy of the rulerandhis
minister.

$131 - 5135. (a) The Sun in Libra with Pisces
## Page 247

232 Deva Keralam

Navamsa will cause brothers and sisters to the
native of Ghaata (or Maala) Nadiamsa, Aquarius
ascendant. he will further be intelligent, skilful,
eloquent, inwardly irascible and be proudin speech.

(b) The Sun in Libra will contribute to one’s
sinful deeds. He will be wealthy.

(©) One with Maala Nadiamsa, Aquarius as-
cendant, will have his birth in a remote village, in
a colony of Brahmins and in a dilapidated house.
The house concerned will be located in a street
spread from east to the west with an entry from the
south or north.

(d) Birth in the former half of the subject
Nadiamsa while the ascendant is aspected Mars
will be a source of much pains to the mother.

5136 - 5141. (a) The Moon in Sudha Nadiamsa
will cause long-living parents to one bomnin Malika
Yoga. His father will be grieved due to loss of aco-
bom. His paternal aunt will be fortunate, bedecked
with omaments, will shine like gold, be endowed
with daughters and husband and will live well for
a long time.

(b) In case of Malika Yoga commencing from
the Moon, if Jupiter aspects the Moon, the subject
will be blessed with kingly appearance. During his
childhood, he will be subjected to some evils. In
the sub period of the ascendant lord (Saturn) during
the currency of the first dasa, with the Sun's
adverse transits, indigestion and small-pox will
trouble the native.

() The Moon in Cancer with Pisces Navamsa

will in the sub period of Jupiter or Saturn in the first
dasa produce danger of infantile mortality.

(@) For a native of the subject Nadiamsa, the
3rd year in the first dasa will cause the same result
asabove when the Sunis in adverse an adverse sign.
For this, suitable remedy be adopted.

5142-5150¥s,(a) Satum placedin the 8th when
Malika Yogais formed willbe source of untimely
death in the beginning or end of the dasa of the 8th
lord (Mercury). Toeliminate such a danger, prayer
to the Satu God should be offered.

(b) Itwill be true that one will be in the grip of
fear of infantile mortality in the very first dasaif the
Moonis placed in the 6th, 8th or 12th sans Jupiter’s
aspect.

(©) The Moon in the 6th (Cancer) in Sudha
Nadiamsa with an aspect from Jupiter will not be a
source of infantile mortality. Yet prayer to the
Moon God, and worship of a silver image of the
‘Moon and donation of the same to an astrologer is
directed. As a result, the blemish will be crushed.

(@) Satur in the 8th in aspect to Jupiter and
## Page 248

Chandra Kala Nadi 233

begetting his own Navamsa will promote physical
felicity and happiness by prayer to Saturn God (and
will not be a blemnish for the life of the person).

(©) The Moon in his own Navamsa, when
Malika Yogais formed, will give longevity to one’s
parents,

() One bor in the junctions of Cancer (with
Leo), Scorpio (with Sagittarius) or Pisces (with
Aries) will invite (untimely) danger to his father
(read paternal uncle), if the 11th lord (Jupiter) is
subjected to Saturn’ s aspect. The discerning should
donatean image of golden horse. This act will ward
off the impending danger to the said paternal uncle.
Ifresorting to donation is shunned, paternal uncle
without doubt will pass through an evilsome phase.
Donation should be given after pacification cer-
emony of Nakshatra (concerned). Donation of a
horse made of gold worth a golden coin will cause
prosperity (of the uncle).

Notes: (f) Nakshatra Santhi means remedial
measures recommended for birth in last portions of
Cancer & C. That is for the Nakshatra Devatas of
Aslesha, Jyeshta or Revati as the case may be.

5151 - 5157. (a) If Venus is placed in the 11th
(Sagittarius) while his dispositor (Jupiter) begets
Satumn’s aspect, gifting of the image of a golden
horse will bring forth health and happiness to
paternal uncle. In the absence of this, the native’s

father, or someone equal to father will be destroyed
in the very first dasa.

(b) Birth in the subject Nadiamsa while the Sun
in Libra is conjunct the 8th lord (Mercury) will be
a source of a great disease to paternal uncle.
Suitable remedy should be tried in this regard. The
native’ father will possess sound and sturdy body,
be virtuous, happy, devoted to agriculture (or pro-
fession) and will always indulge in swindling the
village’s funds. After some interval, he will be
grieved on account of loss of a co-born in the
native’s 3rd dasa. The 2nd year of the 1st dasa will
involve the subject in a great danger. To some
extent, this can occur in an evil month in the 3rd
year. His father’s sister will be endowed with
wealth on account of her husband.

5162 - 5164. In case of birth in former half of
Mala Nadiamsa, Aquarius ascendant, Saturn in
Pisces and the Sun in Libra will cause troubles to
the ruler (?) and to paternal uncle in the first dasa.

This dasa will cause happiness to one’s father, kill
the minister (?) and cause prosperity to the spouse
of paternal aunt.

Notes: From the above slokas, after removing

the Sun in the 8th will cause happiness to father and

5165 - 5168Y4. (a) For one born in Mala Nadi-
amsa, the Sun in Libra and in Pisces Navamsa
denotes 7 brothers out of whom 2 will live long.
The rest will die early. 2 sisters with longevity will
also come to pass.

(b) The Sun in the 10th in association with
Rahu by aspect or conjunction will give fondness
for one’s brother. The subject will be intelligent
and justly disposed.

(©) If the Sun in the 10th occupies Capricom
Navamsa, one will be highly irritable.

(@) The Sun in the 10th with Jupiter’s aspect
will be a source of longevity. The subject will
patronize (honour) gods and Brahmins. His pros-
perity will pick up in the middle part of his life. He
will be devoted to Lords Vishnu and Siva.

(©) The 3rd dasa will cause great prosperity and
its second half wealth if the 2nd is occupied by a
benefic planet as Malika Yoga commences from
the 6th house.

Notes: (e) Malika yoga is required to com-
mence from the 6th house (“Shasta + Adi”) while
the 2nd is to be occupied by a benefic. Since only
7 planets can participate beginning the 6th house,
the Yoga will end with the 12th (Capricorn). In that
case there cannot be a benefic in the 2nd house.
Hence the text should read as “Sahsta + Adhipa”’

denoting the 6th lord Moon instead of the 6th
house, Cancer. Then there can be a benefic in the
2nd house, simultaneously completing Malika Yoga.

5169 - 5180. (a) Jupiter in Durdhara Nadi-
amsa and receiving the aspect of Saturn who is in
his own sign will cause much fame through one’s
relatives. He will make wealth through ason of his
father’s sister. His prosperity will rise after 20,
more so after 30.

(b) Jupiter in Durdhara Nadiamsa in the 4th
(Taurus) along with Ketu denotes knowledge in
three languages. He will be a skilful writer, will
achieve fame in royal circles, be fond of impor-
tance and be virtuous. In the 3rd dasa, he will beget
aconveyance. In its last one third part, he will earn
much prosperity, will lord over many villages and
## Page 250

Chandra Kala Nadi 235

have agricultural gains. His 2nd dasa will cause his
thread ceremony. 12th or 14th year will give him
marriage. Effects for 3rd dasa will bear truth, in
which one will prosper, become famous and will
enjoy happiness.

(©) The Sun in Libra with Capricorn Navamsa,
as Jupiter is in Durdhara Nadiamsa, will give two
wives an Aquarius-born. The subject will lose his
‘spouse in the first sub period of the 4th dasa. His
re-marriage will immediately take place, with Sat-
um moving in the end of Virgo or in Libra. Two
children obtained through the first wife will be
destroyed. Progeny will occur through the 2nd
wife, but this will be limited.

(@) During the operation of the dasa of the 9th
lord, Saturn journeying in the sign equal to his own
natal Navamsa position or a trine thereof will kill
‘one’s paternal uncle. Father’s sister will be highly
anguished in the middle of the dasa, with Saturn
moving in the end of Pisces or in Aries. Anguish
will be less with. Saturn’s transits in the trines
thereof. - During the 1st dasa of the subject, there
will be hurdles to the marriage of father’s brother.
Later in his marriage will however take place. The
said paternal uncle will die in the 3rd dasa of the
native.

dasa (with the next one), one’s father will be in

danger. If he survives this phase, he will be

comes to an end, ‘The Sth dasa will endanger his

ama at the time of one’s birth will cause mother’s

Nadiamsa with Satum’s aspect will contribute to
71 years of total life. In the 36th year, however, the
person will face a threat to his life. Once remedies
are resorted, there will be no such fear and he will
doubtless enjoy the prescribed life-span (i.e. 71
years).

5191-5193. (a) Venusin the 11th (Sagittarius)
will cause prosperity and fame. The 4th dasa will
yield much fortunes. The 3rd dasa will contribute
to limited fortunes.

(b) In Guru Nadi and Sani Nadi, effects for
Malika Yoga relating to birth in Mala Nadiamsa,
Aquarius ascendant have been stated in detail.

(©) One with Venus in the 11th will attain the
worldofBrahmaafter death. He will take to ascetic
order due to a family calamity. These effects as
stated in Surya Nadi, and reflected in Deva Keralam,
will be unfailing.

5194 - 5198, (a) Mercury in his exaltation sign
with Somalata Nadiamsa and begetting the aspect
of the moon will cause the birth of a Soodra, in the
last one fourth part of the Nadiamsa concerned. In
the first quarter of aNadiamsa, the birth will be that
of a trader or a Brahmin. One bom in the 3rd
quarter will have a trading profession while the one
belonging to 2nd quarter will be aruler. A Soodra
or one of mixed caste will also live by trading
profession.

(b) Similarity in effects for Harina as well as
Somavalli Nadiamsa have been stated by Manu.
‘Once Lord Brahma ordained identical effects for
these two Nadiamsas.

Notes: Slokas from 5194 to 5270 deal without
mention of any specific ascendant. However it
occurs to me that these slokas refer to Capricom
ascendant whereof Mercury is the 6th and 9th lord
while some extremely rare but useful aphorisms
are also included independent of the caption. The
6th lord is the significator of maternal uncles
(“Matula” appears in sloka 5199) and the lordof the
9th inthe captioned Nadiamsa is referred toin sloka
5198.

In sloka 5221, Libra ascendant is applied.
Hence as is common Nadi literature, these slokas
should apply to these two movable ascendants.

Importance is mostly given to the position of
exalted Mercury in Soma Lata Nadiamsa which is
also called Harina Nadiamsa. Somalata is also
called Somavalli and Somavathi. Thus these four
names denote one and the same Nadiamsa.
(Somalata or Somavalli is a certain kind of creeper
while Harina means a deer.)

5199 - 5207¥4. (a) The lord of the 9th in Harina
‘Nadiamsa in aspect to Saturn will cause grief to the
## Page 252

Chandra Kala Nadi 237

native after the age of 40. He will enjoy limited
happiness in his boyhood days. In the middle of his
life, prosperity will increase. After 20, he will be
happy.

(b) Mercury in Somalata Nadiamsa will cause
loss of maternal uncle in one’s boyhood. Further,
his father will be bereft of brothers; perhaps he will
have sisters. Paternal aunt’s son will be somewhat
disposed to steal god’s (temple’s) wealth. The
native will be a synonym of virtues and be an
intellectual. He will impart education to kids.

(c) The Sun in Harina Nadiamsa while Mercury
isin Somalata Nadiamsa (i.e. both the planets with
similar Nadiamsas) will cause a diseased body to
one’s father who will die in the native’s 2nd dasa.
When Saturn moves in the sign identical with the
Navamsa occupied by the Sun in the 2nd dasa,
father will be endangered. After father’s death, the
subject’s marriage will take place.

(d@) Mercury in the subject Nadiamsa while the
4th lord is in a Navamsa of Venus will ensure
longevity of mother. The person will additionally
be endowed with co-born. In Guru Nadi, co-bom
have been dealt with in detail.

(e) Venus in Somalata Nadiamsa while Mer-
cury is in the 8th will cause a number of brothers
and children. One’s brothers will be wealthy. One
of his older brothers will have no male progeny but
daughters and two wives. Another brother imme-
diately following the eldest will have both sons and
daughters, be fond of his co-born, be quite happy
and be secretively libidinous.

Notes: (e) “Hari’ ative of Leo in Varaha
Mihira’s Brihat Samhita which does not however
suit our purpose as a planet is denoted by the term
in our text. “Hari” means “Venus” according to
‘Wm. Moniersas attributed to native lexicons though
such a view is yet unpublished.

5208 - 5211. (a) Mercury in exaltation with
Saturn's aspect and with Aquarius Navamsa de-
notes existence of brothers following the oldest.
The person will fondly pursue moral merits. He
will befriend soodras, be passionate and will have
numerous friends. He will be highly honoured by
his Kinsmen, and will patronize gods and Brah-
mins.

(b) The Sun in Harina Nadiamsa will make one
a devotee of Lords Vishnu and Siva. He will
honour his preceptors and be ever fond of the
indigent. He will be virtuous and will follow the
path specified by the Vedas.

Mercury isin his debilitation Navamsa denotes that

After some interval, he will shift to a shrine. He

will acquire wealth in his old age. Grief will come

~~ 5214 - 5219. Mercury in Somalata Nadiamsa

(in Virgo) will give a lot of children. Only one son

will be long-lived. Daughters will be five in

number. According to sage Garga, two sons and

five daughters will be blessed with longevity; a

total of 14 children will be born to the subject.

‘Many will die and one son will’be long-lived.
## Page 253

238 Deva Keralam

(b) Sage Parasara’s work prescribes a number
of dead children due to sins of the previous births
if Mercury is found in the subject Nadiamsa. Only
one long-living son is denoted by Parasara, while
sage Gargarefers to two such male issues. Accord-
ing tome (the author), one son and five daughters
will be long-lived. Three of the daughters will be
blessed with long-living husbands while the rest
will be anguished (due to untimely widowhood).
Children born in the native’s birth Nakshatra will
live long.

Notes: (a) The first line of sloka 5216 has an
alternative reading, thus: “ Manu samkhyaani
santaanetaataattimaadiseth”

5220 -5229¥4, (a) Birth of children is denoted
in the dasa of the 9th lord. In the dasa of 2nd lord,
children will prosper. The person will be exceed-
ingly happy due to auspicious effects accruing to
his children.

(b) Mercury in the 12th in exaltation and in the

captioned Nadiamsa will in his dasa cause happi-
ness. The 3rd dasa will give wealth. Halfoof the 4th
dasa will give happiness, while the last one third
part of the dasa will destroy wealth. Half of the 6th
dasa will cause an emaciated physique due to utter
Penury.

(©) The end of the 4th dasa will cause anguish
if the 9th lord is placed in a Navamsa owned by
Saturn, Due to highly anguishing poverty, he will
leave his native country. Death of mother will
occur in the 4th dasa when Saturn reaches the Moon
sign, the 2nd or the 12th thereof.

(@) The concluding part of the 2nd dasa will
instil fear of untimely death if Mercury is in
Somavalli Nadiamsa. One will escape death.

(©) The sub period of the 9th lord during the
dasa of the 8th lord will usher grief on account of
loss of co-born. He will be emaciated due to
penury.

(6) Brother's death can occur in the dasa of the
1th lord or the 10th lord.

(g) Saturn transiting the resultant sign caused
by adding the longitudes of the lords of the 8th and
‘Sth will cause grief on account of loss of co-born if
Mercury is placed in Harina Nadiamsa. Ina trine
to the said sign, Saturn’s transit will cause mental
agony apart from grief on account of co-born and
progeny. Evils to brother's progeny is also de-
noted.

$233 - 5243. (a) Irrelevant: For a birth with
Mercury in Somavathi Nadiamsa, Saturn’s journey
in the sign identical with the Navamsa occupied by
Ketu, ora trine thereof, will destroy the ruler of the
country or someone equal to him apart from caus-
ing troubles to the inmates. With Saturn’ transits,
grief to the minister and others can be deduced.

(b) At the time of the setting periods of Jupiter
and Venus, coinciding with evil transits of Jupiter
(year) and the Sun (month), the native will incur
physical ailments (in the dasa of the lord of the
10th).

(©) Hiskinsfolk will be subjected to evils when
Saturn moves in the sign identical with the Nav-
amsa occupied by the lord of the 8th, or a trine
thereof, or in Sagittarius coinciding with the ad-
verse transits of Jupiter and the Sun. The native
particularly people from his friends’ circle will also
incur physical diseases.

(d) The Moon in Pisces with Scorpio Navamsa
as Mercury is in his sign of exaltation with Aquarius
Navamsa will help the lord of the 10th give happi-

ness in his dasa. But the dasa of the 11th lord will
be asource of distress. Its 2nd half will however be
auspicious, following the age of 50.

(€) The sub periods of Rahu in the various dasas
will cause anguish (for natives of Capricorn and
Libra). The Moon’s sub period will be a source of
some anguish while that ruled by Mars will produce
an admixture of good and bad effects. The Sun’s
dasa in combination with Rahu’s sub period will
promote anguish. The sub period of Rahu in the
dasa of the Moon will specially involve the person
in a great danger. To overcome this, palliative
measures be sought. During the 55th and 56th

years, suitable remedies as prescribed by the Sastras

be done to ward off the blemish of relevant sub
period. Donation of an image of the zodiac (or a
mystical Tantrik diagram) be given (when Saturn
journeys) in the endof Taurus orin the end of Pisces
(the junction point with Aries).
